DataCanvas stands as a leading provider of artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure and intelligent computing cloud services. Anchored by its mission of "Creating Intelligence, Exploring the Unknown" and the vision of "Empowering AI-enhanced Businesses Worldwide",  the company has independently developed and built a complete in-house AIDC technology stack,an intelligent computing operating system, and integrated intelligent computing industry chain.
Its renowned product portfolio includes Alaya NeW Cloud and Alaya NeW OS. These solutions deliver high-performance computing, intelligent computing cloud services, and AI software tailored for AI training and inference, effectively empowering a vast community of AI developers and enterprise clients.
As a global champion of inclusive computing power, DataCanvas pioneered the world's first computing power measurement standard.It prides itself on a 10,000P+ computing power reserve and over 400 independent intellectual property rights. The company plays a pivotal role in optimizing computing resource allocation and fueling AI innovation momentum, solidifying its position as a core force in advancing AI infrastructure for Digital construction.

properties.name@en: Harbin Coslight New Energy Co., Ltd....
properties.description@en: Harbin Coslight New Energy Co., Ltd.(COSPOWERS),is a national high-tech enterprisefocusing on the field of new energy storage. The technical team has been deeply engaged in thefield of energy storage batteries for more than 30 years, with R & D, manufacturing, sales andservice capabilities of materials, cells, battery management systems, energy managementsystems, system integration, etc, and has provided diversified products and systematic solutionsin the fields of power storage, communication energy storage, network energy storage, house-hold energy storage, and consumer batteries for more than 60 countries and regions around theworld.

China Unicom Global Limited (China Unicom Global) is a specialized subsidiary of China Unicom dedicated to international businesses. It has established over 40 branches worldwide, invested in over 60 international submarine cable systems, providing services across the globe.
Leveraging extensive network resources, expert-level system integration capabilities, and expertise in digital technology innovation, China Unicom Global is a trusted partner in providing comprehensive global digital intelligence services, including global connectivity, cloud computing, data center solutions, ICT, IoT, global voice, data roaming services, and more.

As a leading autonomous driving company, UISEE is committed to providing AI driving service for all industries and all scenarios and building AI drivers that empower a new ecology of mobility and logistics. Since its foundation in February 2016, UISEE has taken root in the global market and insisted on local R&D. UISEE has its headquarters and R&D base in Beijing, R&D center in Shanghai, testing and innovation center in Jiashan, and offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, Katar, Shenzhen, Wuhan, Chongqing and other regions.

Relying on its self-developed U-Drive® platform, UISEE has built a scalable L3-L4 intelligent driving system that meets the need of multi-scenario and high-level autonomous driving. In 2019, UISEE made a breakthrough via daily "No-Safety-Driver" autonomous driving operation in airports and factories; Meanwhile, its "full-scenario, real driverless, and all-weather" autonomous driving tech started to be deployed and took step into large-scale commercialization. By December 2025, UISEE had accumulated 7.5 million kilometers of real driverless autonomous driving mileage.

China Unicom Global Limited (China Unicom Global) is a specialized subsidiary of China Unicom dedicated to international businesses. It has established over 40 branches worldwide, invested in over 60 international submarine cable systems, providing services across the globe.
Leveraging extensive network resources, expert-level system integration capabilities, and expertise in digital technology innovation, China Unicom Global is a trusted partner in providing comprehensive global digital intelligence services, including global connectivity, cloud computing, data center solutions, ICT, IoT, global voice, data roaming services, and more.

Helios Technologies focus on R&D, Manufacture and Sale for total innovation solutions of Cellular & Public Safety Wireless Radio Access & Coverage, covering span 88 to 5890MHz supporting GSM, UMTS, TETRA, P25, DMR, AM & FM & DAB, VHF & UHF, LTE and 5G NR technologies.
Our core product portfolio includes Multi-Band & Multi-Operator & Multi-Service Active & Hybrid & Passive DAS, 4G & 5G Multi-Band Fiber to the Antenna FTTA, Digital Off-Air Repeaters, AirNexus™ Next-Generation Digital Off-air Repeater with Fiber, 5G NR O-RAN (vBBU, HUB, pRRU, AAU and mRRU), 4G LTE eNB (BBU and RRU) combine SDR (Software Defined Radio) Technology based upon our Proprietary FPGA & DSP Algorithms, and offering turnkey solutions for indoor and outdoor 2G/3G/4G/5G to our global customers.

Edge Infrastructure use cases are varied and have traditionally been addressed by custom purpose-built appliances (e.g. Telco, Networking, Object Detection).

MatSing is the pioneer and global leader in RF lens antenna technology. As the first to develop and deploy lens-based wireless systems at scale, MatSing delivers high-performance solutions that address the toughest network capacity and coverage challenges across all environments.

Using patented meta-materials and RF lens designs, MatSing antennas produce multiple precisely isolated beams, enabling true sector-splitting with ultra-wide 120-degree coverage and superior signal clarity. Each lightweight antenna supports up to 48 independent sectors, maximizing performance and minimizing interference with fewer antennas.

MatSing’s versatile portfolio supports both permanent and temporary deployments, making it ideal for stadiums, events, urban, suburban, and rural macro networks. Designed for efficiency, MatSing antennas simplify site planning, accelerate deployment, and enhance network performance.

To learn more, visit www.matsing.com

Finwave Semiconductor is advancing mobile communications with next-generation GaN on Silicon technology for RF Front-Ends.

Finwave’s GaN innovation delivers remarkable improvement in linearity and power efficiency for 5G / 6G communications. With numerous GaN technology patents, Finwave is shaping the future through a new breakthrough transistor and process technology designed to optimize the potential of GaN for higher frequency and higher power operation.
Finwave’s GaN on Silicon E-Mode 5 V Ultra Linear Planar and FinFET technologies, are the result of deep tech semiconductor research.
Finwave is the originator of the world’s first 8” GaN insulating gate FinFET wafer processed in a CMOS fab. Finwave operates from offices in Massachusetts and California, with partners located across the world.

Ultichip is a Chinese fabless semiconductor company. The company's SoC chips support various 3GPP and IEEE802.11 base stations and APs including digital front-ends, basebands, protocol stacks, and lightweight gateways for OEMs. With ultra-low Capex and OPEX, Ultichip supports operators for micro, pico and femto cell stations with integrated and distributed installations. Based on our SoC chips, Ultichip also offers complete reference designs and turnkey customized services to reduce customers’ R&D cost and accelerates time-to-market. We work closely to customers offering customized solutions, HW and/or SW designs. Based on strong VC investments and product profits, Ultichip makes sustainable great strides forwards. Ultichip has been cooperating with global OEMs and operators.

AI scales on context, not chaos.
Most telco AI is siloed within a single vendor application or limited by data snapshots it can analyze – but never act on.
The Totogi Ontology is different. It’s the executable knowledge layer above your BSS, OSS, and network – the foundation for operational AI. It unifies semantics, encodes decision logic, and enables AI to reason AND act across your telco.
The insight-to-outcome gap collapses to seconds. Invalid actions become architecturally impossible. Each connection compounds intelligence.
Join Tier-1 operators using Totogi to generate revenue, deploy new capabilities, and more – without replacing a single system.
Hall 2, Booth 2G51 | totogi.com/MWC26

DeepSig, Inc. is a pioneering, product-centric technology company that develops revolutionary wireless AI software by leveraging state-of-the-art machine learning techniques and signal processing expertise. Its transformative solutions push the boundaries of spectrum sensing, wireless performance and network capabilities, reshaping key wireless applications such as baseband processing and wireless sensing. DeepSig’s AI/ML-powered software enhances security, efficiency, and capacity for tactical and commercial wireless communications across licensed or shared radio spectrums and within existing 5G Open RAN or AI-native next-generation networks. With products like OmniPHY-5G™ and OmniSIG™, DeepSig is at the forefront of improving 5G network performance, increasing capacity and paving the way for AI-Native 6G.

Airgain simplifies wireless connectivity across a diverse set of devices and markets, from solving complex connectivity issues to speeding time to market to enhancing wireless signals. UNISOC is a globally leading chip design company specializing in the communication semiconductor industry for over 20 years. DriveNets is a leader in disaggregated high-scale networking solutions for service providers and AI infrastructures. DriveNets’ Network Cloud offers a radical new way to build networks, accelerating deployment and improving the network’s economic model. Ocient delivers AI-driven, industry-specific solutions built on a composable data fabric for autonomous systems. Ocient enables organizations to deploy and operate AI agents and applications that reason over high-velocity, with full-resolution data in real time, delivering autonomous insight, decisioning, and action with predictable economics and control. Ocient solutions unify data ingestion, analytics, governance, and orchestration into a single operating layer that scales efficiently across on-premises and cloud environments. Acting as a gateway to cloud ecosystems, Ocient enables governed data products to be securely published to cloud analytics and AI/ML platforms with policy, lineage, and with data quality preserved end to end. As data volumes grow, customers unlock increasing value. 
Headquartered in Chicago, Ocient is a global, carbon-neutral company, committed to reducing AI’s environmental impact, and backed by leading investors including Greycroft, OCA Ventures, In-Q-Tel, and Buoyant Ventures. For more information, visit www.ocient.com.

Aduna is a pioneering industry collaboration between Ericsson and leading global telecom operators, designed to aggregate and standardize network APIs across geographies.  Using the CAMARA open-source framework from the GSMA and Linux Foundation, Aduna unifies access to diverse network capabilities into a single developer friendly platform.  In partnership with top developer platforms, Aduna eliminates fragmentation, streamlines integration, and enables the rapid deployment of innovative digital services. This approach empowers developers to build high-performance, scalable applications while unlocking new commercial opportunities for the telecom ecosystem.  By aggregating APIs globally, Aduna enhances user experiences, drives ecosystem collaboration, and accelerates industry wide digital transformation. To find out more about network APIs and Aduna, visit adunaglobal.com.
We enable developer platforms — hyperscalers, CPaaS providers, systems integrators, and ISVs — to scale globally and accelerate their boldest ideas.

RECOMMERCE GROUP is the European pioneer of refurbishment of high-tech products, particularly smartphones. Founded in 2009 in Europe and in 2014 in Switzerland, Recommerce purchases used devices, provides software and app-based trade-in solutions to retailers, businesses, refurbishers, and resells refurbished devices. The company distributes its refurbished products under the registered consumer brand "Recommerce " and sells them on www.recommerce.com as well as in numerous European countries through distributors and telecom operators.

Aligned with the principles of the circular economy, the company fosters refurbishment and reuse of equipment through the integration of AI technologies within the industrial sector.

Recommerce is certified ISO 14001, ISO 9001, ISO 27001 by DNV and holds the RecQ – Quality Refurbishment label, the first European certification guaranteeing the quality of the refurbishment process by DEKRA Certification. Additionally, Recommerce has been awarded a Gold rating by EcoVadis for its CSR policy.

Aligned with the principles of the circular economy, the company fosters refurbishment and reuse of equipment through the integration of AI technologies within the industrial sector.

Recommerce is certified ISO 14001, ISO 9001, ISO 27001 by DNV and holds the RecQ – Quality Refurbishment label, the first European certification guaranteeing the quality of the refurbishment process by DEKRA Certification. Additionally, Recommerce has been awarded a Gold rating by EcoVadis for its CSR policy.

LG Uplus has always strived to come closer to customers' lives, building on the essence of telecommunications- "connection."

In 2025, LG Uplus reached a new turning point with an AX(AI Transformation) centered business strategy, aiming to drive innovation in customer experience. 
Guided by the belief that people must be at the center of technology, we are committed to creating warmer, more trustworthy technologies through "human-centered AI."

KT Corporation (formerly Korea Telecom) is South Korea’s leading telecommunications company. In particular, KT has been a key contributor to the commercialization and expansion of 5G, delivering advanced connectivity experiences to customers.



Looking ahead, KT aims to accelerate digital transformation through its AI-driven technologies and position itself as a leading AI innovation partner in emerging markets. By advancing AI capabilities, KT continues to create new value and drive innovation across a wide range of industries.

iFLYTEK Co., Ltd. is a publicly listed global artificial intelligence company specializing in intelligent speech and large-scale AI models. Founded in 1999, iFLYTEK is widely recognized as a pioneer and leading innovator in intelligent speech and AI technologies across the Asia-Pacific region.

Spain Pavilion is the meeting point to discover the immense potential of  the spanish technological field.

It also offers a prominent conference programme and networking activities with business leaders, industry representatives and international delegations.

Since 2013, Spain Pavilion at MWC Barcelona has been organised by Red.es.

Red.es is a public corporation under the Ministry of Digital Transformation and Public Service, through the Secretary of State for Digitalization and Artificial Intelligence. It is responsible for implementing public policies outlined in Spain’s Digital Agenda. Its main areas of action include innovation and entrepreneurship, the promotion of the digital economy (with a special focus on the digitalisation of SMEs focused on AI), digital public services, and the development of smart cities.

Cellnex is Europe's largest telecommunications towers and infrastructures operator, enabling operators to access a wide network of telecommunications infrastructures on a shared-use basis, and thus helping to reduce access barriers and to improve services in the most remote areas, whilst also contributing to more sustainable deployment.

Yas (owned by AXIAN Telecom) is a pan-African telecommunications service provider operating in eleven markets in Tanzania, Madagascar, Togo, Senegal, Uganda, Kenya, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Comoros, Malawi, Réunion, and Mayotte. Cassava Technologies is a global technology leader of African heritage providing a vertically integrated ecosystem of digital services and infrastructure enabling digital transformation. Headquartered in the UK, Cassava has a presence across Africa, the Middle East, Latin America and the United States of America. Through its business units, namely, Cassava AI, Liquid Intelligent Technologies, Liquid C2, Africa Data Centres, and Sasai Fintech, the company provides its customers' products and services in 94 countries. Ethio telecom is Africa's pioneering, integrated telecom and digital solutions provider, driving the nation’s digital transformation since 1894. With a massive subscriber base of 87.1 million and over 58.61 million telebirr users, we leverage our expansive network of over 10,288 mobile sites to deliver comprehensive digital ecosystems. Guided by our "Next Horizon: Digital & Beyond 2028 Strategy," our portfolio spans from Basic Connectivity to advanced Enterprise Solutions, Data Centers, Public Cloud, AI, FinTech, and e-commerce.  As a regional powerhouse, we are actively expanding our footprint beyond borders to strengthen regional partnerships, exporting our successful digital financial and infrastructure expertise through strategic collaborations to accelerate the "Digital Africa" journey.

Established in 1994, MTN began as a pioneering entrant in a newly liberalised South African telecommunications market at the dawn of the country’s democracy. Over three decades, it has grown into Africa’s largest mobile operator and a leading provider of digital and financial solutions, serving more than 310 million customers. Headquartered in Johannesburg and listed on the JSE, MTN operates across 16 markets, with subsidiaries also listed in Ghana, Nigeria, Rwanda and Uganda. MTN’s core business spans Connectivity, Fintech and Digital Infrastructure. Sustainability and shared value shape how MTN creates long-term impact. Through its Foundations, this commitment extends across Africa. Programmes in education, health, youth empowerment and community development expand access to knowledge, skills and opportunity, enabling broader participation in the digital economy. Through these initiatives, MTN seeks to equip Africans with tools to build lives of hope, dignity and opportunity, advancing its purpose of leading digital solutions for Africa's progress.

At MWC Barcelona 2026, Viettel delivers the message: “Global Technology, Sustainable Future.” Through continuous innovation and extensive international collaboration, Viettel not only adopts advanced technologies but also proactively participates in shaping the next generation of digital infrastructure — connecting people, empowering businesses, and promoting sustainable development worldwide.

VIAVI Solutions Inc. is a global leader in test and measurement and optical technologies. Our test, monitoring, assurance, and resilient position, navigation and timing solutions enable and secure critical infrastructure ranging from data center ecosystems and communication networks to military, aerospace, railway and first responder communications. In addition, we develop and advance technologies used in high-volume optical applications across anti-counterfeiting, consumer electronics,  aerospace  industrial and automotive end markets.

Leshun Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in the R&D and manufacturing of advanced biometric and smart hardware products. With a focus on innovation, quality, and reliability, we deliver secure and intelligent solutions for access control, identity verification, and IoT applications worldwide.

Our core products include facial recognition terminals, fingerprint scanners, palm vein recognition modules, and related smart devices, widely used in sectors such as enterprise security, smart office, banking, and residential management.

Committed to technological excellence and customer satisfaction, we provide professional OEM/ODM services and tailor‑made solutions to meet diverse global needs.

LuxCarta is a global leader in digital mapping and geospatial intelligence, specializing in AI-driven 3D and high-resolution geodata solutions for industries such as telecommunications, simulation & training and environmental management. Established in 1989 and headquartered in Sophia Antipolis, France, LuxCarta provides geospatial products tailored for applications requiring precise and up-to-date mapping data, including 3D buildings, vegetation, land use and terrain analysis.

Our telecom offering includes the Planner geodata product line for RF planning and optimization and the BrightEarth AI platform, which enables users to create precise 3D geospatial data derived from real-time satellite catalogues and archives of leading global earth observation imagery vendors. Customers are supported by skilled geospatial experts across five corporate offices worldwide, providing local expertise and personalized service to ensure the best results for their projects.

Telit Cinterion is a global enabler of the intelligent edge providing complete solutions that reduce time to market and costs, delivering custom designed, ready for market connected devices in addition to maintaining the industry’s broadest portfolio of enterprise-grade wireless communication and positioning modules, cellular MVNO connectivity plans and management services, edge-cloud software and data orchestration, and IoT and Industrial IoT platforms. Business France is the national agency supporting the international development of the French economy, responsible for fostering export growth by French businesses, as well as promoting and facilitating international investment in France.
It promotes France’s companies, business image and nationwide attractiveness as an investment location, and also runs the VIE international internship program.
Business France has 1,500 personnel, both in France and in 58 countries throughout the world, who work with a network of partners.
Since January 2019, as part of the reform of the state support system for exports, Business France has given private partners responsibility for supporting French SMEs and mid-size companies in the following markets: Belgium, Hungary, Morocco, Norway, the Philippines and Singapore.

Tencent Cloud, one of the world's leading cloud companies, is committed to creating innovative solutions to resolve real-world issues and enabling digital transformation for smart industries. Iquall Networks is a telecom-oriented software company specialized in Network Automation and AI-driven operations. Since 2008, we have been helping Tier-1 and Tier-2 Communication Service Providers transform complex networks into scalable, automated, and monetizable platforms.

At Nomad Automate, we believe that the networks powering our digital world should be as intelligent and efficient as the services they support. Since 2005, we’ve been at the forefront of network discovery, automation, and optimization—helping telcos turn complex, multi-vendor networks into high-performance infrastructures.
Our cloud-based platform uses AI to automate the discovery, analysis, and management of network resources. 
We specialize in:
- End-to-end network discovery and service stitching – creating a single, accurate view of even the most complex networks.
- Capacity management – ensuring networks have the right resources, in the right place, at the right time.
- AI-driven automation – from real-time capacity reports to automated root cause analysis, making network operations faster and smarter.
- Optical spectrum analysis and defragmentation – maximizing the efficiency and ROI of optical networks.
At Nomad Automate, we’re not just about technology—we’re about empowering our customers to build the networks of tomorrow, today.

7Generation is an international technology company specializing in telecom data analytics and cybersecurity.

For over 12 years, we have been turning raw network traffic into actionable intelligence, helping governments and telecom operators build secure and efficient digital networks.
We help organizations understand, control, and monetize telecom traffic in real time. By combining AI-driven analytics, Deep Packet Inspection, and telecom-grade data science, we transform complex network data into measurable outcomes.
We work with telecom operators, government authorities and regulators, cybersecurity and critical infrastructure bodies, law enforcement agencies, and system integrators operating at national and enterprise scale.
At MWC Barcelona 2026, we showcase two flagship products: DPI Inline and NetVision AI. DPI Inline delivers real-time traffic inspection and control, embedded directly into live network flows. NetVision AI is an AI-driven analytics platform designed for traffic analysis and risk detection.

With 800+ experts, a vendor-independent architecture, dedicated R&D laboratories, and fully in-house proprietary technologies, 7Generation enables operators and governments to turn telecom data into intelligence.

Let's Meet!

XConnect provides number intelligence that enables carriers, communication service providers and brands to make real-time fraud prevention, routing, rating and security decisions.
It offers comprehensive, privacy-compliant network and subscriber information that enables service providers to:
•       Route efficiently - Determine optimal carrier routes for voice and A2P messaging traffic based on real-time network data
•       Validate traffic - Verify number validity, portability status, and subscriber information before completing connections
•       Prevent fraud - Identify and block suspicious activity, spoofed numbers, and other fraudulent activity
It supports the world’s largest Mobile network operators (MNOs), A2P messaging hubs, SMS aggregators, wholesale carriers, and brands managing high-volume communications and digital interactions.

Find out more www.xconnect.net/contact

VISICOM is a digital mapping and geospatial data company delivering 2D and 3D geodata solutions to clients worldwide.

Our services include 2D and 3D geodata production, AI-based satellite imagery processing, and customized digital models for 5G network planning.
VISICOM produces detailed cartographic layers such as BUILDINGS, TERRAIN, VEGETATION, TRANSPORT NETWORK , and HYDROGRAPHY, using advanced production workflows, neural networks, and proprietary data-processing technologies.
With an extensive off-the-shelf (OTS) data catalog and 3D models covering more than 2,500 cities and 85 countries worldwide, VISICOM enables fast, accurate, and scalable delivery of geodata for projects of any size — ensuring precision, reliability, and timely results.

NOTEL delivers advanced solutions for measuring, analyzing, and optimizing mobile network performance for operators, infrastructure vendors, and enterprises. With over 20 years of experience as a system integrator and telecom project driven partner, the company supports customers worldwide through multi‑vendor network testing, performance analytics, and end‑to‑end optimization services.

NOTEL’s portfolio spans active and passive measurements, including drive tests, indoor assessments, SLA verification, and network traces. Its proprietary analytics platform enables real‑time KPI processing, QoE evaluation, geospatial operations, and scalable big‑data management for nationwide datasets. 

The company also provides comprehensive planning and configuration assessments, 5G network verification, and automated reporting through interactive dashboards and drill‑down capabilities. 

Complementing its software, NOTEL delivers specialized telecom hardware, such as modular drive‑test cases, hybrid measurement systems, and dedicated power‑supply units designed for reliable field operations.

Trusted globally, NOTEL helps organizations such as MNOs, Tower and Service companies, Enterprises, Industries and Public Institutions enhance network quality, accelerate optimization processes, and ensure superior end‑user experience.

ELSPES Inc. (formerly Elohim) is an integrated passive device (IPD) company specializing in next-generation silicon capacitor technology. Utilizing advanced semiconductor manufacturing and a proprietary 3D Deep Trench Capacitor (DTC) structure, we deliver industry-leading performance for AI, High-Performance Computing (HPC), and 5G/6G.
Our products feature high-density solutions for both DC Decoupling and AC Coupling:
-DC Decoupling: We provide ultra-high-density decoupling capacitors with record-breaking densities reaching 3,500 nF/mm². These capacitors feature variable thickness from 1,5mm down  to <50µm, allowing them to be placed directly between the solder balls of Application Processors (AP) or embedded within advanced packages to ensure superior power integrity and noise suppression.
-AC Coupling: For high-freq data transmission, our Silicon AC Coupling Capacitors support operations up to 60 GHz (planing for 100+ GHz). These are essential for signal integrity in advanced interfaces offering significantly lower insertion loss than MLCCs. 
By prioritizing customer value, we provide the best technology and products to create improved solutions for the present and future.

Whether resolving issues or proactively helping customers discover greater value, Decagon builds meaningful connections between brands and customers that are authentic, intelligent, and truly satisfying - redefining what customer experience should be. For more information, visit decagon.ai.

Fibocom, founded in 1999, is China's first wireless communication module company listed on both the A-share and H-share markets (300638.SZ, 0638.HK). As a global leading provider of wireless communication modules and AI solutions, Fibocom leverages wireless communication and artificial intelligence as its core technologies to provide integrated hardware and software solutions that empower industry applications. These solutions accelerate the transformation from "Connect Everything" to "Intelligent Connectivity" across diverse industries.

Fibocom's one-stop solutions encompass cellular communication, AI, automotive, and GNSS modules, as well as AI toolchains, supporting industry-side and mainstream large model integration, and providing AI Agent, global connectivity, and cloud services, driving the digital intelligence upgrades in industries such as robotics, consumer electronics, low-altitude economy, intelligent transportation, smart retail, and smart energy.

Adaptigent enables enterprises to connect critical systems and data through a modern, low-code integration platform. Our Adaptive Integration Fabric allows organizations to securely access and share information across mainframe, cloud, and distributed environments in real time—without rewriting existing applications. 

Trusted by Fortune 100 and global enterprises operating in highly regulated, data intensive industries, Adaptigent supports organizations with complex environments that require secure, reliable, and large scale integration. 

We help companies modernize core systems, improve agility, and accelerate digital transformation while preserving the value of their current technology investments. By simplifying integration and orchestration, Adaptigent provides the flexibility and control enterprises need to evolve at their own pace.

PCCW Global is a leading digital infrastructure provider, empowering businesses
with agile, scalable and secure connectivity solutions. By combining a best-in-class
network with our award-winning on-demand platform Console Connect, we help
businesses navigate the network complexities of the digital world with ease. With
extensive reach across international markets, we make it simple to connect and
move data between clouds, apps, data centres and devices. At the core of our
business is a belief that automated, high-performance network infrastructure has the
power to elevate business and society. For more information, visit
www.pccwglobal.com.

Compax is a leading BSS/OSS software provider for the telecommunications industry. Its business software suite covers the full spectrum required for MNO, MVNO, MVNE, MVNA, DSL, FTTH: Apps and portals for customer orders and selfcare, convergent product catalog, CPQ, order management, CRM, contact center, billing, accounting, payments and online charging. Compax enables operators to bring new services, offers, and brands to market with a quick turnaround and covering B2B, B2C, and B2B2X scenarios. Relying on proven agile methodology, Compax successfully serves top brands around the globe. Following the acquisition of NTS Retail, Compax now completed its portfolio to provide MNO/MVNOs with everything they need to operate their retail channel.

Quvia is the first AI-powered QoE platform for ships, planes and remote sites. The platform seamlessly blends any combination of connectivity—including multiple service providers, satellite orbits, and terrestrial networks—into one, vendor-neutral environment; continuously measures and analyzes real-time connectivity performance and its impact on Quality of Experience (QoE); and intelligently orchestrates the network to deliver the best possible QoE—even in the most remote places. Today, Quvia works with industry-leading companies in aviation, cruise, energy, shipping and more. To learn more, visit: www.quvia.ai.

Tencent Cloud, one of the world's leading cloud companies, is committed to creating innovative solutions to resolve real-world issues and enabling digital transformation for smart industries. Through our extensive global infrastructure, Tencent Cloud provides businesses across the globe with stable and secure industry-leading cloud products and services, leveraging technological advancements such as cloud computing, Big Data analytics, AI, IoT, and network security. It is our constant mission to meet the needs of industries across the board, including the fields of gaming, media and entertainment, finance, healthcare, property, retail, travel, and transportation.

At MWC Barcelona, DT One is proud to showcase its global connectivity, fintechs, gaming and innovative solutions for the mobile top-up market. We are dedicated to help global brands grow by helping them to expand to over 190 markets worldwide, grow their brands and value proposition, increase revenues and retention. 

DT One has been bringing world-class services to people across the globe. With cutting-edge technology and exceptional customer service, DT One is a must-see for anyone looking to stay ahead of the curve in the mobile top-up space.

Visit www.DTOne.com

Our platform provides telecom operators, regulators, governments and enterprises with full visibility, control and analytics over encrypted traffic  without decryption.
31 CONCEPT helps organizations improve network performance, ensure national-level cybersecurity, and unlock new data-driven revenue opportunities.

Ampere is a modern semiconductor company designing the future of cloud computing with the world's first Cloud Native Processors. Built for the sustainable Cloud with the highest performance and best performance per watt, Ampere processors accelerate the delivery of all cloud computing applications. Ampere Cloud Native Processors provide industry-leading cloud performance, power efficiency and scalability. For more information visit Ampere Computing.

Viasat is a global communications company that believes everyone and everything in the world can be connected. With offices in 24 countries around the world, our mission shapes how consumers, businesses, governments and militaries around the world communicate and connect. Viasat is developing the ultimate global communications network to power high-quality, reliable, secure, affordable, fast connections to positively impact people's lives anywhere they are—on the ground, in the air or at sea, while building a sustainable future in space. In May 2023, Viasat completed its acquisition of Inmarsat, combining the teams, technologies and resources of the two companies to create a new global communications partner.

CircuitX is the three year-initiative designed to champion mobile technology across motorsports and transform the circuit experience with connectivity.
 
The CircuitX Demo zone showcases advanced technology and connectivity solutions from leading partners: Al Kamel, Barcelona Drone Center, Ericsson, Formula E, Into Reality, MatSing and NTT DATA.
 
CircuitX’s project will highlight five areas where mobile connectivity can support innovation across motorsport and large-scale events including:
 
Travel & Navigation: Real-time journey management and traffic optimisation
 
Security & Safety: Enhanced emergency communication and crowd monitoring
 
Fan Movement: Smart venue navigation and crowd flow management
 
Fan Experience: Personalised content, live data and immersive experiences
 
Race Telemetry: Secure, efficient data transmission for teams and fans
 
Come and explore the future of event communications and motorsport innovation through expert sessions and demonstrations. Discover how mobile connectivity transforms how millions of fans connect, engage, and experience every moment around the track.

AGIBOT builds world-leading general-purpose embodied robots and their application ecosystems by pioneering the fusion and innovation of Al and robotics. AGBOT was established in February 2023 with a founding team of seasoned industry experts, including core executives from global technology leaders and top Al scientists, bringing together deep technical expertise, comprehensive management experience, and
extensive industrial resources.
AGIBOT has developed an industry-leading full-stack robotics platform integrating "Embodiment + Al." Boasting three robot series—Yuanzheng, Lingxi, and Genie. AGIBOT covers a wide range of commercial scenarios. AGIBOT is one of the world's first companies to accomplish large-scale production and commercial deployment of embodied robots, with its products now available in multiple countries and regions.
In January 2025, AGIBOT made history by mass-producing its 1,000 general-purpose embodied robot, setting a new industry milestone.By December of the same year, AGIBOT shipped over 5,100 humanoid robots, ranking No.1 worldwide in shipment volume.

OQ Technology is a global leader in 5G satellite Non-Terrestrial Network (NTN) connectivity and direct-to-device (D2D) communications, revolutionizing the IoT landscape with the world's first Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite constellation. The company's patented technology enables seamless 5G coverage for IoT devices, leveraging standardized 3GPP narrowband-IoT capabilities. 
Founded in 2016 and headquartered in Luxembourg, OQ Technology has rapidly expanded with strategic offices worldwide. The company's innovative hybrid of terrestrial and satellite networks provides truly ubiquitous global connectivity, supported by partnerships with industry giants like Aramco, Deutsche Telekom, and Telefónica.

Filtronic is a trusted designer and manufacturer of high-performance, high-frequency RF subsystems, with a strong focus on enabling advanced space applications. Our technologies operate at frequencies up to 175 GHz and support a wide range of ground station and spaceborne systems, from HAPS to lunar missions, specialising in satellite communications, high-frequency data links, Direct-to-Device (D2D) connectivity and emerging Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN).

With decades of experience and a reputation for innovation, Filtronic supports some of the world’s leading space and aerospace organisations, delivering custom transceivers, power amplifiers, low noise amplifiers, filters and integrated subsystems tailored to customer requirements.

A recent collaboration with SpaceX highlights our expertise in mmWave technology for satellite connectivity. We also contribute to national and European space initiatives, developing RF modules under ESA ARTES funding for Ka, Q and V bands, driving next-generation architectures that enable NTN and D2D capabilities..

properties.name@en: ESA and GSMA Foundry NTN Showcase
properties.description@en:
The European Space Agency (ESA) and GSMA Foundry are excited to be exhibiting within the New Frontiers zone Hall 6 at MWC26 Barcelona to showcase the innovative technologies that are shaping and integrating satellite and terrestrial networks.

At MWC25 Barcelona, ESA and GSMA Foundry launched 3 innovation challenges that focused on 4 key areas: advancing direct-to-device (D2D), fostering 6G innovation, establishing 5G/6G testing hubs, and integrating fixed and mobile networks – all key areas for achieving reliable, seamless connectivity on a global scale.

Join us and see first-hand the partner companies that have developed pioneering technologies and are addressing delivering global impact by tackling critical connectivity challenges such as bridging the digital divide and supporting sustainable development.

Discover how these challenge partners are delivering global impact through pioneering solutions to critical connectivity challenges; Accedo, Autodiscovery, AWTG, Celeste, Filtronic, Keysight / Sateliot, Lasting Software, MediaTek / Rohde & Schwarz, Microamp, MinWave Technologies SA, NextWorks, Nokia, OQ Technology, Photon Engine and Qoherent.

The Quantum Flagship is a 10-year initiative funded by the European Commission. It was launched in October 2018 to accelerate the development of quantum technologies and their transition to the market. The Flagship is currently in its second phase, coordinating seven large Framework Agreements (FPA) in Quantum Communications, Simulation, Computing, Testing and Pilot programs, comprising many leading academic and industrial partners from across Europe to collaborate on the future of quantum technology. 
The goal is to consolidate and expand European scientific leadership and excellence in this research area to make Europe a dynamic and attractive region for innovative research, business and investments in this field. More recently, Quantum Technologies have expanded to other European actions, e.g. within the Digital Europe Program (DEP), the European Innovation Council (EIC), and the forthcoming Chips Act. Quantum technologies are also supported by actions at the national level under the form of various National Quantum Initiatives.

Infobip is a global cloud communications company that helps businesses deliver tailored customer experiences powered by AI. In 2025, Infobip was ranked the #1 Established Leader in the Mobile Messaging Fraud Prevention Market by Juniper Research and recognized as a Leader in Gartner’s Magic Quadrant™ for CPaaS for the third consecutive year. After launching the first CAMARA-compliant Network APIs in Brazil under GSMA’s Open Gateway initiative in 2024, Infobip earned two additional GSMA certifications in 2025. This year also marked the 10 billion RCS business messages delivered on its platform, advancing richer, conversational engagement. By integrating RCS and Open Gateway APIs, Infobip empowers telcos to transform messaging into secure, interactive experiences. With 1,000+ global partners and 9,700+ connections, of which 800+ are direct connections, Infobip’s omnichannel, authentication, and contact center solutions reach 7 billion devices worldwide—driving growth, trust, and loyalty. In 2026, Infobip celebrates its 20th anniversary, and is led by its co-founders, CEO Silvio Kutić and Izabel Jelenić

At Global Data Quantum, we are pioneers in making quantum computing accessible and relevant to today's businesses. We focus on 100% real use cases with the potential to transform industries and generate immediate impact. We work with leading IBEX 35 companies and are members of the international IBM Quantum Network, placing us at the forefront of quantum computing and giving us access to advanced technology and collaboration with IBM to develop disruptive solutions. In addition, we are part of the BIQAIN strategy and the BasQ initiative, which reinforces our commitment to the quantum ecosystem and collaborative innovation at a regional and international level.

Toshiba Europe Ltd is a global leader in the research, development and provision of quantum safe networking solutions. Our commercially deployed systems provide superior performance with better business outcomes, and our quantum technology activities will enable the transition to and scaling of global quantum networks.

MagicLab is a globally leading embodied intelligence technology company dedicated to the R&D and real-world deployment of general-purpose humanoid robots and embodied intelligence technologies. The company has developed a full-stack proprietary hardware and software technology system. Its product portfolio includes full-size humanoid robots, highly dynamic small-sized humanoid robots, consumer-grade quadruped robot dogs, consumer-grade wheeled quadruped robot dogs, and high-payload industrial-grade quadruped robot dogs, serving a wide range of household, industrial, and commercial applications.

Eutelsat is a global leader in satellite communications, delivering connectivity and broadcast services worldwide. Eutelsat was formed through the combination of the Company and OneWeb in 2023, becoming the first fully integrated GEO-LEO satellite operator with a fleet of 34 Geostationary (GEO) satellites and a Low Earth Orbit (LEO) constellation of more than 600 satellites. Eutelsat addresses the needs of customers in four key verticals of Video, where it distributes around 6,400 television channels, and the high-growth connectivity markets of Mobile Connectivity, Fixed Connectivity, and Government Services. Eutelsat's unique suite of in-orbit assets and ground infrastructure enables it to deliver integrated solutions to meet the needs of global customers. The Company is headquartered in Paris and Eutelsat employs more than 1,600 people across more than 75 countries. Eutelsat is committed to delivering safe, resilient, and environmentally sustainable connectivity to help bridge the digital divide.

Aalyria Technologies, Inc.
7633 Southfront Rd. Livermore, CA 94551 
Founded in 2022 to revolutionize global connectivity for advanced networks, Aalyria is born from two innovations developed at Google  as part of its wireless connectivity efforts. Spacetime is Aalyria’s intelligent network orchestration technology and Tightbeam is its advanced atmospheric laser communications technology. Together they enable complex networks at a scale and speed that has never before been possible.

Since 2012, Mobile World Capital Barcelona is an initiative driving the digital advancement of society while helping improve people’s lives globally. 

With the support of the public and private sector, MWCapital focuses on four areas: 
· acceleration of innovation through digital entrepreneurship
· transformation of industries through digital technology
· rise of digital talent among new generations and professionals 
· the reflection on the impact of technology in our society. 

Collectively, our programmes are positively transforming the economy, education and society.

MWCapital hosts MWC in Barcelona and founded 4YFN, the startup business platform, present at MWC events around the world.

Sateliot is the newspace company deploying the first LEO satellite constellation operating under the 5G standard, enabling standard IoT devices and smartphones to connect directly from space. This breakthrough marks the first true convergence of satellite and terrestrial mobile networks, with Sateliot at the forefront. Its scalable, cost-effective model enables massive IoT adoption and D2D wideband in underserved areas, supporting vital civil industries such as agriculture, logistics, environmental monitoring, and infrastructure management, as well as strategic defense and governmental needs, enhancing connectivity for security, emergency response, and critical operations. As a cornerstone of European digital sovereignty, Sateliot delivers global, secure, and affordable connectivity for all.

Open Cosmos is a business focused on solving the world's biggest challenges through the delivery of satellite missions and the data of the world they can gather from space. This includes designing, building, launching and operating small satellites as well as providing data and services through an innovative platform. Since its creation in 2015, it has developed multiple advanced satellites for telecommunications, earth observation, navigation and science. The company is on a high growth path with presence in the UK, Spain, Portugal and Greece.

Hispasat is the spanish satellite operator and the main driver of innovation in the aerospace sector in Spain. It is committed to helping citizens bridge the digital divide and promote sustainable development in society. It is the main communications bridge between Europe and America as a broadband and connectivity services provider through its companies in Spain and Latin America. It is also a leader in the broadcasting and distribution of audiovisual content in Spanish and Portuguese, including the transmission of Direct-to-Home (DTH) and High Definition Television (HDTV) digital platforms. These activities make it one of the world's leading companies by revenue in its sector.

Frameo is the world's leading WiFi photo sharing platform, powering over 300 partner brands globally. Our software solution transforms digital frames into a "Social Photo Frame," connecting families across 35+ countries. With over 18 million app downloads and 1.8 billion moments shared, we offer a proven, ready-to-market solution for the Smart Home sector.

Shenzhen Eview GPS Technology is a trusted OEM & ODM leader with over 16 years of expertise in delivering innovative telecare and personal safety solutions. Our comprehensive product portfolio — including advanced mobile personal emergency response systems (mPERS), SOS smart watches, and in-home safety hubs — is designed to protect and empower vulnerable groups such as seniors, lone workers, and children.

With proven experience and a commitment to quality, we help our partners bring reliable, life-enhancing technologies to communities around the world.

https://www.linkedin.com/company/14524992/admin/dashboard/

A2P SMS, Voice & DIDs – Direct Coverage: Mexico & LATAM

Spark Telecom is a licensed telecom operator in Mexico, delivering high-quality, scalable, and secure messaging and voice solutions across Mexico and LATAM through direct operator connections and strategic partnerships.

Our Portfolio:

A2P SMS – High-performance transactional & promotional messaging with real-time monitoring, fraud control, and multi-protocol connectivity.

Voice – Direct & CLI routes with enhanced QoS, real-time CDRs, SIP connectivity, and scalable solutions.

DIDs – Extensive local number inventory, flexible portability, real-time activation, and secure data management.

Meet us at MWC Barcelona! Let’s explore how Spark Telecom can power your communications with superior quality, efficiency, and reliability.

K-water shall contribute to improving the livelihood of the Korean people, enhancing public welfare by ensuring an abundant supply of clean water, including residential and industrial water, and improving water quality through the comprehensive development and efficient management of water resources (Article 1 of the Korea Resources Corporation Act).
Since 1967, K-water has built Korea's foundation for sustainable growth through advanced water management and infrastructure. Now a global leader, it uses super-gap technologies like Digital Twin and AI-based treatment plants. K-water has completed 120 projects in 41 countries and leads international governance by establishing the Asia Water Council (AWC).

Dongguan Hongfeng Smart Tech Co. Ltd.

PT-SmartWatch is a leading innovator in GPS smartwatch technology, specializing in smart wearable devices designed for elderly care, safety, and health monitoring. We are committed to delivering high-quality, user-friendly wearable devices that empower individuals with great safety and independence, such as GPS Tracker Watches, Personal Alarm Pendants, Telecare Console, etc.

The company has top product design team, R&D team, manufacturing team and customer service team. With professional R&D lab and reliability testing equipment, PT has rich experience in intelligent manufacturing and quality control. Our factory is ISO9001:2015 and BSCI certified.   

Dedicated to strict quality control and thoughtful customer service, our experienced staff members are always available to discuss your requirements and ensure full customer satisfaction.

Nearly 30 years, 3Tech has been providing reliable power solutions to telecommunication industries worldwide. Our professional team delivered thousands of complete solutions from design, installation, commissioning and ongoing maintenance to more than 30 telecom operators, over 40,000 generator sets have been delivered and in operation on site. 3Tech was awarded by both ZTE and Huawei “Global Best Partner” prize, which further recognize our contribution in the telecommunication industry.        
                                              
In addition to telecommunication, our LionRock Digital Energy Solution can also be used in other industries including Infrastructure, Data Centres, mining, transportation, electric power network, Petrochemical and many others. We work closely with consultants and contractors todeliver customized power solutions-backed by localinventory and global support.

Founded in 1990 by a team of senior engineers from Hewlett Packard, INTEGRASYS has developed over 20 products designed to address customer needs in Spectrum Superiority, communications, PNT, and intelligence. As a leading software engineering company, INTEGRASYS specializes in advanced software solutions for satellite networks and space communications, driving network innovations, and RF and optical technologies. While INTEGRASYS also serves commercial markets, it’s oriented towards solving defense threats. The company provides tailored software solutions that ensure critical network infrastructure operates available, resilient, and securely, even in congested and contested environments. Each tool is designed to integrate seamlessly with others, creating a unified, orchestrated system that supports real-time decision-making through intuitive graphical interfaces or M2M. CleanRF, InterGeo, Vectorsat, and EO Master are engineered to help warfighters manage complex scenarios with the support of AI, reducing time-to-resolution and the risk of errors, and enhancing overall mission success.

Cloudnet.ai builds next-generation, cloud-native, AI-native BSS and private network platforms to accelerate digital transformation for service providers and enterprises.

With headquarters in Singapore and teams across North America and Europe, we acquired AsiaInfo’s international business and launched CloudRAN.AI—a subsidiary focused on enterprise private 5G networks.

We deliver scalable, AI-enhanced, secure private 5G and cloud-native BSS solutions designed to reduce deployment complexity, speed up time-to-value, and support modern enterprise and critical operations.

Our portfolio includes:

- Cloud BSS: Veris Cloud BSS provides AI-powered business support tools to streamline operations and decision-making.

- Private 5G Kits: Compact, turnkey private 5G kits for fast, cost-effective indoor and outdoor deployments.

- AI-Driven RAN Planning: Megrez, our in-house generative AI platform, automates RF planning and optimizes RAN design.

- Mission-Critical Communications (MCX): Integrated MCX delivers priority voice/video/data on Private 5G—so critical communications keep working when networks are busy.

Cloudnet.ai is committed to combining AI, cloud, and private networks to help customers build future-ready digital infrastructure.

Druid Software, founded in 2000 and headquartered in Ireland, is an industry-leader in private cellular network technology, and provides an enterprise-grade core network platform to advance connectivity and enable simplified private network management. 
For over 25 years, customers and partners worldwide have chosen the Raemis™ platform to connect applications, devices and radios, benefiting from enhanced security, performance, and cost-efficiency.
Druid’s Raemis™ platform is a mature 3GPP compliant 5G & 4G core network, with unique features designed specifically for business and mission-critical use across all industries. 
For more information, email enquiries@druidsoftware.com or visit www.druidsoftware.com.

Coiler Corporation delivers advanced wireless coverage and private network solutions, spanning repeaters, CPE, small cells, and intelligent NMS platforms. Powered by strong engineering expertise and proven global deployments, Coiler enables operators and enterprises to achieve secure, high-performance connectivity across the most demanding environments.

For over twenty-three years, Able Tech has been the Italian partner of reference for the digitization and optimization of business processes thanks to the power of the ARXivar suite. 

We offer services and products for complete digital transformation: from Document & Workflow Management to Electronic Invoicing, from Compliant Storage to Electronic Signatures and Digital Onboarding.

tim ai is an AI-powered ESG assessment platform transforming how exhibitors approach trade show sustainability. By analysing booth designs and supply chains in minutes, tim identifies where exhibitors can cut costs and reduce their carbon footprint — without compromising on impact.
The result? Real, measurable change. Our beta partner CBRE achieved a 63% reduction in carbon footprint and 22% cost savings.
tim was built by people who know trade shows inside out — not consultants guessing from the outside. We don't reward "doing less bad." We create genuine improvement.
Less cost. Less carbon. Finally.

PortaOne has been developing billing, business support systems, and cloud telephony software for communication service providers for over two decades. We’ve helped over 500 forward-thinking telcos in 100+ countries be market leaders while keeping the total cost of ownership for their business support system under control. We offer an unlimited lifetime license, and our open-architecture platform lets our customers quickly develop new services in-house. We give access to the source code to our customers to ensure security validation and transparency.

Visit www.portaone.com to find out how we can help you succeed.

POMP Technology is a leading OEM & ODM manufacturer specializing in the production, R&D, and sales of mobile phones and mobile intelligent devices. Since 
our founding in 2009, we have been committed to delivering high-quality mobile OEM/ODM solutions with a focus on innovation, cost-efficiency, and reliability.

The Police of the Generalitat- Mossos d’Esquadra is the integral police force in Catalonia with more than 300 years of history. Our mission is to protect the free exercise of rights and liberties and guarantee the public security, ensuring from the proximity, peaceful coexistence and the protection of people and property, in accordance with the legal system.
The Mossos d’Esquadra police is the reference for security and the guarantee of protection and service for people in Catalonia, from proximity and professionalism, offering a quality service.

The Mossos d’Esquadra will guarantee the security of the new MWC-26 edition.

Lleida.net turns digital communications into legally binding proof.
As a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) and global telecom operator, we secure digital interactions across 60+ markets.

From Registered SMS and Registered Email to electronic signatures, digital identity verification, and no-code automation, our solutions protect transactions against fraud, ensure compliance, and deliver trust, integrity, and legal certainty by design.

Book your meeting here: https://lnkd.in/d7itbWm7

ZhenShi Information Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2015 and backed by investments from Xiaomi and Nokia, is a leading technology company in the smartwatch industry. 

Through its renowned brands, Mibro and Xiaoxun, ZhenShi designs and delivers cutting-edge wearables for sports enthusiasts and children. With a dedicated R&D team of over 300 engineers, the company is committed to pushing the boundaries of wearable technology, offering innovative products that enhance performance, safety, and the overall user experience. 

Serving more than 42 million customers across 206 countries and regions worldwide, ZhenShi is poised to drive further global expansion in the wearable tech market.
XPANCEO is a deep tech company that develops an invisible and weightless smart contact lens as the ultimate interface for AI-powered XR computing.

Gsertel is a company specialized in the design and manufacturing of measurement equipment, with extensive experience in engineering and the development of advanced technological solutions. As part of the Televes Corporation, we bring decades of expertise in the broadcast measurement and monitoring sector. Now, we are leveraging this knowledge to focus on delivering innovative tools for the analysis and optimization of mobile networks, such as our new Hexylon Gamma, specifically designed for fieldwork and drivetesting.

Incubated from a Top-Tier Research University (University of Science and Technology of China), Headquartered in Hefei, “China’s Innovation Capital,” GuoChuang (300520.SZ) is Committed to Providing Cutting-Edge Technology and Products for Global Customers, Driving Industry-Wide Digital Transformation Through Industrial AI and Sustainable Innovation.

Applivery is a leading Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) platform designed to help companies of all sizes manage, secure, and automate the operations of their Android, Apple, and Windows devices. With a comprehensive and scalable solution, Applivery enables IT and security teams to take full control of their device fleets, deploy applications efficiently, and ensure compliance with the most demanding security and regulatory policies.

Globe Teleservices Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based telecom conglomerate with a global presence, having offices in the USA, Dubai, Malaysia, Tanzania, Ghana, India, and Hong Kong. GTS provides niche next-gen solutions in A2P monetization, omnichannel messaging, anti-fraud & cloud services. GTS is a member of prestigious forums like MEF, GSMA, GLF, Trust in Enterprise Messaging, TMForum, PITA and ITU-APT. Notable accolades include the Platinum Award from Juniper Research for AI-powered AGT/AIT Fraud Detection solution, recognition in Singapore's Fastest Growing Companies for 2024 and 2025 by The Straits Times and Statista, recognition in Financial Times -High-Growth Companies Asia-Pacific 2024 & 2025 and Tier 1 recognition in A2P SMS Messaging Market Impact Report 2024 in MNO and Enterprise edition by ROCCO.

extensive industrial resources.

In January 2025, AGIBOT made history by mass-producing its 1,000 general-purpose embodied robot, setting a new industry milestone.By December of the same year, AGIBOT shipped over 5,100 humanoid robots, ranking No.1 worldwide in shipment volume.

Veea Inc. (Nasdaq: VEEA) provides AI-informed edge intelligence that unifies connectivity, computing, and cybersecurity within the VeeaONE Platform. Veea delivers turnkey solutions that seamlessly and securely connect small businesses, close the digital divide, and automate critical facilities.

Eagle Wireless is a connectivity company delivering secure, reliable, and scalable cellular modules and solutions for automotive and IoT applications.

With a strong presence in the United States and global R&D teams across North America, Europe, and APAC, Eagle Wireless supports customers worldwide with long-life, compliant, and cyber-secure connectivity products.

Focused on trust, supply chain resilience, and regulatory compliance, Eagle Wireless helps OEMs, Tier 1 suppliers, and IoT innovators deploy connected technologies with confidence in an increasingly complex global environment.

Nanjing Huamai Technology Co. Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is located in Nanjing, China. Over the past 20 years, Huamai has been dedicated in the field of telecommunication physical connection. Huamai has four manufacturing bases, and provides various products and solutions like optic fiber cables, FTTx, IDC, 5G wireless coverage, etc.
HUAMAI adheres to the development orientation of technological innovation. HUAMAI has established R&D center and achieved 600+ patents, mastered many non-patent core technologies. HUAMAI has already obtained certificates like ISO, TLC, SGS, RoHS, UL, IECC, TUV, VDE, etc.
HUAMAI was listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange in 2017, accelerating the pace of globalization. HUAMAI products are exported to more than 50 countries and regions. HUAMAI, together with our friends and partners, will realize the aim to connect the world, connect the future, achieve a wonderful life.

Spendbase is a spend management platform designed to break your SaaS / Cloud spend habits and introduce a radically different way of building cost efficiency. With huge software discounts, cloud credits procurement, and virtual cards, our easy-to-use platform brings you the savings you thought were impossible.

GUANGDONG KANSAI TECHNOLOGY LTD. is a RF Coaxial Cable manufacturer that specializes in independent R&D, production and sales. As a holding company of SHENZHEN KANSAI INDUSTRIAL based in Huizhou, it is a manufacturing factory built in 2022 to meet our development needs.

Our semi-rigid, semi-flexible RG series, KTMR low-loss series, high-precision coaxial cables with phase amplitude stability comply with the requirements of U.S. standards. The cables feature with high working frequency, excellent shielding effectiveness, high reliability, small standing wave ratio and low attenuation. Our products are widely used in mobile data communication network, aerospace, microwave communications, civilian radio, antenna and radar satellite that transmits high-frequency signals. 

We have recently launched a new product series: high-performance PTFE ceramic high-frequency & high-speed CCL. Beyond supplying this advanced ceramic-filled PTFE composite laminates, we provide comprehensive manufacturing solutions tailored to custom requirements. Our capabilities extend to PCB fabrication (single & multi-layer boards) to complete PCBA manufacturing, including SMT assembly and other related processing needs.

Gcore is a global edge AI, cloud, network, and security solutions provider. Headquartered in Luxembourg, with a team of 600 operating from ten offices worldwide, Gcore provides solutions to global leaders in numerous industries. Gcore manages its global IT infrastructure across six continents, with one of the best network performances in Europe, Africa, and LATAM due to the average response time of 30 ms worldwide. Gcore’s network consists of +210 points of presence worldwide in reliable Tier IV and Tier III data centers, with a total network capacity exceeding 200 Tbps.
gcore.com

NXAI is a Singapore-headquartered global technology company driven by AI at its core, dedicated to driving your business forward with 2 series of products: NXCLOUD - one-stop communication solutions (CPaaS), and NXLINK - an AI-powered customer experience (CX) platform (CCaaS) for marketing and customer service.

Airbus pioneers sustainable aerospace for a safe and united world. The Company constantly innovates to provide the most efficient and technologically-advanced solutions in aerospace, defence, and connected services. In commercial aircraft, Airbus offers the most modern and fuel-efficient airliners. Airbus is also a European leader in defence and security and one of the world's leading space businesses. In helicopters, Airbus provides the most efficient civil and military rotorcraft solutions worldwide.

Shenzhen Lingchuang High tech Digital Co., Ltd is a state-evel high-tech Enterprises, dedicated to tablet PC, smartphones and smart calendar R&D.production and sales, business throughout the world.The company's factory islocated in Longhua district, Shenzhen City, near the city center,convenienttransportation.The factory covers an area of 6000 square meters,with a five-storyplant, a total of more than 300 workers.The company's main B2B markets are inEurope, the United States,Southeast Asia and South America,as well as thedomestic education market, as well as independent brands of overseas e-commerce B2C market, With the continuous expansion of production and management, Lingchuang also rely on products, technology, talent, market,service andother strong strength, and continue to expand the size of enterprises,enhancethe comprehensive competitiveness of enterprises.

With over 88 years of rich heritage, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU) has evolved alongside Hong Kong, making pivotal contributions to its social and economic development, as well as to the Nation and the world. PolyU aspires to be an innovative world-class university that pursues excellence in education, research and knowledge transfer. Guided by its motto, “To learn and to apply, for the benefit of mankind”, the University nurtures socially responsible professionals and leaders with a strong sense of national pride and a global perspective, while driving world-leading research and innovation for societal benefits. PolyU’s unwavering commitment to excellence, impact, and innovation has earned it widespread international recognition. The University consistently ranks among the world’s top 100 universities, a testament to its status as a global leader in higher education and cutting-edge research.
