properties.description@en:
Hosin Global Electronics Co., Ltd. is a joint-stock company engaged in Integrated Circuit design for Storage Applications industries. Established on December 18, 2018, it is committed to provide a group of High-Tech professionals for the industry, Now and Future .

The company is Headquartered in Shenzhen, China, R&D Centers are located in Shenzhen, Hefei, Shanghai and other places, and is committed to continuously providing high-quality, innovative storage products and solutions for global users.

Openmind Networks is an independent technology company focused on mobile messaging software services for the telecom industry. Openmind Networks' messaging solutions enable telecom firms to consolidate their core messaging, protect their network and unlock the potential in business messaging and 5G.

Boasting a highly experienced team of engineers, Openmind Networks has consistently led the way in bringing new innovations to the mobile messaging industry for more than two decades.
We are responsible for delivering more than 1.7 billion messages per day with our global customer base which includes the world's largest mobile operators, wholesalers, aggregators, social media providers and software firms.

Future Connections is an award-winning innovative agentic-first provider of comprehensive customer experience, assurance, RAN optimisation and automation solutions. Its portfolio of AI-based composable, multi-technology and multi-domain solutions are customised to address even the most complex use cases, delivering improved efficiency, operational costs reduction and enhanced customer satisfaction to rapidly respond to operators’ needs. 
Future Connections is headquartered in the Netherlands, with offices in Spain, the United Kingdom and Mexico.

Founded in 2020, Guangzhou ChasingLight Technology Co.,Ltd. focuses on research and commercialization of organic photovoltaics materials and devices. We provide efﬁcient and environmental friendly energy solutions for consumer electronics that involves innovations in energy harvesting from ambient light.

mFilterIt is a new-age, data-driven tech company on a mission to create a safe, transparent, and secure digital ecosystem. 

Founded in 2015, mFilterIt began by validating ad traffic to empower advertisers with clean data, curb ad spends wastage and build trust in digital marketing. Over the years with the evolving digital ecosystem and rising threats, this mission expanded beyond media validation to include brand protection and financial protection, enabling businesses to operate safely and with transparency across every digital touchpoint. 

Evolving from media trust to brand and financial trust, mFilterIt now safeguards the entire digital ecosystem — helping advertisers reach real audiences with intelligence that matters, protecting brands from impersonation and misinformation, and partnering with banks and financial institutions to detect mule accounts, eliminate fraudulent leads, and secure digital transactions. 

With its growing global presence across India, MENA, and the USA, mFilterIt continues to deliver intelligence and protection at scale for leading brands and institutions.

Seiko has been advancing the measurement and distribution of precise time in Japan and worldwide for over 130 years, guided by the philosophy “Always one step ahead of the rest.”

Building on more than two decades of experience in the information and network industries, Seiko Solutions delivers highly reliable network infrastructure and advanced time synchronization solutions that support today’s digital, mobile, and cloud-driven environments.

Our Time Server Pro series, including PTP Grandmaster clocks, provides accurate and resilient timing for mobile networks, telecom infrastructure, and broadcast systems, where precise time is critical for performance, reliability, and regulatory compliance.
Trusted by mobile operators and service providers globally, Seiko’s timing solutions play a key role in enabling 5G/next-generation networks, seamless operations, and future-ready synchronization architectures.

Silicon Integrated Co., Ltd is a high-tech startup company focus on high-performance mixed-signal IC design. It was founded in January 2016 in Wuhan and it has R&D centers in Europe, Shenzhen and Shanghai.

XIUS is a telecom core network infrastructure platform specialist serving mobile, broadband and fixed wireless communication service providers with over 200+ deployments across the globe, spanning across 25 years.

Openmind Networks is an independent technology company focused on mobile messaging software services for the telecom industry. Openmind Networks' messaging solutions enable telecom firms to consolidate their core messaging, protect their network and unlock the potential in business messaging and 5G.

Boasting a highly experienced team of engineers, Openmind Networks has consistently led the way in bringing new innovations to the mobile messaging industry for more than two decades.
We are responsible for delivering more than 1.7 billion messages per day with our global customer base which includes the world's largest mobile operators, wholesalers, aggregators, social media providers and software firms.

As a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production and sales of communication antenna, Anderson was founded in 2012. Our products cover 5G, LTE, CDMA, GSM, TD-SCDMA, WCDMA and 2.4Ghz/3.5Ghz/5.8Ghz/ RFID/GPS, including Smallcell antenna, indoor coverage antenna, terminal antenna etc.

KOSPET was founded in 2018 and has grown into a global high-techbrand with over 200 employees.
Headquartered in Shenzhen (home to its brand operation center), the company also operates its research and development center in Wuhan and its design center in Washington, D.C.
Every piece of KOSPET product is crafted through the joint efforts of its global team - the talented American team spearheads product design, while the Chinese team leads R&D, manufacturing, and operation. This unique combination of innovation and enginesering excellence ensures cutting-edge product development and efficient production.
KOSPET has established a strong global presence, with its products available on major e-commerce platforms worldwide and its offline distributors across over 70 countries and regions. The company further reaches its customers across the globe through a networof over 10,000 retail stores and 20 plus exclusive brand agents.

emnify is the leading IoT connectivity partner to the innovators building our connected world. Founded in 2014, emnify developed the industry’s first cloud-native, global connectivity – the SuperNetwork. Our unique approach to IoT connectivity, coupled with our comprehensive connectivity management platform and services, ensures seamless data exchange between devices, cloud environments, and IoT applications. 

Headquartered in Berlin, with offices in the US, Brazil and the Philippines, emnify is the global provider of IoT connectivity for thousands of enterprises worldwide. Our solution connects millions of devices across all industries including fleet management, consumer electronics, logistics, agriculture, environmental monitoring, smart buildings, retail, and beyond. Working with our customers, we connect the physical world with the digital world in a way that has real impact on how we work and live.

QazCode is an IT-product company and part of the VEON Group (Nasdaq), backed by 750+ experts and over 8 years of experience developing tech solutions. 
 
AI platform - including AI agents and bots to improve efficiency across HR, finance, legal, procurement, compliance and other operational teams.
 
BSS services - transformation from assessment and architecture to delivery, migration and post-launch support. 
 
Teletainment platform drops a full entertainment straight into your telco app, boosting it to “super-app” in months, not years. Video, music, podcasts, games, loyalty and telco features together. 
 
Gaming with 50+ casual games, quizzes with flexible monetization, localization and tournaments to boost engagement and revenue. 
 
Join us at MWC for demo and collaboration😉

Alepo is a Native AI Telco company powered by fifthelement.ai, integrating intelligence at the core of how Communication Service Providers operate and grow. In a Native AI model, AI is not an overlay, it is woven into everyday workflows, continuously guiding decisions across customer management, monetization, network operations, and service innovation. With fifthelement.ai, Alepo turns data into real-time, predictive action, enabling smarter pricing, proactive churn prevention, automated revenue protection, and intelligent orchestration. AI becomes the way of working, not a periodic tool, but a constant operational engine. By combining cloud-native architecture with continuous intelligence, Alepo enables CSPs to move faster, operate leaner, and compete with confidence. The result is a truly Native AI Telco, agile, autonomous, and built for what’s next.

Kapa.ai builds AI Assistants that deliver instant and accurate answers to technical questions. Companies like Vodafone, Logitech, Vonage and 200 other leading technical companies trust kapa.ai to turn their knowledge base into a production-ready AI assistant for their documentation, product or community.

Versa, the global leader in SASE, enables organizations to create self-protecting networks that radically simplify and automate their network and security infrastructure. Powered by AI, the VersaONE Universal SASE Platform delivers converged SSE, SD-WAN, and SD-LAN solutions that protect data and defend against cyberthreats while delivering a superior digital experience. Thousands of customers globally, with hundreds of thousands of sites and millions of users, trust Versa with their mission-critical networks and security. Versa is privately held and funded by investors such as Sequoia Capital, Mayfield, and BlackRock. For more information, visit https://www.versa-networks.com and follow Versa on LinkedIn and X (Twitter) @versanetworks.

SPIRIT Slovenia Business Development Agency is a single point of contact for businesses and investors looking for new opportunities. A team of dedicated professionals helps international companies find potential partners, invest, and expand in Slovenia and beyond.

emnify is the leading IoT connectivity partner to the innovators building our connected world. Founded in 2014, emnify developed the industry’s first cloud-native, global connectivity – the SuperNetwork. Our unique approach to IoT connectivity, coupled with our comprehensive connectivity management platform and services, ensures seamless data exchange between devices, cloud environments, and IoT applications. 

Headquartered in Berlin, with offices in the US, Brazil and the Philippines, emnify is the global provider of IoT connectivity for thousands of enterprises worldwide. Our solution connects millions of devices across all industries including fleet management, consumer electronics, logistics, agriculture, environmental monitoring, smart buildings, retail, and beyond. Working with our customers, we connect the physical world with the digital world in a way that has real impact on how we work and live.

To position Hong Kong as a leading I&T hub, the Hong Kong Trade Development Council (HKTDC) and the Hong Kong Science and Technology Parks Corporation (HKSTP) have joined forces to co-organise the Hong Kong Tech Pavilion (Stand 6E44 & Stand 8.1B31). Join us to discover cutting-edge solutions and innovative products that highlight Hong Kong's commitment to technological advancement and global collaboration.
For more information, please visit: https://bit.ly/MWC2026HKTech

The future of radio products

We offer a space where affordability meets precision in the world of telecom infrastructure products. At Zenlynx, we develop advanced high-quality electronic products with a special focus on radio designs.

Our product portfolio includes O-RAN products, such as Macro and Micro, Microwave solutions, filters as well as RF Switch Boxes.

Our team has extensive expertise in 5G NR radio platform software development, particularly in O-RAN C/U/S/M Plane service development, as well as comprehensive knowledge in DFE and AFE driver development. We specialize in key technologies such as DPD, CFR, and DUC/DDC/AGC.

Our team has a proven track record in radio integration and verification, ensuring seamless system operation. Beyond software, our team possesses advanced hardware engineering skills, with significant experience in translating complex technical specifications into high-performance solutions. Our combined expertise in both hardware and software guarantees robust, reliable system performance.

To meet your production needs, Zenlynx offers high-quality manufacturing and aftermarket services.

At the Japan Pavilion, 16 Japanese companies—supported by the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC)—will showcase Japan’s cutting-edge vision for next-generation connectivity and digital innovation.

For MWC26, we will feature groundbreaking technologies that will shape the AI-driven society of the 2030s, including Beyond 5G/6G, All-Photonics Networks (APN), Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), and Open RAN.

We invite you to discover how Japan’s leading corporations, innovative startups, and academic institutions are reimagining the future of global digital infrastructure and intelligent connectivity. Through the international promotion of these technologies, MIC is committed to addressing global challenges and building a smarter, more connected world.

Unnecto goes beyond smartphones by making wireless technology accessible to all in order to empower communities. We have consistently taken the lead in bringing flagship features without the premium price. With an unstoppable drive for innovation, affordability, and quality we continue to connect users all over the world.

NeoSoft AG delivers cutting-edge solutions designed to defend against cellular threats, including SMS blasters, IMSI catchers, and other forms of rogue base stations.
Our technologies enable real-time detection of malicious cell towers, precise localization of threat sources, and active disruption of their operation - helping to safeguard critical infrastructure, government institutions, and even personal communications.

The Ilamatepec project aims to increase Salvadoran exports to the European market by taking advantage of the Association Agreement between the European Union (EU) and Central America.
The Project is financed by the European Union and implemented by the International Trade Center (ITC) of the United Nations. The project supports 40 IT & BPO Salvadoran companies through business advisory and access to new EU.

TELUS Digital is a leading global technology company that crafts enduring customer experiences in the moments that matter. By weaving data and technology with the promise of humanity, we streamline customer interactions, deliver differentiated customer journeys, enhance operational effectiveness, and scale AI solutions with meaningful value and positive impact. Trusted by industry leaders, TELUS Digital combines its global reach—spanning 77,000 team members across 32 countries—with deep expertise to drive transformational technological change for over 650 clients worldwide. Our comprehensive range of services, solutions and platforms span Data & AI Services, Digital Strategy & Consulting, including Web & Mobile Application Development, Customer Experience Management, including CCaaS, and Trust & Safety, including Content Moderation and Fraud Prevention. At the heart of our innovation is Fuel iX™, our proprietary GenAI engine, helping enterprises advance their GenAI programs at speed and scale.

Xplora is a technology company dedicated to helping families stay connected and safe. Founded in Norway in 2016 and now present  in 22 countries with more than 10 million devices sold, we design smart devices, services and communication solutions for all ages combining secure communication with simple features that promote physical activity and digital wellbeing.​​
​​
As the pioneer of the kids’ smartwatch category in Europe, Xplora has expanded its offering to include phones and solutions tailored for youth and senior markets. Our purpose is clear: to build a safer, healthier digital life for all generations. ​
​​
We are a family-first company, acting as a trusted advisor for parents throughout their child’s or parent’s digital journey, delivering the right technology at the right time. We take our responsibility as a tech company seriously, and advocate to safeguard children and support parents as their families onboard to digital life.  We ensure a safer, more balanced digital experience for every generation.

Call.io seamlessly integrates with your existing IMS and SIP Trunking infrastructure, enabling you to provide subscribers with a fully native and personalized AI assistant—without requiring any additional applications.
Through this integration, operators can increase ARPU, strengthen spam protection, and enhance customer loyalty with advanced intelligent assistant capabilities.

Founded in 2007, Ice-Watch silicone, digital and connected watches and jewelry are sold in over 55 countries. With some 500 references, they offer unique designs in a wide range of models and colors, for every style, taste and every desire..

Ice-Watch launches world’s first subscription-free, geolocatable watch compatible with Apple Find My and Android.

OCR Studio provides AI-driven solutions for instant recognition and accurate data extraction from ID documents, including ID cards, passports, driver’s licenses, visas, residence permits and more. 

In addition to ID documents, we also recognize bank cards, barcodes, VIN numbers, utility meters and many other objects.

Our system supports OCR for more than 100 languages and, in total, more than 4000 document templates.

Key principle of our company is security: our products work offline, and no data ever reaches us. The sensitive document processing happens solely on the client's side, which minimizes any risk of data breaches or leaks.
Context-aware adaptive visualizations for critical decision making. Research project funded by the European Innovation Council through the Pathfinder program (grant 101071147).

Silicon Integrated Co., Ltd is a high-tech startup company focus on high-performance mixed-signal IC design. It was founded in January 2016 in Wuhan and it has R&D centers in Europe, Shenzhen and Shanghai.

Whalebone is a cybersecurity company developing user-centric products for telcos, ISPs, and enterprises.

It provides millions of internet users a seamless digital life protection, keeping them safe from malware, phishing schemes, ransomware, and other malicious digital attacks without the need to download anything.
The company has repeatedly proven its potential by enabling T1 telcos to effectively protect their customers, while significantly raising their revenue.

Whalebone has more than 400+ customers in telecommunications and corporate sectors around the globe and 100 team members with representation worldwide.

Whalebone's mission is to bring cybersecurity to 1 billion people.

For more information, go to www.whalebone.io or follow us at @whaleboneio on Twitter and LinkedIn.

The goal of the project „Platform for Future Communication Technologies and 6G (6G Platform)“ is both to make scientific contributions to the content design of 6G and to ensure the scientific-organizational support of the processes that are necessary for the successful implementation of the German-European 6G program. To this end, harmonization with international regulation and standardization will be promoted, and opportunities for participation by society and industry will be created. Accordingly, the platform ensures that user groups that are not actively involved in mobile communications research can also contribute to the identification of 6G leading applications and requirements. The focus is on ensuring efficient harmonization of visions and concepts with the aim of defining a uniform German position. The necessary comprehensive and inclusive consideration of as many stakeholders, projects and key parties as possible is part of the accompanying research activities of the 6G platform.

ProtectionPro by Madico delivers on-demand screen protection for today’s mobile and connected-devices. Trusted by telecom carriers, retailers, and repair networks worldwide, ProtectionPro combines premium films, precision hardware, and cloud software into one scalable platform.

The latest innovation, Nexera ONE, is an all-in-one cut-on-demand system that both cuts and installs phone screen protectors in a small, retail-ready footprint. Powered by a global library of 50,000+ device patterns, ProtectionPro enables fast installs, zero inventory waste, and high-margin service at the point of sale. Never miss a sale again with ProtectionPro's full range of cut-on-demand screen protector systems.

Point One Navigation is the first centimeter-accurate positioning platform designed for today’s most demanding applications. Combining an independently run and monitored RTK corrections network, an API for easy integration into any application, and sensor fusion software tailored for specific use-cases, Point One’s precision location stack makes it easy to quickly integrate precision location into any product. Point One’s founding team have decades of experience in precision navigation and were previous founders of Cornell’s DARPA Urban Challenge.

Stop by our booth to see how we can help you:
- Improve the accuracy and reliability of your location-based products and services.
- Develop new and innovative applications that require precise positioning.
- Reduce your development time and costs.

We look forward to meeting you at Mobile World Congress!

In the mean time, you can check us out at https://pointonenav.com/
Have questions? Reach out to us, https://pointonenav.com/contact-us/

MTN is a global leader in Low Earth Orbit satellite and terrestrial connectivity, keeping millions of people connected worldwide. With 45+ years of expertise, MTN delivers a converged multi-network architecture — LEO, GEO, and 5G/4G/LTE — backed by 24/7 monitoring and a real-time Customer Portal.
Headquartered in Florida with offices across Europe, the Middle East, and South America, MTN enables rapid deployments and white-glove service anywhere. The company has pioneered the delivery of converged connectivity solutions on a global scale by partnering with major wireless carriers and satellite communications providers that integrate 5G/LTE and high-throughput satellite (HTS) networks, as well as cutting-edge Low Earth Orbit (LEO) constellations such as Starlink and OneWeb.
Our solutions incorporate Tier 1 carriers and global satellite infrastructure, supported by an enterprise-grade global technical support organization that enables us to provide SD-WAN, direct VPN, MPLS, SCPC, and other specialized network tunnels while optimizing data traffic routes.

Mlink Technology,founded in Beijing in 2013,Its team consists of industry veterans with over 15 years of experience.

A solution provider for Cellular and Satelite Iot Chipsets.
Connect everything,Connect everywhere,connect all the time.

From the design of the architecture layer to the consideration of the terminal needs,
MLINK Continues to iterate its chipset products to meet the market demands.

Founded in 2014, We are a leading one-stop supplier of Smart Phone Watch for kids and Juniors,with R&D staffof 30, QAstaff of 15, workers of 300,we are now selling our products to over 30countries and regions, serving more than 30 millionfinal users all over the world.
Our products include 4G phone watch for kids, 4G fitness watch for Juniors and adults. With wholly owned factory, yearly output of 5 million pieces,competitive price, and stable quality, We are now providing OEM/ODM services for carriers and big brands globally, such as Viettel, TrueMove H, boAt,Xiaomi, Walmart etc., services covering Ul, packing,hardware, software, firmware and APP, servers.
Communications between family/friends is and will always be top important, so do kid's safety, it's Our aim to achieve both. With our reliable APP and products and global cloud data service, we willbring love and peace to more and more families.

Established in 2002, Meitrack, for nearly 24 years development, has become a global leading supplier of GPS trackers, M2M devices and industry solutions based on GSM technology. Meanwhile, Meitrack possess subsidiary companies in California, Dubai, Kuala Lumpur, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. Aiming at sound and stable development and adhering to the strategy of “going global”, Meitrack extends its business scopes over 170 countries and regions worldwide.

We are the official organisation of the Swedish Pavilion at MWC 2026. Business Sweden, commissioned by the Government and Swedish industry, helps Swedish companies expand globally and supports international companies in investing and growing in Sweden. At the pavilion, you will find some of Sweden’s most innovative companies, leading the way in technology, connectivity and digital transformation.
Peplink Distributor

P3 communications is an AI-native solution house for telecommunications services.

With deep expertise in network modernization, automation, data-driven transformation and resilience, the company helps organizations evolve from traditional infrastructure toward intelligent, value-driven ecosystems. P3 communications supports telecom operators across the full network lifecycle, from strategy and design to optimization, security and operations, bridging technical complexity with real-world outcomes.

In an industry where complexity is rising, P3 communications’ focus remains simple: turn technology into sustainable competitive advantage.

Sarawak Pavilion represents Sarawak, Malaysia’s largest region on the northwestern coast of Borneo. As its flagship international platform, it highlights Sarawak’s ambition and regional leadership in digital innovation, emerging technologies and sustainable development through a unified whole-of-government and whole-of-ecosystem transformation agenda.

Led by the Sarawak Multimedia Authority, the Pavilion reflects Sarawak’s integrated and forward-looking approach, showcasing eight key components, namely Digital Government, Digital Economy, Artificial Intelligence, Semiconductor, Renewable Energy, Smart Cities, Investment, and Research, Development, Innovation and Entrepreneurship.

Participating co-exhibitors include the Ministry of Utility and Telecommunication, Ministry of Public Health, Housing and Local Government, Ministry of International Trade, Industry and Investment, Sarawak Civil Service Digitalisation Unit, Sarawak Information Systems Sdn Bhd, Sarawak Digital Economy Corporation, Sarawak AI Centre, Sarawak Energy Berhad, SMD Semiconductor, i-CATS, Invest Sarawak, Pay&Go, and Global Telecommunication.

Together, they present investment-ready opportunities and scalable solutions across AI, clean energy, semiconductors, and smart infrastructure, welcoming global partnerships in one of ASEAN’s most dynamic and energy-secure regions.

Since its foundation in 2001, LANCK Telecom has grown into a global telecommunications leader, now partnered with over 1,500 providers across 190+ countries. 
With points of presence in key interconnect centers across Europe, North America, Africa, Asia, and LATAM, we specialize in premium-quality voice, global messaging, fraud management, international roaming, and eSIM solutions. 
Leveraging this experience, LANCK Telecom has entered the enterprise market with LANCK—an omnichannel platform offering various communication channels (such as RCS and OTT apps), extensive customization options, and effective, secure services.  
LANCK Telecom’s real-time AI-driven FMS efficiently fights all major types of voice and SMS fraud, protecting its customers’ reputations and revenues.

Hytera Communications Corporation Limited is a leading global provider of professional communications technologies and solutions, founded in 1993. With voice, video and data capabilities, Hytera offers faster, safer, and more versatile connectivity for business and mission critical users, and facilitate them to achieve more in both daily operations and emergency response to make the world more efficient and safer.
Hytera is committed to innovation and provides user-orientated critical communication products. Fully understanding the communication challenges the industrial users are facing in Public Safety, Energy, Transportation, Utilities, Commercial and other industry verticals, Hytera continuously invests in technology development and application innovation, and is committed to promoting open communication standards from narrowband to broadband, including TETRA, DMR, PDT, LTE and 5G.

The National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT) is Japan’s public institution responsible for the research, development, and comprehensive promotion of the ICT sector. Specialising in advancing from fundamental research to cutting-edge technological applications, the organisation contributes to economic growth and the creation of a more prosperous, secure, and connected society.
Guided by the philosophy, “Beyond human intelligence, co-create new standards for future society,” NICT works to expand the potential of ICT, tackling new challenges and collaborating with scientific, industrial, and social communities worldwide to build the society of the future.
With a diverse team of researchers and experts leading pioneering projects—from quantum communications and advanced networks to cybersecurity and post-5G future technologies. NICT opens new doors to create solutions that drive social well-being and technological development.

properties.name@en: ADA DATA AI SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD

properties.description@en: NPAW is the global leader in holistic, end-to-end video intelligence and delivery solutions for streaming services. The company has over a decade of experience developing groundbreaking, scalable analytics solutions. With NPAW, video service providers can optimize quality of service, quality of experience and user engagement to build media experiences that maximize revenue. The company serves more than 200 video-based services and processes over 124 billion plays per year worldwide. Established in 2008 by co-founders of video streaming service Rakuten TV, NPAW has offices in Barcelona and Madrid with teams throughout the world.

Tiami Networks develops Integrated Sensing and Communications (ISAC) solutions that transform wireless networks into intelligent sensing platforms. Its flagship PolyEdge Multifunction Sensor uses AI and machine learning to interpret ambient 4G, 5G, and Wi-Fi signals, enabling camera-free sensing for applications such as drone detection, occupancy analytics, smart mobility, and public safety.

Building on this foundation, Tiami is advancing ISAC at the network level through PolyRAN, enabling radio access networks to deliver cooperative sensing capabilities that support next-generation AI-native and 6G strategies.

Tiami works with telecom operators, technology partners, and government organizations to deploy scalable solutions that enhance situational awareness while leveraging existing infrastructure. By combining sensing and communications into a unified platform, Tiami helps organizations unlock new value from wireless networks while supporting privacy-preserving, real-world applications.

At MWC Barcelona, Tiami Networks is showcasing practical, deployable ISAC solutions that demonstrate how networks can evolve from connectivity platforms into intelligent sensing systems.

The SD Association is a global ecosystem of nearly 800 technology companies charged with setting interoperable standards for SD memory cards and devices. The Association encourages the development of consumer electronic, wireless communication, digital imaging, networking and industrial application products that utilize market-leading SD technology. SD is the first choice for consumers with it reliable interoperability and easy-to-use format. Today, smart phones, tablets, drones, IoT devices, televisions, audio players, automotive systems, computers, digital cameras and digital video cameras feature SD interoperability. For more information, or to join, please visit www.sdcard.org

Huazhen Information Technology has been focusing on the R&D, design and production of wireless RRU products、including DMR ,LTE,5G RRU  Products。We can customize the frquency and the output power according to customer requirements, we can produce Macro, Micro and PICO RRUs to meet different scenarios.The products have been widely used in China mobile, China telecom and China Unicom based on ORAN  structure.

ThinkQuantum is a leading company in the quantum communication landscape, offering complete solutions for cybersecurity and communication systems to both private corporations and government bodies woldwide. ThinkQuantum covers the full value chain, from designing and manufacturing to commissioning, of QKD and QRNG systems for terrestrial and space applications.

LATRO is a global leader in AI-driven Fraud Prevention, Revenue Protection and Application Managed Services for Telecom and Fintech. Through our Defend (Fraud), Assure (RA/Fintech), and TAMS (Telecom Application Managed Services) solutions, we empower operators and regulators to stop losses and optimize business performance. 

We empower businesses worldwide to safeguard their income and enhance operational efficiency through data-driven insights and cutting-edge technology. Our solutions leverage advanced techniques, including passive and active network signalling probes and machine learning, to provide unparalleled analytical depth. 

LATRO's diverse customer base includes: 

Telecom Operators: Mobile, Fixed Line, and Carriers 
National Regulators and Authorities 
Fintech Providers: Mobile Money, eWallets, and Digital Payment Platforms 
Law Enforcement and Legal Professionals

We are committed to innovation and customer success, helping businesses achieve their financial goals and contribute to global economic growth.

Bind makes communications work harder for your business — saving time, uncovering hidden value, and solving what others can’t see. Go beyond traditional customer messaging — use SMS, RCS, Voice, WhatsApp, Viber and Number Intelligence data to find and close blind spots, automate recurring communications to improve efficiency and drive measurable growth. Our in-house research teams uncover new use cases solved through customized, fit-for-purpose communications that impact your bottom line and make sense for customers.

The National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT) is Japan’s public institution responsible for the research, development, and comprehensive promotion of the ICT sector. Specialising in advancing from fundamental research to cutting-edge technological applications, the organisation contributes to economic growth and the creation of a more prosperous, secure, and connected society.
Guided by the philosophy, “Beyond human intelligence, co-create new standards for future society,” NICT works to expand the potential of ICT, tackling new challenges and collaborating with scientific, industrial, and social communities worldwide to build the society of the future.
With a diverse team of researchers and experts leading pioneering projects—from quantum communications and advanced networks to cybersecurity and post-5G future technologies. NICT opens new doors to create solutions that drive social well-being and technological development.

The National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT) is Japan’s public institution responsible for the research, development, and comprehensive promotion of the ICT sector. Specialising in advancing from fundamental research to cutting-edge technological applications, the organisation contributes to economic growth and the creation of a more prosperous, secure, and connected society.
Guided by the philosophy, “Beyond human intelligence, co-create new standards for future society,” NICT works to expand the potential of ICT, tackling new challenges and collaborating with scientific, industrial, and social communities worldwide to build the society of the future.
With a diverse team of researchers and experts leading pioneering projects—from quantum communications and advanced networks to cybersecurity and post-5G future technologies. NICT opens new doors to create solutions that drive social well-being and technological development.

Founded in 2016, GTC has grown from a niche advisory service into a globally recognized consultancy that bridges the gap between complex technology and real-world business growth.

Our team operates at the intersection of Business Messaging, Mobile Identity, and Machine Learning. We work alongside operators, service providers, and enterprises to turn technical challenges into revenue opportunities.

What We Do (The Three GTC Pillars)

- Consult: GTC provides the strategy and market intelligence needed to launch and scale products like A2P SMS, RCS, and Digital ID.

- Enable: GTC bridges the talent gap by offering specialized recruitment and training to ensure our partners have the right people in the right places.

- Outsource: GTC takes the operational weight off your shoulders by managing technical platforms, firewalls, and fraud detection services.

In short, Consult, Enable, and Outsource for Messaging and Mobile Identity.

The goal of the project „Platform for Future Communication Technologies and 6G (6G Platform)“ is both to make scientific contributions to the content design of 6G and to ensure the scientific-organizational support of the processes that are necessary for the successful implementation of the German-European 6G program. To this end, harmonization with international regulation and standardization will be promoted, and opportunities for participation by society and industry will be created. Accordingly, the platform ensures that user groups that are not actively involved in mobile communications research can also contribute to the identification of 6G leading applications and requirements. The focus is on ensuring efficient harmonization of visions and concepts with the aim of defining a uniform German position. The necessary comprehensive and inclusive consideration of as many stakeholders, projects and key parties as possible is part of the accompanying research activities of the 6G platform.

Tupl is the AI hyperautomation company that simplifies and automates complex operations at scale. Powered by TuplOS, our AI‑native enterprise automation platform, we bring domain experts and AI agents together in a unified, governed ecosystem to co‑create intelligent automation. This enables organizations to streamline workflows, optimize performance, and accelerate digital transformation.

Our pragmatic approach, start small, pilot with immediate ROI adapting to the reality of each use case, and scale safely and with confidence ensures that hyperautomation is both impactful and sustainable.

Since 2014, we’ve blended startup agility with global tech expertise to transform operations across telecom, manufacturing, agriculture, and beyond.

Operations made simple with AI.

NinjaOne unifies IT to simplify work for 35,000+ customers in 140+ countries. The NinjaOne Unified IT Operations Platform delivers endpoint management, autonomous patching, backup, and remote access in a single console to improve efficiency, increase resilience, and reduce spend. By automating IT and managing all endpoints, organizations give employees a great technology experience to
work faster, smarter, and easier while IT teams modernize and improve
efficiency.NinjaOne is a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Management Tools. The company is obsessed with customer success and has retained a 98% customer satisfaction score for more than 5 years.

Grupo Oesía is a Spanish multinational dedicated to engineering digital and industrial dual use, which develops and implements projects in more than 42 countries. It has 4,000 professionals in 20 corporate headquarters spread across Europe, Latin America and Asia.
Throughout 50 years of experience, it has innovated products and services that benefit billions of people around the world, with the purpose of creating a better, more efficient, safe and sustainable world.
In its commitment to hyperspecialization, it has 5 brands, each an expert in its area: Oesía Networks, (digital transformation); Tecnobit-Grupo Oesía, (cutting-edge technological products and solutions in intelligent vision, simulation and tactical and secure communications); Cipherbit-Grupo Oesía, (cybersecurity and secure communications products (cifra)); UAV Navigation-Grupo Oesía, (guidance, navigation and control systems for unmanned aerial vehicles); and Inster-Grupo Oesía, (technology for terrestrial, naval, air and space satellite communications).

CNLABS is a global, vendor-neutral, ISO/IEC 17025-accredited independent testing laboratory specializing in Advanced Networking, Cybersecurity, and AI. With operations in India, the USA, and Australia, CNLABS partners with over 200 OEMs, government agencies, and standards bodies to enable secure and interoperable connected technologies. We provide comprehensive validation, regulatory compliance, and third-party certification services to ensure products are market-ready for the global stage.

OneSource (https://onesource.pt) is an SME specialized in the fields of data communications, security, networking, and systems management – including the consultancy, auditing, design, development, and lifetime administration of specialized IT solutions for corporate networks, public-sector institutions, utilities and telecommunications operators.
OneSource has been involved in the research and development of telecommunications products and services since its inception, with a strong focus on Public Safety applications and on the provisioning of cloud-based and service-based telecommunications services.

We are one of the fastest-growing family-tech brands in Southern Europe, designing smartwatches and connected devices for kids and seniors. With 500,000+ units sold and a strong DTC channel, we deliver trusted, accessible technology that keeps families safe, connected and independent.

Our strength lies in purpose-built devices that combine safety, autonomy and family connection, backed by a growing ecosystem of services designed for real life.
Our core proposal includes: 
• Smartwatches for kids with advanced safety features: GPS, geofencing, SOS, call control and parental management
• A smartphone-free alternative that gives children independence and parents peace of mind
• Devices and services designed for seniors, focused on autonomy and emergency response
• Cross-generational connectivity powered by the SaveFamily app
• Proven omnichannel growth with strong local teams in Spain, Portugal, Italy and France

properties.name@en: Azercosmos, Space Agency of the Repu...
properties.description@en: Azercosmos is the Space Agency of the Republic of Azerbaijan, established in 2010 under a national space development program. It launched Azerspace-1 (2013), Azersky (2014), and Azerspace-2 (2018) satellites, strengthening telecommunications and Earth observation capabilities. In 2023, Azerbaijan adopted the Law “On Space Activities” and secured a geostationary orbital position at 46° East. Azercosmos is developing Azerspace-3 to replace Azerspace-1 and advancing the Azersky-2 Earth observation program. Celebrating 10 years in Africa in 2025, it now reaches 39 countries, covers 70% of the continent, and connects over 100 million households with broadcasting services. Azercosmos provides services such as Telecommunication, Earth Observation, GIS, Training and Consultancy and IoT.

ABRINT is Brazil’s main trade association for Internet Service Providers (ISPs). Formed in 2008, as a nonprofit association, ABRINT has been at the forefront of market efforts to shape telecommunications regulatory environment, promoting competition and establishing the development of the Internet industry in Brazil. 

Currently, ABRINT represent over 2.000 ISPs that lead Brazilian broadband market share, ensuring universal and meaningful connectivity in all 27 Brazilian states.

Bondio is powering the eSIM revolution by providing the most reliable eSIM connectivity, easier than ever before.

Bondio is the connectivity platform built for the eSIM era. By partnering with the world’s leading operators, we provide access to both local & roaming connectivity globally, including 5G/4G, voice and IoT. We give our customers access to stronger network connections, at lower costs, with a leading user experience. Bondio is backed by Deutsche Telekom and several other leading operators and telecom investors. Bondio connectivity is instant and frictionless. 

Whether you are an eSIM travel app looking for more reliable partners and better prices, an MVNO seeking better roaming agreements, or a business needing access to connectivity globally, Bondio is the partner for you! Come and see us in Hall 6 at booth 6G55 to learn more!

MagicLab is a globally leading embodied intelligence technology company dedicated to the R&D and real-world deployment of general-purpose humanoid robots and embodied intelligence technologies. The company has developed a full-stack proprietary hardware and software technology system. Its product portfolio includes full-size humanoid robots, highly dynamic small-sized humanoid robots, consumer-grade quadruped robot dogs, consumer-grade wheeled quadruped robot dogs, and high-payload industrial-grade quadruped robot dogs, serving a wide range of household, industrial, and commercial applications.

FIOR provides a zero-trust AI governance and authentication layer purpose-built for 5G and emerging 6G ecosystems. Designed as an overlay to existing 3GPP security, FIOR enables cryptographically unforgeable, device-bound identities for AI agents, edge workloads and connected machines, with millisecond offline authentication and post-quantum readiness.

For hardware and software vendors, FIOR integrates as a scalable AI trust layer within network infrastructure. For telcos, FIOR.AI.GATEWAY enables a new enterprise revenue opportunity by delivering AI authentication and governance as a managed service. AI providers and enterprises gain hardware-rooted identity that prevents rogue agents and unmanaged AI activity.

Visit us at Hall 6, Stand G84.

Apkudo is a device passport platform that eliminates guesswork and maximizes value in the connected device ecosystem. By capturing and unifying data across fragmented programs and transactions, Apkudo creates a trusted Device Passport™ for every asset. This single source of truth gives businesses the clarity to operate with confidence, recover more value, and deliver consistent outcomes at scale. With Apkudo, organizations reduce risk, build trust, and unlock the full financial and circular potential of every device.

Toshiba Europe Ltd is a global leader in the research, development and provision of quantum safe networking solutions. Our commercially deployed systems provide superior performance with better business outcomes, and our quantum technology activities will enable the transition to and scaling of global quantum networks.

Dr.look AI specializes in AI-powered learning cameras for kids aged 3+. Our flagship device lets children snap any object to access encyclopedias, Chinese classics, English lessons, and custom stories instantly. Backed by a multi-modal AI model, it achieves 99.9% accuracy in recognizing 3M+ species across 4,800 categories. Featuring AI cartoon companions, age-appropriate content (3-6y & 6+y), creative effects, and parent apps for progress tracking, it turns the world into an interactive classroom. Winner of the 2025 Red Dot Design Award, we blend fun with safe, immersive learning to ignite kids’ curiosity.

SureCall is a leading U.S.-based provider of cellular signal amplification solutions, with over 20 years of industry experience and a strong reputation in the North American market. Recognized as one of the top signal booster brands in the United States, SureCall is known for reliable performance, robust engineering, and user-focused design.

At MWC 2026, SureCall will present SIGNAL 5.0, a high-performance 4G/LTE/5G vehicle signal booster engineered to meet European mobile network standards. It delivers stable connectivity for cars, trucks, SUVs, and motorhomes, even in remote or low-signal areas across Europe.

Designed in the USA and compliant with global and EU regulations, SureCall solutions support easy DIY installation and immediate signal improvement. Promata (Sinotek Co., Ltd.) represents SureCall at Booth 6H16—we welcome you to explore reliable vehicle connectivity solutions for the European market.

Capacity is the leading source of news, insight and networking for the global connectivity and digital infrastructure communities. Through a portfolio of international and regional events, industry awards, Capacity Magazine, daily digital news coverage, Capacity TV and executive podcasts, Capacity provides independent reporting and analysis on the developments shaping the future of the industry.
Capacity’s events include ITW, the Capacity Series, Metro Connect and the Global Connectivity Awards. 

Visit the Capacity stand to meet the team, book a Capacity TV interview, share your news, or learn more about our platforms and events.

Nscale is the engine of superintelligence – building the physical and digital infrastructure required to run the most demanding AI systems in the world.

We design, own, and operate the full AI stack, from the data center components, chips, and other critical hardware to the full set of software systems managing data processing, security, etc — meaning advanced AI can run faster, more efficiently, and with fewer dependencies.

As AI systems grow more powerful, infrastructure becomes the constraint. Nscale removes that constraint by giving customers direct control over the compute, energy, and systems their AI depends on today and as requirements evolve.

Ori builds the software foundation for distributed AI infrastructure. Its control plane unifies compute, storage, and networking across clouds and geographies—delivering bare-metal performance, intelligent scheduling, and operational autonomy. Trusted by scale-ups, enterprises, telcos, and sovereigns, Ori is proven across its own AI cloud and the AI clouds it builds with its telco and sovereign partners.
THE 4th BIGGEST MOBILE OPERATOR IN BRAZIL AND THE LARGEST UNDER NATIONAL CONTROL

SHENZHEN ULTRA EASY TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD was established in March 2012, with its headquarters situated in Building A of the Huizhi Research and Development Center, Bao'an District, Shenzhen. It maintains a robust R&D team comprising approximately 300 personnel and holds certification as a National High-Tech Enterprise. Additionally, the company serves as a Vice-Chairman Unit of the Smart Wearable Industry Association and is recognized as one of the early leading providers of premium wearable solutions in the sector.

Specializing in the research and development, production, and sales of smart wearable products centered on core Bluetooth technologies, the company has dedicated extensive efforts over the years to this domain. It offers comprehensive end-to-end solutions for a full spectrum of wearable products, supported by proprietary core algorithms, patented technologies, dedicated mobile applications, and backend service systems.

As an innovation and technology leader, we combine the real and the digital worlds to help our customers accelerate transformation and meet the greatest productivity and sustainability challenges of our time. We help industrial companies to transform the everyday for billions of people.

Altman Solon is the world’s largest strategy consulting firm exclusively focused on telecommunications, media, and technology (TMT). Our advisory work spans strategy, operations, and investment support, grounded in deep sector expertise and strong technical understanding. With teams operating from 18 offices across the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, and APAC, we combine global perspective with local market insight to support growth and investment decisions across the TMT ecosystem.
Main business scope: coaxial and network communication cables, optical fiber cables, industrial wires, robot cables, high molecular materials, etc.

Corning is one of the world’s leading innovators in materials science, with a 175-year track record of life-changing inventions. Corning applies its unparalleled expertise in glass science, ceramic science, and optical physics, along with its deep manufacturing and engineering capabilities to develop category-defining products that transform industries and enhance people’s lives.

With over five decades of engineering excellence, we've consistently led the charge in delivering mission-critical network solutions that empower industries to innovate and thrive.

Our groundbreaking SyncMetra® platform exemplifies our commitment to innovation. This software-defined, IT-operated 5G transport solution integrates Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) to provide ultra-reliable, low-latency communications essential for industrial automation, enterprise AI, and AR/VR applications. By simplifying the deployment and management of private 5G networks, SyncMetra® enables organizations to harness the power of next-generation technologies with unprecedented ease and efficiency.

Trusted by leading service providers, industrial enterprises, utilities, military branches, and government agencies, Canoga Perkins combines a rich legacy with a relentless drive for innovation. We lead with AI whenever possible, designing intelligent solutions that are not only reliable and secure but also scalable and adaptable, ensuring our clients are always at the forefront of technological advancement.

At Canoga Perkins, we're not just building networks—we're building the infrastructure that powers the future.

At ams OSRAM, we pioneer differentiating light and sensor solutions. Looking back on more than 110 years of industry experience, we combine engineering excellence and global manufacturing capabilities with passion for cutting-edge innovation. Our commitment to pushing the boundaries of illumination, visualization, and sensing has earned us the trust of customers worldwide. Together, we create break-through applications that make our world safer, smarter, and more sustainable. 

“Sense the power of light” – our success is based on our deep understanding of the potential of light. We harness its full spectrum – visible and invisible – to illuminate our surroundings as well as gather information from them. By adding intelligence to light, we enable our customers to drive transformative applications. 

Our distinct portfolio of advanced light and sensor technologies sets us apart in our industry. It includes high-quality semiconductor-based light emitters, sensors, CMOS ICs and software as well as a range of traditional lighting technologies for automotive and special applications.

Combined with our deep talent communities across digital and AI product engineering, digital assurance, data engineering, cloud, and enterprise applications, AIFICIENT delivers meaningful impact at scale.

IDEMIA Secure Transactions, a division of IDEMIA Group, draws upon decades of industry leadership and cryptography expertise to make it safer and easier to pay and connect. Its mission: to build advanced payment technologies and connectivity services that secure billions of essential transactions every day.

As a leading provider of Connectivity Services, IDEMIA Secure Transactions provides mobile operators, the automotive industry, and the IoT ecosystem with essential services that enable seamless and secure connectivity. It works with over 500 mobile operators and some of the top auto manufacturers to support mobile connectivity through SIM cards and eSIM services. All of its eSIM solutions are cloud native and GSMA certified.

Wireless Logic is a global leader in IoT connectivity, connecting over 18 million devices across 165 countries. With direct partnerships with 50+ leading mobile and satellite operators, they deliver seamless and secure IoT solutions worldwide.
Their platform, Conexa, is a dedicated IoT network enabling customers to connect and manage assets across any network, simplifying operations, accelerating time to market, and reducing costs. Wireless Logic serves diverse industries—from agriculture and healthcare to transport and smart cities—providing reliable, flexible, and secure connectivity tailored to each customer’s needs.
Backed by Montagu, a leading mid-market private equity firm, and General Atlantic, a leading global investor, Wireless Logic benefits from unrivalled financial strength and continued investment in growth and innovation.

At NETGEAR, our mission is to unleash the full potential of connectivity with intelligent solutions that delight and protect.

As a global company with nearly 30 years of innovation, NETGEAR transforms how people, enterprise, and communities connect. Through thoughtful design and advanced technology, we’re helping to shape a more connected, secure, and inspired digital future.

We do this by delivering intelligent, award-winning networking solutions that combine performance, reliability, and connectivity with advanced built-in security—empowering enterprise, consumers, and people on the go to connect with confidence. properties.name@en: China Council for the Promotion of I...
properties.description@en:
China Council for the Promotion of International Trade Electronics & Information Industry Sub-Council(CCPIT-ECC)is directly affiliated to the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology of China . Through three distinctive platforms, namely international cooperation, policy research and exhibition & events, we are dedicated to forming as high-level platform for international cooperation in the industry and ICT sectors, growing as a world-class international research think tank, developing as a facilitator in business and trade, to serve China’s major-country diplomacy with Chinese characteristics as well as the strategies on developing a strong manufacturing and internet power. 
Guided by MIIT, we develop multilateral and bilateral international cooperation implementation platforms, carry out policy exchanges, industrial cooperation, project cooperation, talent training, and park construction with relevant international organizations, overseas institutions, local governments, and Chinese & foreign enterprises.

Gilat Satellite Networks is a leading global provider of satellite-based broadband communications.

For over 35 years, we have created and delivered deep technology solutions for satellite, ground and new space connectivity, providing comprehensive end-to-end solutions and services. We believe in the right of all people to be connected and are united in our resolution to provide communication solutions to all reaches of the world.

With our wholly owned subsidiaries Gilat Wavestream, Gilat DataPath, and Gilat Stellar Blu, we offer integrated, high-value solutions supporting multi-orbit constellations, VHTS and Software-Defined Satellites via our Commercial and Defense Divisions. Our portfolio includes a cloud-based platform and modems, high-performance satellite terminals, advanced Satellite On-the-Move (SOTM) antennas and ESAs, highly efficient, high-power SSPAs and BUCs and integrated ground systems, field services, network management software, and cybersecurity services.

Gilat’s products and tailored solutions support multiple applications including government and defense, IFC and mobility, digital inclusion, cellular backhaul, enterprise, aerospace and critical infrastructure clients. For more information: www.gilat.com

TECNO is an innovative, AI-driven technology brand with a presence in over 70 markets across five continents. Committed to transforming the digital experience in global emerging markets, TECNO relentlessly pursues the perfect integration of contemporary aesthetic design with the latest technologies and artificial intelligence. Today, TECNO offers a comprehensive ecosystem of AI-powered products, including smartphones, smart wearables, laptops, tablets, smart gaming devices, the HiOS operating system, and smart home products. Guided by its brand essence of “Stop At Nothing,” TECNO continues to pioneer the adoption of cutting-edge technologies and AI-driven experiences for forward-looking individuals, inspiring them to never stop pursuing their best selves and brightest futures. For more information, please visit TECNO’s official site: www.tecno-mobile.com.

At Tele2 IoT connectivity is at the heart of everything we do – but it’s not everything we do. What we do is orchestrate a smarter world – and we do that by focusing on what we do best: efficiently delivering connectivity and IoT enabling services – while creating the carefully selected partner ecosystem that will give you greater efficiency and more control over your business, whether you’re operating in five cities or five continents. 

Tele2 IoT has been recognized by Gartner for managed M2M services worldwide, and while we think globally we’re also agile enough to act locally – allowing you think big, start small, and scale up when you’re ready.

Hengtong Optic-Electric Co.,Ltd is an international enterprise with a diverse range of expertise covering optical fibre, power, marine and offshore cable, EPC turnkey service and maintenance, as well as IoT, big data and e-commerce, emerging materials and new energy.
Hengtong is the largest optical fibre and power cable manufacturer in China. Ranking among the top 3 optical fibre communication enterprises in the world, it accounts for approximately 25% of the domestic market share and 15% of the international market share. 
Hengtong has 70 wholly-owned companies and holding companies (4 of which are listed on the Shanghai, Hong Kong and Indonesian stock exchanges), with 12 manufacturing facilities and 9 sales companies based in Europe, South America, Africa, South Asia and Southeast Asia. It operates sales offices in over 40 countries and regions around the world, supplying products to over 150 countries and regions.

The Korea Trade-Investment Promotion Agency (KOTRA) is Korea’s national trade and investment promotion organization established in 1962, to contribute to the development of the national economy by performing work such as trade promotion, investment between domestic and foreign companies and support of industrial technology cooperation etc. For foreign countries and enterprises, KOTRA has facilitated cooperation with Korea for trade, investment, technology and even human resources by utilizing our global network of 129 offices in 84 countries.

Export Support for SMEs is main and fundamental roles of KOTRA. We provides one-on-one support to help foreign buyers meet Korean companies possessing outstanding products and services and facilitate business transactions by setting up meetings between them. 

Also, KOTRA provides the opportunity for foreign companies to meet with outstanding Korean companies by inviting them to the Korea Pavilion at international exhibitions or even to major exhibitions in Korea.

For more information about the exhibitors, please visit the link below:
https://buykorea.org/tradeshow/2025mwcbarcelona

Cubic³ provides advanced connectivity solutions for software-defined vehicles (SDVs) across 200+ countries and territories. We help automotive, agriculture and transportation OEMs navigate the complexities of connecting vehicles while ensuring compliance with global regulations. With access to over 550 mobile networks, our smart connectivity empowers OEMs to innovate, scale and unlock new opportunities, driving efficiency and growth.

Welcome to the Gyeongsangbuk-do Pavilion at MWC, where you can meet your future business partners.
Gyeongsangbuk-do is a province in the Republic of Korea with a strong base of innovative small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). At MWC 2026, exhibitors from Gyeongsangbuk-do will present a wide range of advanced technologies and IT services. We invite you to visit the pavilion, experience the solutions firsthand, and build meaningful partnerships with high-potential companies.
Participating Companies at the Gyeongsangbuk-do Pavilion (MWC 2026): 
Ninano Company Inc.; N Future; TAKENSOFT; Impactive AI; INPLAB; ELCOSIS; ONESOFTDIGM Co., Ltd.; DEEP.FINE; Hubizict; Vspace

The best of UK tech innovation will be showcased at the GREAT Britain and Northern Ireland Pavilion at MWC Barcelona 2026. Innovative and imaginative tech startups and scaleups will present cutting-edge solutions across telecoms and mobile, helping to build a new era of connectivity.

The UK Pavilion will house a strong coalition of organisations, including Federated Telecoms Hubs, UK Space Agency, and Project JOINER. Together, they will highlight the strength of UK telecoms innovation, driving growth and attracting investment from across the UK and beyond.

The UK Pavilion is organised by Tradefair and sponsored by techUK, the trade association for the UK technology industry. techUK’s members represent over 80% of the UK tech market, spanning blue-chip multinationals and early-stage technology companies.
Learn more at www.techuk.org.

ST Engineering iDirect is a global leader in satellite communications providing technology and solutions that enable its customers to expand their business, differentiate their services and optimize their satcom networks. With over 40 years of delivering innovation focused on solving satellite’s most critical economic and technology challenges we are committed to shaping the future of how the world connects. At MW2026, Forsk showcases the latest features of Atoll and Atoll One, a dedicated package for private networks. Forsk also demonstrates Naos use-cases including AI-accelerated predictions and optimisation use-cases.

Software Radio Systems Limited (SRS), headquartered in Ireland, is a leading innovator in open, high-performance wireless communications software. SRS develops advanced 4G/5G and next-generation RAN solutions used worldwide across commercial, research, and government sectors.

Nextivity®. makes the world’s most intelligent, powerful, and easy-to-use cellular and private 5G coverage solutions. IntelliBoost uses digital signal processing to enhance performance in real time for unbeatable in-building cellular coverage for any commercial building at the lowest cost/m2. 

Nextivity WAVE Edge Services deliver the market’s only DAS-based IoT sensor network infrastructure – allowing our customers to leverage their cellular coverage solution to transform their business. The Nextivity QUATRA® 100M 5G cellular coverage solution features ultra-fast speeds and low latency, extending the reach of 5G and supporting private 5G networks. CEL-FI solutions are unconditionally network-safe and used by over 200 mobile network operators around the world. Nextivity is headquartered in San Diego, CA, USA with offices in the UK and Australia.

Squire Technologies’ core signalling solutions underpin some of the world’s leading CSP networks. Their many customers include telco giants Vodafone, AT&T, and Telefonica, and premier MVNOs Lebara, Cubic3, Ventocom, Telna, and Kore Wireless.

Their cutting-edge core network signalling solutions reduce operational costs, enhance flexibility, and enable fast-to-market services for over 400 global CSPs. They ensure the highest quality project delivery, suited to customers’ unique needs.

Squire Technologies’ unified signalling platform, Sigla, converges routing, interworking, and mediation across multi-generation network configurations. Its versatility includes single-integration-point functionality for OSS/BSS systems while providing security and monitoring functionality. 

Their advanced Mirus platform offers comprehensive messaging and campaign management, while the Vozi platform provides complete voice management.

Additionally, as API monetisation creates new revenue opportunities, operators with Network Exposure Functions, such as Squire Technologies’ Open Gateway, can employ standardised APIs to leverage existing network capabilities and rapidly deploy new services.

Contact Squire Technologies to learn how the UK-based telecom signalling specialists can enhance your network.

TXO is a global leader in transforming technology for a more sustainable future. We enable organisations worldwide to optimise and transform technology across its entire lifecycle, accelerating sustainability, unlocking value, and delivering measurable environmental impact.

Founded in 2005 as Transmission Only, TXO has evolved from enabling networks to stay connected into a global circular economy partner supporting sustainable technology transformation.

Our service offering combines product solutions with engineering expertise across field engineering, network services, spare parts management services (SPMS), test and repair, infrastructure rationalisation, asset recovery and urban mining, supported by complementary capabilities.

We integrate every stage of the technology lifecycle into a single circular, fully managed approach that helps organisations improve performance, extend asset life and achieve measurable environmental and operational outcomes.

Supporting customers in more than 140 countries, sustainability is the foundation of everything we do. Backed by TowerBrook Capital Partners’ impact strategy, TXO continues to expand globally while remaining committed to its circular economy principles.

PQShield is a cybersecurity company specializing in post-quantum cryptography. We’re aiming to empower organizations with the ultimate quantum-resistant solutions, updating the world’s technology supply chain, and staying one step ahead of the attackers.

Actiontec is a global leader in broadband connectivity solutions, providing advanced home and business gateways and access points, as well as managed Wi-Fi cloud software that powers next-generation networks. JSC Ingenium is a global 4G/5G core & BSS vendor for CSPs. Its offering includes a wide range of 3G, 4G and 5G Core Network technologies and Service Enablers, combined with business support systems (BSS) and tools for the correct supervision and operation of Mobile Operators.
JSC Ingenium makes a very high effort in R&D, allocating more than 45% of its technical resources. Currently, JSC Ingenium is firmly committed to 5G technologies, its philosophy -completely disruptive- and its ability to create a new concept of mobile networks.

Teledyne FLIR OEM is the premier partner for advanced infrared (IR) sensing solutions, offering a fully integrated ecosystem that combines cutting-edge thermal hardware and AI-driven decision support software. A robust and mature supply chain, backed by 25 years of experience as a merchant supplier, ensures predictable, volume production and delivery. 

Our innovative hardware stack includes ROICs and detectors to NDAA-compliant midwave IR (MWIR) and longwave IR (LWIR) thermal camera modules and continuous zoom (CZ) lenses. Our end-to-end computational imaging platform delivers fully integrated image processing and AI capabilities at the edge on low-power processors. properties.description@en:
Wuhan Ernst Robotics Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise dedicated to the integration and development of industrial robot application systems. Located in the Wuhan Economic and Technological Development Zone, it serves as a value provider for the world-renowned brand "ABB Robotics".
Adhering to the principle of providing customers with high-tech industrial robot systems that offer "visible return on investment," Wuhan Ernst Robotics Technology Co., Ltd. upholds the business philosophy of "technology as the core, customer needs first." The company has achieved considerable market share and earned high praise from clients in fields such as testing, handling, processing, welding, gluing, casting, and assembly.

KDDI is one of Japan’s leading telecommunications providers, serving approximately 90 million 
customers. Our commitment to communications quality—the core of our business—has earned 
us the top spot in the Opensignal Japan Mobile Network Experience Awards* for three 
consecutive terms (the most awards won over three consecutive terms). Building on this “power 
to connect,” KDDI is expanding into non-telecommunications sectors such as finance and 
energy within Japan, while globally expanding our connected business and data center business 
outside Japan. KDDI will continue to evolve this world-class “power to connect” by combining it 
with AI and cutting-edge digital technologies to deliver new value to people’s daily lives.
 
* Opensignal Awards: Japan Mobile Network Experience Report (October 2024, April 2025, October 2025) comparing Japan’s four major MNOs

At the Japan Pavilion, 16 Japanese companies—supported by the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC)—will showcase Japan’s cutting-edge vision for next-generation connectivity and digital innovation.

For MWC26, we will feature groundbreaking technologies that will shape the AI-driven society of the 2030s, including Beyond 5G/6G, All-Photonics Networks (APN), Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), and Open RAN.

We invite you to discover how Japan’s leading corporations, innovative startups, and academic institutions are reimagining the future of global digital infrastructure and intelligent connectivity. Through the international promotion of these technologies, MIC is committed to addressing global challenges and building a smarter, more connected world.

CU Phosco provides a fully integrated, end-to-end service encompassing the design, manufacture, installation and maintenance of high masts, columns and lighting systems for the global market.

We have supported the telecommunications industry since the early days of mobile communications in the 1980s and today work with Mobile Network Operators across the UK, Ireland and international markets—directly or through trusted partners—to deliver high-quality structures that enable resilient 5G connectivity.

In rural locations, our durable Monopole structures support antennas and associated equipment, ensuring reliable coverage in remote and hard-to-reach areas.

For urban and residential environments, our Connected Urban Smart Pole offers a compact, multifunctional platform designed for Smart City integration, accommodating antennas, CCTV and other technologies to create safer, better-connected streets.

Scalable, adaptable and engineered for long-term performance, our telecommunications solutions keep communities connected wherever coverage is needed.

Founded in 2019 and headquartered in the UK, Spartified is a trusted technology partner enabling 25+ tier-1 MNOs, MVNO/Es, and enterprises. We help monetize networks assets, manage IoT at scale, automate roaming, and prevent voice fraud. Our telecom-grade platforms boost ARPU, streamline operations, and drive revenues for 100M+ end-users

Key growth drivers are 
- Monetize 5G beyond connectivity: Turn network API capabilities into differentiated, revenue generating offerings with real-time control, automation and intelligence
- Orchestrate IoT Connectivity and eSIM: Unify eSIM Lifecycle Management and effortlessly manage multi-carrier IoT connectivity, with real-time intelligence
- De-risk voice communication: Secure voice services with AI-native intelligence to reduce fraud, operational risk and revenue leakage
