Unity [NYSE: U] offers a suite of tools to develop, deploy, and grow games and interactive experiences across all major platforms from mobile, PC, and console, to extended reality (XR).

Calnex Solutions provides expertise and technology to guide and simplify network and application performance testing.   Our expertise in synchronization delivers solutions that make complex conformance testing easy and efficient, eliminating the risk of failure through accurate and repeatable test capability.  Through emulation our test solutions enable those seeking to deploy network infrastructure or applications to gain insight to their unique performance parameters within which their deployment must withstand to maintain a consistent performance. 
Together our insight and innovation brings efficiency to your testing and delivers the assurance needed to make the next step.

Ranplan Wireless pioneer software solutions for the design, optimization and simulation of in-building and urban outdoor wireless networks. Our open platform simplifies network planning by allowing imports of geographical data, floorplans, mesh objects, and 3D building models from BIM authoring software.

Intelligent automation and 3D ray-tracing simulations expedite the design process, expertly identifying potential issues and optimizing network performance for reliable connectivity. Operating from a vendor-neutral standpoint ensures unbiased representation of devices, components, and simulations, facilitating precise predictions of network performance.

Our tailored Design and Migration Services offer supporting resources and skills from seasoned experts to efficiently undertake the most intricate network challenges for the commercial benefit of all stakeholders. 

Network Engineers leveraging Ranplan software have experienced a remarkable 50% enhancement in design productivity and a 30% reduction in CAPEX and OPEX. This transformative impact supports the swift and cost-effective delivery of advanced wireless networks, providing an unmatched quality of service for end-users and businesses.

AccelerComm is a leading provider of high-performance, error-resilient physical layer solutions for 5G and beyond. Experts in specialist Radio Access Networks (RAN) applications such as satellite and private networks, AccelerComm delivers solutions with cutting-edge performance and efficiency, utilising next generation compute platforms.
Our comprehensive portfolio ranges from customisable signal processing components through to complete physical layer solutions implemented over a wide range of platforms, including arm and x86 software, AI Engines, FPGA  , and ASIC-ready IP cores. Our modular approach allows seamless integration based on O-RAN, SCF and 3GPP standards.
AccelerComm’s solutions can be configured for a wide range of applications, optimizing aspects such as power consumption, latency, reliability, and resilience. Our technology addresses the unique challenges of satellite and NTN communications, offering space-hardened, field-proven implementations that meet stringent SWaP (Size, Weight and Power) requirements.
Through continuous innovation, we ensure our customers have access to the latest advancements in physical layer technology, supporting the development of tomorrow’s high-performance, low-power networks.

Giesecke+Devrient (G+D) is a global SecurityTech company that makes the lives of billions of people more secure.
A trusted partner for all challenges posed by the IoT, we enable secure connections to mobile networks and the IoT through SIM cards, eSIM and iSIM solutions, including operating systems as well as connectivity services.
G+D is the only end-to-end IoT provider, delivering secure, out-of-the-box device connectivity with seamless global coverage to unlock business potential for our customers.
In this fast-paced environment, we’re continually expanding our portfolio into new industries, such as smart logistics tracking and software applications.
Secure connections. Unlimited potential.

The Illinois Department of Commerce Office of Trade and Investment (OTI) opens overseas markets for Illinois companies and promotes foreign direct investment in Illinois. OTI strives to raise Illinois' profile as a global business leader through a network of professionals focusing on improving the state's economy worldwide. With headquarters in Chicago and 6 foreign offices around the world, the Department of Commerce's Office of Trade and Investment is dedicated to helping small and medium sized businesses expand their global reach and export abroad. OTI provides business and lead generation support to Illinois companies through organized international trade missions, industry focused tradeshows and individual marketing assistance to identify key strategic partners and distributors. The team also assists foreign owned companies with soft landing, including regional collaboration and intergovernmental coordination, site selection, project-specific data analysis and incentives.

Combain provides geolocation services for connected IoT devices, enabling indoor and outdoor tracking using signals from cellular networks, WiFi, and Bluetooth. It has built one of the world’s largest crowdsourced location databases, drawing on billions of GPS points and radio observations from cell towers, WiFi access points, and Bluetooth beacons.

Its product portfolio includes the Combain Location API, available as a cloud service or for on-premises deployment; Combain AI Indoor, which uses deep learning for higher precision indoors; and the Combain 5G Positioning Engine for 5G network positioning. Combain also offers Traxmate, a cloud platform for mapping and tracking IoT devices.

Combain works with mobile network operators, national security organizations, and manufacturers of tracking and IoT products worldwide. The company is headquartered in Lund, Sweden, with offices in Palo Alto, California, and development operations in India.

Commercis | Connectivity • Technology • Consulting

Commercis helps organisations operate, scale, and make decisions in environments where connectivity, security, and reliability cannot fail.

We combine advanced communications infrastructure with engineering, cybersecurity, and advisory expertise to design, build, and operate resilient digital ecosystems — from headquarters to the edge, and from stable networks to the most demanding operational environments.

What we deliver

Connectivity & Network Infrastructure
Satellite, fiber, wireless, and hybrid networks engineered for performance and availability anywhere operations exist.

Secure Digital Operations
Cybersecurity, monitoring, and resilience built into the architecture — not added after deployment.

Intelligent Systems & Innovation
AI, IoT, and advanced data capabilities that turn infrastructure into operational intelligence.

Engineering & Deployment

Strategic Advisory
Practical guidance to align technology investment with operational outcomes, risk reduction, and measurable efficiency.

By replacing fragmented local telecom agreements with one global contract and one invoice, Telgea simplifies scale, reduces operational complexity, and increases cost transparency. Our platform is built for internationally operating companies that need reliable, compliant, and flexible connectivity without the burden of managing multiple providers.

Telgea supports modern, distributed organizations with secure, scalable telecom infrastructure designed for global growth.

XME.digital is a modular Digital Service Platform built for telecom operators in the AI-native era. It enables telcos to design, launch, integrate, and scale digital services — from customer portals to internal operational tools — within one configurable ecosystem. The platform combines: Integration Middleware — a low-code orchestration and API layer with visual configuration tools, dynamic data model, ready connectors, and AI gateway; Creative Studio & UI Engine — tools for building branded digital services and configurable workspaces; Stella#5 Generative Customer Portal — an LLM-powered Generative UX engine that unites classic UI with an AI assistant for proactive, context-aware self-service. Instead of generating interfaces from scratch, XME’s Generative UX assembles trusted, BSS-integrated widgets — ensuring consistency, compliance, and business control. XME.digital can act as enterprise middleware, a digital customer layer, or a frontier system extending legacy BSS. Operators launch new digital and AI-driven services in weeks — not months — without full core replacement.

Company profile
Founded in 2018, xMEMS Labs, Inc. is redefining sound and cooling with its breakthrough piezoMEMS platform. We created the world’s first solid-state MEMS speakers—powering AI glasses, earbuds, headphones, and smartwatches—and the first μCooling fan-on-a-chip, enabling improved thermal performance in smartphones, AI glasses, SSDs, and beyond. xMEMS has over 250 granted patents worldwide for its technologies.

Products & Services
xMEMS Labs, Inc. develops solid-state microelectromechanical systems (MEMS) semiconductors and is focused on innovations in piezoMEMS ultrasonic actuators and transducers. xMEMS currently applies its novel and patented solid-state, silicon piezoMEMS process to three core markets: 1) Active micro cooling chip (fan-on-a-chip) delivering critical thermal management to small, thin systems such as smartphones, XR, SSD storage and datacenter subsystems that conventional fans and liquid cooling cannot reach, 2) loud speakers for near-field audio products such as smart watches and open-fit earbuds, and 3) micro speakers for earbuds, headphones and hearing assistance devices.

AGI Computer Use Agent
This agent is focused on assisting and automating computer-based tasks using our industry-leading SAMs.

Yesim is a Swiss-based global eSIM provider offering mobile data services for travelers and digital businesses. Founded in 2019 under Genesis Group AG, the company delivers instant, contract-free connectivity in over 200 destinations through its iOS and Android apps. Yesim focuses on simplicity: users install an eSIM in a few clicks, connect to the best available local network, and access 4G/5G data without traditional roaming charges.

The product portfolio includes local, regional, and global data plans, unlimited packages with Fair Use Policy, an integrated VPN, and virtual phone numbers for personal or business use. For enterprises, Yesim provides a full eSIM management platform, centralized billing, traffic monitoring, and reseller/API solutions.

With more than 2 million users worldwide, Yesim positions itself as a seamless connectivity ecosystem combining eSIM, virtual numbers, and security features. Its strengths include broad coverage, strong customer support, transparent pricing, and dedicated B2B tools—making Yesim a flexible choice for international travelers, remote teams, and global service providers.

XR is a specialist thermal solutions company focused on the design and integration of advanced thermal systems for high-performance electronic applications.

As power density, system complexity, and performance requirements continue to rise across industries such as AI computing, data centers, high-performance computing (HPC), electric vehicles, and aerospace, thermal management has evolved from a material-level concern into a system-level engineering challenge. XR was established to operate precisely at this intersection.

Working as an ODM-focused engineering partner, XR collaborates closely with customer engineering teams to architect, design, and deliver custom thermal solutions that go beyond standard products and reference designs. XR’s capabilities span the full thermal pathway, from system architecture definition to integration and validation.

We are a world-leading provider of cellular IoT chips, featuring a highly optimized engine that enables devices to communicate over cellular LTE/5G networks. Our chip portfolio spans low, medium, and high-speed wireless transmission, offering a unique advantage in optimizing the “PPA (Power, Performance, and Area/Cost)” balance. This ensures high performance, low power consumption, and cost-effectiveness to meet diverse needs and withstand harsh operating conditions across a wide range of applications. Our chips form the foundation of the IoT ecosystem, enabling physical objects such as smart meters, vehicles, and industrial devices to exchange data seamlessly. Moreover, our chip portfolio enables devices not only to connect but also to become intelligent, allowing them to gather, process, and exchange information efficiently via Edge-Al and Open CPU technologies. This broad capability unlocks a wide range of applications, from smart sensors, AI toys, and mobile payments to more complex systems such as wearables, connected vehicles, and industrial automation.

properties.description@en:
Founded in 2002, CEC Huada Electronic Design Co., Ltd. ("HED") is a national high-tech company, focusing on developing integrated circuits with security features.

HED is dedicated to the development of security SE chips, security MCU chips, and smart card IC, focusing on aspects such as applications in FinTech, network communication, IoT, Internet of Vehicle, smart mobility, and smart manufacturing.

Keeping its commitment to the concept of being "Proactive and Aiming for Success", HED offers "chip" products and "chip" solutions for the burgeoning new generation of the IT sector and collaborates with it to build a promising "chip" future.

properties.name@en: New H3C Intelligence Terminal Co., Ltd.
properties.description@en: New H3C Intelligence Terminal is on the golden track of AI, with its business driven by a dual - engine model. Intelligence computing provides a solid computing power foundation for large - scale models. Personal computing, through AI PCs and terminal devices, enables AI to truly serve everyone's work and life.

Biocat is the driving force behind the healthcare innovation ecosystem in Catalonia, working to scale life sciences and healthcare sector, generating social and economic impact, and positioning the BioRegion of Catalonia as an international benchmark.

Under the name of Catalonia Health Innovation Ecosystem, Biocat, together with TIC Salut i Social are leading a stand in collaboration with Generalitat de Catalunya, ACCIÓ, AQuAS, Ajuntament de Barcelona, CatSalut, Institiut Català de la Salut, La Unió Catalana d'Hospitals, Consorci de Salut i Social de Catalunya, ACES, ACRA and M4Social. With this alliance, different entities place the Catalan health sector on the international scene.

Boehringer Ingelheim is a biopharmaceutical company active in both human and animal health. As one of the industry’s top investors in research and development, the company focuses on developing innovative therapies that can improve and extend lives in areas of high unmet medical need. Independent since its foundation in 1885, Boehringer takes a long-term perspective, embedding sustainability along the entire value chain. Approximately 54,500 employees serve over 130 markets to build a healthier and more sustainable tomorrow.  Learn more at https://www.boehringer-ingelheim.com.

Barcelona & Madrid Health Hub are a non-profit association created to drive innovation in digital health and promote its transfer to the healthcare sector. With more than 500 members including startups, corporations, healthcare institutions, universities and investors, Barcelona Health Hub (BHH) started in 2018 and has already established itself as a global reference hub. Following its example, Madrid Health Hub (MHH) launched in 2025 with the main mission of turning Madrid into a new epicenter of digital transformation in healthcare, fostering collaboration between the key players in the sector.

We are a global, science-led, patient-focused pharmaceutical company. 
We are transforming the future of healthcare by unlocking the power of what science can do, for people, society and planet. Joining up human ingenuity and technology through partnership and a willingness to innovate can transform care and make a big difference to our health.

Engineering company and ISO 13485 certified strategic partner for the development of technological products and solutions.
Inbrooll provides end-to-end product development services, supporting projects from early concept and feasibility to prototyping, industrialisation, verification, certification and manufacturing readiness.
It works with companies in medical technology, biotechnology, analytical systems and laboratory instrumentation, combining strong expertise in microfluidics, electronics, mechanics and IoT.
Inbrooll collaborates both with established medical device companies and innovative start-ups, helping transform complex ideas into reliable, scalable and market-ready products with reduced risk and time-to-market.

We are a global, science-led, patient-focused pharmaceutical company. 
We are transforming the future of healthcare by unlocking the power of what science can do, for people, society and planet. Joining up human ingenuity and technology through partnership and a willingness to innovate can transform care and make a big difference to our health.

Ozzylogik is a European provider of network and cellular intelligence solutions. Our BS Marshall monitors GSM/UMTS/LTE/5G networks using commercial mobile terminals. It collects operational data, identifies weak spots, tracks dropped calls, and detects issues like fake BTS and MITM interceptors.
Leveraging proprietary rtVDF technology, we deliver precise heat maps and BTS location visualizations by integrating multiple sensors. Our tools ensure real-time signal analysis, uncover security risks, and offer network insights. Fully designed and produced in Europe, Ozzylogik empowers organizations to safeguard communities, strengthen security, and understand the cellular landscape with unmatched precision.

Stimulo Design is an industrial design and product development agency that transforms ideas into market-ready products. With a user-centered approach, we offer a comprehensive process covering strategy, design, industrialization, and product launch. Our expertise spans various industries, from consumer goods to medical devices, delivering innovative and high-quality solutions. We collaborate with startups and established companies, ensuring functionality, aesthetics, and manufacturability. Our mission is to create a better world through design and engineering as tools for social, economic, and environmental transformation. With a commitment to trust, excellence, and sustainability, we turn visions into tangible products that stand out in the market.

The main objective of the Fundació de Recerca Sant Joan de Déu is to contribute to the improvement of people's health and well-being by promoting, supporting and coordinating research and innovation. Its projects include the coordination of three of the Generalitat-funded R+D+I networks: Xartec Salut, TECSAM Network and i4KIDS, dedicated to promoting innovation in health, mental health and maternal and child health respectively.

CMG MeDev is a dedicated consulting service with more than 30 years of experience with focus on the field of medical devices, in vitro diagnostics, software and AI. Your partner for regulatory strategy helping MedTech & Health Tech startups reach market faster reducing regulatory risks turning regulatory complexity into competitive advantage for innovators.

The main objective of the Fundació de Recerca Sant Joan de Déu is to contribute to the improvement of people's health and well-being by promoting, supporting and coordinating research and innovation. Its projects include the coordination of three of the Generalitat-funded R+D+I networks: Xartec Salut, TECSAM Network and i4KIDS, dedicated to promoting innovation in health, mental health and maternal and child health respectively.

The AccessCat Network (Accessibility Innovation Network of Catalonia) is a knowledge transfer network that gathers research groups from different Catalan institutions.

Our goal is to bridge the gap between research, society and industry in the field of accessibility to information and communication. We want to offer solutions to a diverse society where everyone should have access to information, culture, and education.

AccessCat Network’s mission is to foster and develop the transference and valorisation of research results on accessibility to information and communication, with special focus on its social impact and the involvement of end users.

Mecenas Capital connects private investors with innovative tech startups through tailored Tax Lease financing structures in Spain. We help startups convert their R&D tax incentives into immediate, non-dilutive funding that accelerates growth and innovation. For investors, Mecenas Capital offers a tax-efficient opportunity to co-finance high-impact research and development projects while benefiting from attractive fiscal advantages and risk-mitigated returns. Our model bridges the gap between capital and innovation, promoting sustainable investment in emerging technologies and supporting the growth of Spain’s innovation ecosystem. Mecenas Capital specializes in maximizing R&D tax deductions and structuring scalable financing solutions aligned with investor and startup success.

Engagement like never before!

Modernize your customer journeys with interactive video experiences that captivate, convert, and inspire at every touchpoint. 

Videobot’s groundbreaking Video Experience Platform brings your brand into the video-centric era—seamlessly managing, scheduling, and optimizing your videos across websites, apps, and beyond. 

Elevate engagement, drive conversions, and delight your audience with the industry’s first solution built to transform how you connect with customers.

Ultra-Wideband (UWB)-based indoor positioning technology is at the core of Pinpoint. Our solutions provide precise, real-time, FiRa-standard-compliant positioning for smartphones and wearables, enabling use cases such as interactive wayfinding in smart buildings, location-aware advertising, seamless access control, and service-to-phone solutions across retail, events, and public transport.

Pinpoint offers:
- Indoor positioning satellites
- A FiRa-compliant UWB location engine for Android smartphone vendors
- Tools for positioning setup planning and analytics
- Indoor navigation SDKs for Android, iOS, and Flutter

Furthermore, we offer a hands-on live demo to experience our technology in action and look forward to welcoming you!

Bankuish is the credit bureau of the future of work. It turns gig worker, freelancer, and creator data into a creditworthiness profile currently used by the largest banks in Latam and the US.
By connecting independent workers to tailored financial products, insurance, and benefits programs, Bankuish empowers them to access the financial support they need to thrive without constraints.

Bankuish has de-risked the process of lending to gig workers for financial institutions and fintechs, allowing our clients to discover new customers, improve customer relationships, and increase productivity.

Fonus Kids is a safe digital education platform for children aged 2–7 that protects families from harmful online content. It provides a carefully curated library of cartoons, learning videos, and interactive content that supports children’s cognitive and emotional development. Unlike open platforms, Fonus Kids works in a fully controlled, ad-free environment with culturally appropriate content. Parents can monitor activity, manage screen time, and guide their child’s development through a dedicated parental dashboard.

AI Diagnostics improves early detection of diseases by enabling frontline workers to screen patients using an AI-powered digital stethoscope. The device uses auscultation and analyzes sounds to identify abnormalities associated with conditions like tuberculosis, making screening faster, more accessible, and usable even in low-resource settings without clinical expertise.

NeuralTrust is the leading security platform for generative AI, offering a cutting-edge command center for real-time defense and offense. Our AI gateway delivers the fastest performance in the market for identifying and neutralizing attacks, while our automated red teaming engine proactively uncovers vulnerabilities, ensuring robust protection for your AI systems.

Trusted by global leaders like Samsung Electronics, P&G, and Philips, Enhans accelerates enterprise growth by providing full automation in the commerce vertical with production-proven Agentic AI.
We go beyond data collection to true operational automation. Powered by a proprietary ontology and multi-agent architecture, CommerceOS delivers real-time market intelligence across 50+ countries, 1,000+ marketplaces. Enhans transforms complex ecommerce processes into insight-driven workflows and large-scale decision automation.
Secure a competitive edge with Enhans behind the world’s biggest brands.

ZIM Connections is a cutting-edge provider of global eSIM solutions, transforming how businesses stay connected. By offering innovative, AI-powered technology, ZIM ensures seamless, cost-effective connectivity in over 190 countries. Whether for business travellers, remote teams, or global enterprises, ZIM delivers unparalleled convenience by eliminating the need for physical SIM cards and reducing roaming costs. With a user-friendly dashboard for managing plans and devices, ZIM empowers businesses to streamline connectivity, optimize expenses, and stay ahead in an increasingly connected world. Trusted by forward-thinking companies, ZIM is shaping the future of global communication.

OptAI is an on-device AI optimization startup that empowers tech companies to optimize and deploy powerful AI models on resource-constrained devices with hardware-aware model optimization technologies.

We enable complex AI models to run in real time across diverse inference devices such as mobile, automotive, and robotics by developing technologies in:
- Model Building
- Model Compression & Lightweighting
- Inference Acceleration

Medwise AI is the fastest growing AI search platform for physicians in the UK, with a quarter million of questions already answered. Our mission is to empower healthcare professionals to find trusted, evidence-based answers at the point of care. Medwise AI uses the latest clinical guidelines and practice-changing research to provide concise and verifiable answers. It reduces cognitive burden and allows physicians to provide safe, consistent and optimised care to their patients.

In four years from now, we aim to be the trusted AI clinical search layer for global healthcare, embedded across hospitals, healthcare systems, and pharmaceutical organisations.

Kreios Space is a Spanish deep-tech startup founded in 2021 with the mission to unlock the vast potential of Very Low Earth Orbit (VLEO) through its breakthrough space propulsion technology. We are pioneering the development of the first Air-Breathing Electric Propulsion (ABEP) system specifically designed for VLEO, a game-changing engine that enables satellites to fly at altitudes from 150 to 300 kilometers by capturing and using atmospheric particles as propellant. By eliminating the need to carry onboard fuel, this approach drastically increases efficiency and overcomes the primary challenge of VLEO: ATMOSPHERIC DRAG.

DeepKeep delivers end-to-end AI security and trustworthiness across the full AI lifecycle. Built with generative AI at its core, the platform protects both large language model and computer vision systems, keeping pace with AI’s rapid innovation. Its key capabilities include an AI Firewall, AI Usage Control, Agentic AI Security, Automated AI Red Teaming, and advanced Model Scanning. Cybersecurity teams worldwide use DeepKeep’s AI Security Platform to secure AI agents, employee AI use, and homegrown AI applications.

ConnectHear is an accessibility infrastructure company that enables seamless communication between Deaf and hearing people in a digital-first world. It offers a range of real-time and AI-powered solutions, including on-demand sign language interpretation, accessibility layers for customer service and public-facing environments, sign-language–based alerts and announcements, and AI tools for sign language recognition and learning. Designed for reliability, low latency, and enterprise use, the platform works across mobile and web systems. With a fast growing global presence, ConnectHear helps organizations make sign language a built-in part of modern digital services.

AI-Driven Global Metal Scrap Recycling Technology Service Platform

Doctor Scrap is a globally leading high-tech technology service platform in the recycling industry, with the mission of promoting 100% recycling rate of global scrap materials. We are committed to transforming the scrap recycling industry through artificial intelligence technology, providing efficient, intelligent, and precise solutions for customers worldwide. 

Our core products include the AI scrap Identification System, Price Prediction Model, AI-powered ERP for Recycling companies, Recycling Industry Education and Training System, and the Global Digital Scrap Trading Platform.

AIM Intelligence develops AI security solutions that automatically identify vulnerabilities in enterprise AI systems and defend them in real time.

Our core products, AIM Red(automated AI red teaming) and AIM Guard(real-time guardrails), continuously generate thousands of adversarial attack scenarios every day and are designed to block over 99% of harmful behaviors in real-time.  

AIM Intelligence serves more than 15 enterprise and government customers, including LG Electronics, Meta, Anthropic, and public-sector institutions such as TTA and KISA. Within the first year of operation, the company has achieved over USD 0.9M in annualized revenue.

Spendbase is a spend management platform designed to break your SaaS / Cloud spend habits and introduce a radically different way of building cost efficiency. With huge software discounts, cloud credits procurement, and virtual cards, our easy-to-use platform brings you the savings you thought were impossible.

Sustainable, cost-effective and chemical-free regeneration of industrial process water.

Uraphex designs, manufactures, and installs its own patented technology that enables a sustainable, cost-effective and chemical-free water regeneration, for major industrial processes.

Developed in-house, PHEX is our proprietary transversal technology, that reduces water and chemical consumption across multiple industries. Thanks to its cross-cutting and flexible nature, it allows us to design customised solutions for sectors such as manufacturing, agri-food, chemical, pharma and even real estate.

Kistpay is a fintech platform advancing digital and financial inclusion in emerging markets. We enable people to participate in the digital economy through affordable smartphone financing and our innovative “Data on Credit” service, which provides instant mobile data on credit for users with zero balance. Using AI-driven alternative credit scoring, micro-loans, and partnerships with telecom operators, banks, and digital platforms, Kistpay keeps users connected to payments, education, work, and essential online services. Recognized by the World Bank, GSMA, UNDP, ITU, and IsDB, Kistpay is building next-generation digital public infrastructure that brings together devices, connectivity, and inclusive credit at scale.

Skyfora, a weather tech innovator, is redefining the future of forecasting. Its pioneering Telecom GNSS Meteorology transforms existing 5G towers into the world’s densest atmospheric sensor grid, capturing hyperlocal, real-time data with a software-only update. For telecom operators, this innovation converts vulnerable infrastructure into a climate resilience asset cutting weather-related losses, reducing OPEX, and unlocking new service revenues. For society, it fuels next-gen AI weather models (NVIDIA, Google, ECMWF) and empowers early warnings that save lives. Backed by ESA, EIC, and leading VCs, Skyfora is building the global backbone for climate intelligence and resilient communities.

DRUO is a free, direct-debit payment method that enables businesses to get paid directly from bank accounts. By connecting directly with financial institutions, DRUO’s proprietary network eliminates transaction processing costs to zero (or nearly zero), reduces fraud risk 25x, and expands coverage to any customer with a bank account, many of whom are often excluded by the legacy card system. DRUO is the backbone of a new, inclusive financial ecosystem built for driving global commerce.

Dost is an AI-powered SaaS platform that automates financial document processing and supplier management for mid-market enterprises. The platform uses proprietary generative AI models to handle the entire accounts payable cycle, from document capture through to ERP integration, serving businesses in manufacturing, construction, logistics, automotive, food and beverage, and chemical sectors.

properties.description@en: Asserta is a highly specialized company focused on optimizing the pharmacotherapy process across hospital, outpatient, and primary care settings. Founded in 2012, it operates in more than 20 countries in Europe, the Middle East, and Latin America. Its core activities include Silicon, its integrated pharmacotherapy management software (pharmacy management, medical prescribing, prescription monitoring, and nursing administration records), healthcare analytics, strategic and functional planning, and real-world research. Through proprietary Big Data–driven solutions such as Pharmacy Analytics Manager, Fleming Antimicrobial Stewardship, and OncoAnalytics, Asserta enhances medication safety, resource efficiency, evidence-based decision-making, and health outcomes through multidisciplinary expertise.

XarSMART is a Precision Personalized Medicine Network established in 2023, led by IDIBELL and funded by AGAUR (Generalitat de Catalunya).
 
We focus on Advanced Therapy Medicinal Products, MD and IVD, and SaMD. Our network includes 30 member institutions, 65 research groups and +900 researchers.
 
We focus on providing services for the valorisation and development of ideas and projects, securing public and private funding and promoting collaboration between academia and the industry. XarSMART empowers its members through skill development and strategic support, ensuring the translation of solutions to the National Health System.
 
In short, XarSMART advances research to the market.

Nema Health is a spin-off of the Universitat de Lleida and the Vall d'Hebrón Institut de Recerca (VHIR), developing ONCONEOVAC, a personalized immunotherapy for the treatment of cancer. ONCONEOVAC is based on the therapeutic effect induced by antigens extracted from the patient's tumor biopsy when formulated with proprietary peptides, activating an immune response against each patient's unique cancer and becoming an effective and non-toxic treatment. By providing a new treatment option (stand alone or in combination with the standard of care), it can significantly enhance patient survival and quality of life. We are currently in pre-clinical stage.

Founded in 2021 as a spin-off of Hospital Sant Joan de Déu and Eurecat, Ephion Health is revolutionizing patient monitoring. Our hardware-agnostic platform uses Artificial Intelligence to transform data from any wearable sensor into objective digital biomarkers. We precisely measure health status by translating human mobility and walking patterns into objective data, replacing subjective clinical scales with actionable insights. Our mission is to empower doctors and pharmaceutical companies with tools for accurate monitoring and personalized therapy, ensuring technology works for the benefit of every patient.
Quantum-Mechanics and Artificial Intelligence for Drug Discovery

cloudnumbering delivers wholesale virtual mobile numbers without the cost, complexity, and commitment of traditional networks. Powered by VodafoneThree and 30 years of industry expertise, our platform offers real-time number purchasing, seamless porting, and transparent pricing through an intuitive self-service portal.

cloudnumbering provides the infrastructure your business needs. From identity protection and number masking to business messaging and BYOD solutions, use our voice and SMS enabled numbers to build better products, faster.

Flexible billing, no hidden charges, and a rock-solid API — take back control of your virtual numbers with cloudnumbering.

Ànima Design is an industrial design agency based in Barcelona, specializing in product development, mobility, and healthcare. With over 20 years of expertise, they bridge the gap between innovative technology and human-centric experiences. Their multidisciplinary team excels at transforming complex concepts into market-ready products, prioritizing functionality, sustainability, and aesthetic excellence. By integrating strategic consulting with creative engineering, Ànima Design empowers global brands and startups throughout the entire design lifecycle from ideation to production. This commitment to innovation has secured prestigious international accolades, including Red Dot and iF Design Awards, solidifying their reputation as the global leaders in strategic design

Airtool is a Barcelona-based technology company founded in 2024, offering a modular Business Suite with mission-critical applications like ERP, CRM, HR, Project Management, and WMS. Ready to use, flexible, and tailored to each organization’s needs. 

Built on a powerful, full-stack platform, Airtool combines data fabric, analytics, low-code development, AI, and enterprise security, while running seamlessly on cloud, on-premise, or hybrid environments. 

With a focus on innovation, scalability, and long-term customer success, Airtool empowers businesses across industries to streamline operations, harness data insights, and accelerate growth. Setting the standard for the next generation of enterprise-grade solutions.

Uncompromising Data Privacy:  Protect your intellectual property by moving beyond "Big Tech" cloud vulnerabilities. Unlike standard work chat apps, you maintain exclusive ownership of your encryption keys, logs, and storage—ensuring your most sensitive team messaging remains strictly confidential.

Eliminate the risk of external service interruptions. While global SaaS outages paralyze your competitors, your team chat app remains online. If your network is up, your team is working.  

Achieve "Audit-Ready" status with ease. By hosting your own group conversation apps hub, you meet the gold standard for data residency and sovereignty, simplifying GDPR, HIPAA, and internal security audits.

Splashmate is the first global all-in-one App for watersport lovers.

We are digitalising the watersports industry while being active on Marine Sustainability activities.
We currently have the following sports available on the app: Surf, Kitesurf, Windsurf, Wing Foil and Paddleboard. This list will soon be expanded to all the other individual watersports..

Splashmate is based on 4 main pillars:
• DIGITALISE the whole watersports’ world
• make a SOCIAL REVOLUTION by creating the biggest watersports’ worldwide community
• SIMPLIFY the watersports’ lovers customer journey
• push for SUSTAINABILITY by removing plastic waste from seas to preserve marine life

Ludium Lab is a technology company founded in Spain in 2012. Expert and leader in cloud services and solutions, the company works in more than 60 countries around the world. Its activity is currently focused on adapting its technology to cloud gaming platforms (SoraStream development), automotive (ICE), metaverse solution, SaaS and XR (Vr/Ar). The team is working to perfect its software virtualization technology and implementation in different solutions and products, with high quality and low costs. For more information, visit www.ludiumlab.com

Toolza is your business cockpit — everything you need to operate, in one view.

Income. Expenses. Invoices. Payments. Employees and their duties. Departments. Multiple entities. Legal structures. All connected, all visible, all under control.

Whether you're running one company or ten, across teams and jurisdictions — Toolza keeps you flying steady.

No blind spots. No scattered spreadsheets. No chaos.

Just the operational clarity every growing business needs.

AIkjiu is a RAN extension platform enabling MNOs to monetize 
their existing infrastructure through real-time APIs, similar to GSMA's 
CAMARA, but focused on RAN-level data with native GDPR compliance.

For MNOs: Transform RAN infrastructure into completely new B2B revenue streams.
For Data Consumers: Radio channel data as a service, raw streams for custom 
processing or AI-processed smart city intelligence (traffic, crowds, mobility).

We pioneer a new marketplace: real-time radio channel data as a service from existing RAN infrastructure. Hybrid edge-cloud architecture with cloud scalability.

Partners, investors, and early customers welcome.

We created a predictive analytics platform that transforms open data into real-time business intelligence. It analyzes all types of sources to detect risks, opportunities, and trends, filtering out noise through a proprietary classification and prioritization methodology.

In a context of information overload, KEONUS replaces static reports, slow manual analysis, and generic AI tools with a structured, contextual, and efficient approach. The platform significantly reduces analysis time while improving decision quality, helping organizations anticipate market movements, act faster, and strengthen their competitive positioning in complex and uncertain environments.

Designed to scale across sectors and countries,  KEONUS adapts to diverse strategic needs.

Didit is an AI-native, developer-first identity verification platform that makes KYC, AML, and fraud prevention instant, flexible, and transparent, with a seamless user experience and more than 70% lower costs.

Odoo is an all-in-one, modular business management platform that streamlines operations across finance, sales, CRM, supply chain, HR, manufacturing, and e-commerce within a single integrated ecosystem. Designed for scalability and flexibility, it serves both startups and large enterprises, enabling tailored workflows with full data consistency.

Built on an open-source foundation and supported by a vast app marketplace, Odoo allows rapid deployment, customization, and integration at a fraction of the cost of traditional enterprise software. By centralizing data and automating core processes, Odoo boosts efficiency, improves decision-making, and enhances customer experiences in a competitive digital landscape.

Korea International Trade Association (KITA) is Korea’s largest business organization, representing over 77,000 member companies. Founded in 1946, KITA promotes global trade and supports the growth of the Korean economy. It represents the interests of the business community while providing practical business support, fostering private-sector trade cooperation, developing trade strategies, nurturing trade professionals, and building trade infrastructure.
Through a strong network of 13 regional centers and 15 overseas centers across three regional divisions, KITA plays a key role in supporting SMEs’ overseas market entry and has contributed to Korea achieving a trade volume of USD 1 trillion.

AI-Native Skill Assessment for Hiring Teams.

Traditional screening and assessment tools are breaking as AI reshapes hiring.

Tendent combines adaptive skill assessments with automated integrity checks to deliver decision-grade proof of skill at scale.

Stop filtering through AI-generated noise and resume spam.
Instantly identify authentic, top-tier talent with a platform built for the realities of modern hiring.

Turn claims into proof - and restore trust to your funnel.

Sleepy Inc. is a digital healthcare startup developing digital sedatives and anesthetics designed to suppress the central nervous system (CNS) through non-pharmacological methods. The company's first product, Sleeby, is a digital earplug that operates stand-alone without smartphone integration, promoting rapid sleep induction by generating binaural beats through brainwave entrainment and neuromodulation. Founded by a professor of Anesthesiology and Pain Medicine, Sleepy Inc. is currently conducting multiple clinical trials to validate the efficacy and safety of its technology in achieving non-pharmacological CNS depression.

IPIN LABS enables scalable, cost-effective indoor asset tracking with AI.

Our platform delivers clarity in complex indoor environments where GPS does not work, leveraging existing Wi-Fi and BLE infrastructure combined with AI to provide reliable indoor positioning with minimal setup.

Deployable in under 24 hours, IPIN LABS transforms large indoor facilities—such as factories, airports, and hospitals—into visible and actionable operations through API or SaaS, enabling greater efficiency, asset utilization, and safety.

We are currently collaborating with industry leaders including SK Telecom, SK Hynix (global leader in memory semiconductors), Incheon International Airport (one of the world’s largest airports), SNCF, and Wistron.

NUUA is a Korean-based travel technology company focused on transforming travel services through innovation and automation. As the first company in South Korea to achieve the IATA ARM Index, NUUA meets internationally recognized standards for modern airline content distribution.

NUUA’s core products, a flight content aggregator and a SaaS-based back-office system, enable travel sellers to access, sell, and manage airline content across traditional global distribution systems (GDS) and the next-generation airline distribution standard (NDC). By standardizing fragmented airline data and streamlining booking, settlement, and post-sale processes, NUUA reduces operational complexity and supports efficient scaling within an increasingly technology-led travel ecosystem.

SN Display leads the commercialization of next-generation perovskite emissive materials through proprietary synthesis and surface-stabilization technologies. Founded by Professor Tae-Woo Lee of Seoul National University, a global authority in the field, the company has established an industrial-scale production system overcoming conventional quantum dot limitations. With over 40 foundational patents, our materials offer superior optical properties for ultra-high-resolution Micro-OLED/LED and AR/VR devices. By integrating perovskite nanocrystals into color-conversion pixel arrays, SN Display provides a unique, production-ready platform, actively collaborating with global industry leaders to drive the next paradigm shift in display technology.

LBS Tech is a smart mobility solution company leveraging pedestrian environment data. Its AI-based solution, MaaS-Bridge, analyzes and designs safe and accessible connection points (Mobility Points) between vehicles and pedestrian routes, enabling seamless first- and last-mile travel for wheelchair users, seniors, and people with visual impairments. By integrating pedestrian infrastructure data, traffic flow, and user characteristics, LBS Tech delivers data-driven accessibility design. This approach was recognized with the CES 2026 Best Innovation Award in the Travel & Tourism category, supporting inclusive and reliable mobility services for autonomous driving and smart city environments.

We specialize in real-time 3D motion capture on mobile devices.
Our mission is to supply high-quality robotics data at scale.
We are now expanding our RFM data business.
Our core strength is 3D motion-capture algorithm on our own.
It runs in real time on mobile devices, yet it achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, outperforming many transformer-based heavy models.
Our model yields complicated human data including body pose, body shape, facial expression, hands pose etc.
It enables a dramatic reduction in robot-data production cost.

"Infinite medical innovation, turning information into life-saving inference on our intelligent infra."

Infmedix is a subsidiary of Seoul National University Hospital, the No.1 hospital in South Korea. We aim to contribute to the health of people around the world by creating an infrastructure that integrates AI technology and healthcare. 

We are seeking global companies to collaborate across various fields, including AI, on-device, healthcare, data platforms, IT infrastructure and so on. Thank you.

Crosshub is an AI and blockchain company providing 4th-generation hybrid digital infrastructure built on Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI), enabling secure global identity authentication and interoperable payments through IDBlock and B·Pay.
IDBlock is a passport-based identity infrastructure that combines SSI and zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) technologies to verify users while preserving privacy, supporting card, account/QR, and e-wallet payments within a single compliant flow.
With developer-ready SDKs and APIs, Crosshub integrates with telecom, mobility, travel, e-commerce, and public service platforms to streamline onboarding, extend global connectivity, and improve transaction success without centralizing sensitive personal data.

SAKAK powers the edge AI with proprietary hyper-personalized on-device agents. By processing data locally, we cut operational costs by 75% and data traffic by 88% compared to legacy SaaS, while ensuring top-tier security. We validated product-market fit in digital healthcare through successful PoCs with major hospitals and insurers. Recognized as a Top 20 Startup at MWC 2025, SAKAK is now scaling into sectors like telecommunications, mobility, and defense where security and low latency are mission-critical. Backed by strategic partnerships with Qualcomm, Vodafone, and Samsung Electronics, we are expanding into North America and Europe to lead the global on-device AI ecosystem.

Korea International Trade Association (KITA) is Korea’s largest business organization, representing over 77,000 member companies. Founded in 1946, KITA promotes global trade and supports the growth of the Korean economy. It represents the interests of the business community while providing practical business support, fostering private-sector trade cooperation, developing trade strategies, nurturing trade professionals, and building trade infrastructure.
Through a strong network of 13 regional centers and 15 overseas centers across three regional divisions, KITA plays a key role in supporting SMEs’ overseas market entry and has contributed to Korea achieving a trade volume of USD 1 trillion.

Softionics Inc. is a deep-tech startup developing Vision-Free Sensing Interface based on electrostatic field detection. Today’s vision-heavy spatial interfaces rely on cameras and LiDARs, which are power-hungry, privacy-sensitive, and limited in occluded or dynamic environments. We address this by introducing PercepXR®—a transparent, ultra-thin film sensor that detects gestures and 3D spatial shapes using ambient electric fields. Unlike conventional vison-base sensors, it enables real-time spatial mapping without light, offering a new sensing bridge for robots and XR systems. Applicable to AR/VR, robotics, and mobility, our goal is to become the sensing infrastructure for Physical AI—where machines understand space without seeing it.

The Korea Tourism Organization (KTO) contributes to national economic development and public welfare through tourism promotion, resource development, industry-related R&D, and the nurturing of tourism professionals.

In line with this mission, “Korea Tourism Scale-up” is a growth acceleration program designed to identify promising tourism startups and help them scale into globally competitive companies through professional and systematic support. Beyond basic assistance, the program aims to strengthen the capacity of K-tourism companies and actively drive their expansion into global markets.

XITST builds Care Intelligence—AI that turns any camera into a real-time health and risk sensor.

Edge Infrastructure use cases are varied and have traditionally been addressed by custom purpose-built appliances (e.g. Telco, Networking, Object Detection).
While these purpose-built appliances can be more efficient (space, power, cost) than general purpose processors, their SW stacks are fractured, containing custom, scaled down SW frameworks that run on resource constrained compute.
Kenyi Technologies is addressing these constraints by leveraging chiplet technology to develop an AI Inferencing enabled Edge Infrastructure Processor with appliance-like efficiency while supporting Cloud Native SW stacks.  
Kenyi will be demonstrating it's solution applied to the VRAN use case at FYFN (Stand 8.0D36.3) and MWC (Booth 2A14).

Developer tools for software‑ and hardware‑defined networking.

Our Network Builder IDE is a comprehensive network‑oriented development environment that enables engineers to design network appliances down to the PCB level, create data‑ and control‑plane software such as custom forwarding logic or alternative routing protocols, and evaluate the developed network functions in a high‑speed native emulator.

We aim to broaden the industry’s interpretation of SDN and NFV by shifting network engineering toward a novel DIY approach, moving beyond the traditional cycle of purchasing and configuring third‑party products through fragmented CLIs or APIs.

Plume is how Internet Service Providers build better connections with their customers. Plume created the world’s first SaaS solution for ISPs. Our subscriber management platform is used by more than 400 ISPs around the world to deepen subscriber loyalty, streamline operations and drive strategic growth. Plume and its OpenSync software offer the only pre-integrated, hardware-independent, cloud-controlled solution that lets service providers use any equipment or devices they want, enabling rapid delivery of new services for smart homes, multiple dwelling units, and small businesses at massive scale. Eutelsat is a global leader in satellite communications, delivering connectivity and broadcast services worldwide. Eutelsat was formed through the combination of the Company and OneWeb in 2023, becoming the first fully integrated GEO-LEO satellite operator with a fleet of 34 Geostationary (GEO) satellites and a Low Earth Orbit (LEO) constellation of more than 600 satellites. Eutelsat addresses the needs of customers in four key verticals of Video, where it distributes around 6,400 television channels, and the high-growth connectivity markets of Mobile Connectivity, Fixed Connectivity, and Government Services. Eutelsat's unique suite of in-orbit assets and ground infrastructure enables it to deliver integrated solutions to meet the needs of global customers. The Company is headquartered in Paris and Eutelsat employs more than 1,600 people across more than 75 countries. Eutelsat is committed to delivering safe, resilient, and environmentally sustainable connectivity to help bridge the digital divide.

Velos IoT delivers secure, scalable global IoT connectivity with its advanced UltimateSIM (UICC/eUICC) technology, offering businesses flexible multi-network access across 200+ countries. Our Connectivity Management Platform simplifies IoT deployments, enabling real-time monitoring, device management, and cost optimization for over 18 million active connections. Trusted by industries such as automotive, asset tracking, smart metering, and logistics, we help organizations scale with tailored solutions that future-proof their IoT strategies. With access to more than 700 networks and proven success in optimizing operations, Velos IoT ensures businesses can reduce complexity, enhance security, and improve decision-making through seamless integration. Our scalable and reliable IoT solutions drive efficiency, reduce costs, and unlock the full potential of connected technologies for enterprises worldwide.

Skylo Technologies is a global Non-Terrestrial Network service provider based in Mountain View, CA, offering a service that allows smartphones, wearables, vehicles, and IoT cellular devices to connect directly over existing satellites. Devices connected over satellite are managed and served by Skylo's commercial NTN vRAN, featuring a 3GPP standards-based cloud-native base station and core. Skylo works with existing satellite operators, network operators, and device makers to provide subscribers an anywhere, anytime connectivity solution between terrestrial and satellite networks. Skylo's focus is on enabling connected services for people outdoors and connected workflows for machines at work across critical industries such as agriculture, maritime, logistics, mining, and others, in addition to mass-market consumer devices. For more information, visit www.skylo.tech.

RugGear® is a leading international developer and manufacturer of rugged mobile phones, smartphones and tablets designed for professional use in extreme safety and working conditions, especially in the Mission Critical area. RugGear's high-end devices support all types of mobile voice and data communication, LTE/private LTE, Google Chrome Enterprise, eMBMS (evolved Multimedia Broadcast Multicast Service) and especially the Mission Critical application Push-to-Talk-over-Cellular (POC or PTToC), which is increasingly replacing traditional PTT solutions such as TETRA in Europe or iDEN in the USA and other regions of the world.

Omobio began in 2011 with a simple belief: if you want to serve operators, you have to build for real-world networks—messy traffic, shifting regulations, fraud that evolves, and customers who never forgive downtime. That philosophy shaped a product journey from roaming and messaging security into a wider portfolio spanning core network, digital, and VAS, strengthened with next-generation technologies like AI/ML, blockchain, and IoT. 

Today, 25+ MNOs rely on Omobio solutions, not because they’re trendy—but because they work under pressure. Omobio entered a new era through a strategic acquisition by Brookstone Capital. Omobio Connect Incorporated was created as the group’s carrier-focused arm—built to operate, deliver, and scale services globally, powered by Omobio’s technology and led by professionals with 20+ years of telecom leadership and delivery experience. 

Omobio Connect is the bridge between proven telecom engineering and carrier-grade execution—so operators can secure revenue, protect customers, and grow with confidence. 

Bigger mission. Operator-grade delivery on a global scale.

We empower app marketers with tools, data, and managed services to make more informed decisions and stay ahead of the competition. 

At the core of AppTweak is Atlas AI, our proprietary deep-learning language model trained on app store data since 2014. This technology, combined with unparalleled support, makes AppTweak the trusted partner for mobile leaders such as Uber, Zynga, and The North Face.

Synergy Design Technology Limited is a  Taiwan-based "solution enabler" specializing in 3GPP-compliant software IP and advanced system integration. The company provides high-performance software for 5G NR, emerging 6G, and Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), supporting cross FR1,FR2 and FR3 bands.

Links Field Networks is a market leader and solution provider for global IOT connectivity. We are a world-leading provider of cellular IoT chips, featuring a highly optimized engine that enables devices to communicate over cellular LTE/5G networks. Our chip portfolio spans low, medium, and high-speed wireless transmission, offering a unique advantage in optimizing the “PPA (Power, Performance, and Area/Cost)” balance. This ensures high performance, low power consumption, and cost-effectiveness to meet diverse needs and withstand harsh operating conditions across a wide range of applications. Our chips form the foundation of the IoT ecosystem, enabling physical objects such as smart meters, vehicles, and industrial devices to exchange data seamlessly. Moreover, our chip portfolio enables devices not only to connect but also to become intelligent, allowing them to gather, process, and exchange information efficiently via Edge-Al and Open CPU technologies. This broad capability unlocks a wide range of applications, from smart sensors, AI toys, and mobile payments to more complex systems such as wearables, connected vehicles, and industrial automation.

Since 2001, NetSTAR has been the global leader in OEM integrated solutions for URL, IP Address, Web Application categorization, and threat intelligence. 

NetSTAR’s versatile family of technologies categorizes over 48 billion URLs across 200+ categories, giving OEM partners visibility into the ever-changing internet landscape. NetSTAR captures & analyzes web content telemetry data from over 1.8 billion endpoints via a 5th-generation dynamic categorization system, which includes hundreds of content analysis engines, dozens of malware scan/detection engines, real-time proxy avoidance detection, support for more than 200 languages, and human review.

Opencode Systems is a telecommunications solutions provider, dedicated to open systems for any Generation and Telco-over-Cloud single- or multi-tenant mobile networks. Our patented and specialized converged services, multi-channel core network technology, Network Browser & Studio, remote SIM provisioning (eSIM RSP), is invisible to consumers but underlies many of the mobile services they use. 
Built on-top of that technology, Opencode iSDP is the Super Telecom Application Server (Super TAS) running safely hundreds of complex, network applications while radically reducing development, go-live and operation cost. 
Opencode iSDP is the market leading service delivery platform and preferred choice for the open and creative mobile network.

Aria is the only AI-powered, cloud-native billing and monetization platform designed for the scale, complexity, and speed required by today’s Communication Service Providers (CSPs). By combining real-time intelligence with unmatched flexibility, Aria empowers CSPs to rapidly deploy, optimize, and evolve any monetization model - unlocking new revenue streams while delivering smarter, more responsive customer experiences.

Liberty Global is a dynamic team of operators and investors generating and delivering shareholder value through the strategic management of three platforms — Liberty Telecom, Liberty Growth and Liberty Services. Liberty Telecom is a world leader in converged broadband, video and mobile communications services, delivering next-generation products through advanced fibre and 5G networks. It provides approximately 80 million connections through some of Europe’s best-known consumer brands, including Virgin Media-O2 in the UK, VodafoneZiggo in The Netherlands, Telenet in Belgium, and Virgin Media in Ireland. Liberty Growth invests, grows and rotates capital into scalable businesses across the technology, media/content, sports and infrastructure industries with a portfolio of approximately 70 companies and various funds, including stakes in companies like ITV, Televisa Univision, Plume, EdgeConneX and AtlasEdge, as well as our controlling interest in the Formula E racing series. Liberty Services delivers innovative technology and finance services, generating approximately $600 million in revenue.

Beyond Now is a fast-growing provider of AI-powered ecosystem orchestration and digital platforms, helping you harness advanced technologies and partner ecosystems to drive growth and innovation.

Vantage Towers is one of Europe’s leading tower companies, creating better connections in an increasingly digital world. With around 88,000 towers across 10 markets, we accelerate the digitisation of communities by connecting people, businesses, and Internet-enabled devices. We combine the scale, stability, and quality of Europe’s leading tower network with the agility, optimism, and energy of a start-up. Inspired by past successes and future opportunities, we provide the infrastructure for a digital world where mobile phones, wearable technology, and IoT devices coexist. Our networks enable hundreds of thousands of devices to connect within a single kilometre. We aim to deliver faster, greener, more reliable, secure, and efficient connectivity for operators, industry, and agriculture, supporting both urban and rural demand. By overcoming network coverage and capacity challenges, our infrastructure and teams ensure solutions that stand the test of time. Together, we drive a sustainably connected Europe and position our markets, customers, and consumers at the forefront of the 5G world.

Ribbon Communications (Nasdaq: RBBN) delivers secure cloud communications and IP and optical networking solutions to service providers, enterprises and critical infrastructure sectors globally. We engage deeply with our customers, helping them modernize their networks for improved competitive positioning and business outcomes in today's smart, always-on and data-hungry world. MobiWire Group is a Sino-French Original Design Manufacturer (ODM) with over 20 years of experience in the telecommunications industry.

Founded in 1995 with Sagem, MobiWire combines French engineering excellence with Chinese industrial efficiency to deliver high-quality mobile phones and Android-connected devices.

In 2018, the Group expanded into the Internet of Things through its subsidiary MobiIoT, offering EMS, ODM, JDM, and OEM services.

Today, MobiWire Group is a fully integrated player, providing end-to-end solutions from design to mass production for a wide range of connected devices. The Group has been ranked among the Top 5 ODMs since 2023.

With major manufacturing facilities in China, a planned European facility in H2 2026, and a sales and project management office in Paris, MobiWire operates globally.

The Group serves multiple sectors, including telecommunications, retail, transportation, banking, government, healthcare, and industrial IoT.

Over the past decade, MobiWire Group has achieved steady growth, generating $700 million in revenue and producing 42 million devices per year.

Our platform ensures that every interaction across data, devices, and people is inherently secure and tamper-proof, empowering businesses to operate with total confidence in an increasingly complex digital landscape. Pairpoint is headquartered in the UK, with offices in London, Lisbon, and Tokyo.

The Research and Innovation Foundation (RIF) is the executive arm of Cyprus’s national Research and Innovation (R&I) policy and the national funding agency for research, technological development, and innovation. Aiming to create a dynamic and competitive ecosystem, strengthen international outreach, and facilitate internationalisation, RIF provides targeted R&I investments and funding instruments, as well as value-added services in knowledge transfer, capacity building, and innovation support for startups and the wider national R&I ecosystem. Our vision is to strengthen Cyprus’s research and innovation ecosystem, enhance international competitiveness, and contribute to sustainable economic and societal development.

Plug and Play is the leading innovation platform connecting startups, corporations, venture capital firms, universities, and government agencies. Headquartered in Silicon Valley, we're in 50+ locations across five continents. 

We offer corporate innovation programs and help our corporate partners in every stage of their innovation journey, from education to execution. We also organize startup acceleration programs and have built an in-house VC to drive innovation across multiple industries where we've invested in hundreds of successful companies, including Dropbox, Guardant Health, Honey, Lending Club, N26, PayPal, and Rappi. For more information, visit https://www.plugandplaytechcenter.com

EAE Business School is an international business school with over 60 years of experience, focused on educating professionals and leaders prepared to create impact in a constantly evolving global environment. EAE offers practical and innovative education closely connected to real business needs, combining academic knowledge, professional experience and strategic vision. Its global community brings together students, alumni, faculty and companies in a diverse and multicultural ecosystem. At EAE, learning drives progress, talent fuels transformation and people are placed at the center of every project and professional journey.

properties.name@en: Autoritat Catalana de Protecció de D...
properties.description@en: The Catalan Data Protection Authority is an independent public body that ensures the protection of personal data rights and the right of access to information within public entities and private organizations performing public functions. We provide guidance on how these rights can be exercised. We also advise on the obligations established by data protection legislation and monitor compliance by the relevant entities. In this context, we work on the development of tools for trustworthy AI, such as the Catalan FRIA Model, which has recently been presented internationally as a pioneering methodology for fundamental rights impact assessments.

UK Telecom Distribution Limited | Holiday eSIM Wholesale

UK Telecom Distribution Limited is a leading European eSIM aggregator delivering reliable global connectivity for eSIM wholesalers, travel eSIM brands, enterprises and IoT innovators.

With over 1 million eSIMs delivered across 200+ countries, we provide the scale, stability and network reach needed to operate globally. We go beyond supply - we work as a long-term connectivity partner.

Our flexible partnership models include robust APIs, white-label solutions and tailored wholesale programmes, enabling partners to achieve margins of up to 60%.

Discover the Basque Startups Ecosystem, a blooming tech entrepreneurship hub with more than 900 active startups with headquarters in the Basque Country, and many others from all over the world interacting with our international programs.

A World-class ecosystem fostering a robust intersection of startups, innovative corporates, Technology and Innovation Network, investors, and the best public support. All this, articulated by a comprehensive entrepreneurship policy supported through the BICs (Business Innovation Centres) and led by Basque Government-Spri and the Provincial Councils.

Both private and public agents are joining forces to boost the best entrepreneurial environment to scale your business.

CaixaBank is the leading financial group in Spain and one of the most significant in Portugal with 21 million customers and the largest commercial network on the peninsula and leadership in digital banking.

CaixaBank is committed to a socially responsible universal banking model, based on trust, quality. Its mission is to contribute to the financial well-being of its clients and to support the progress of society.

At CaixaBank DayOne through our banking service specialized in start-ups, scale-ups and investors we connect the economy of innovation and adapt our range of services to help build the future of innovative companies.

València Innovation Capital is the initiative of the city council to promote a dynamic, diverse, and creative city, bringing together all the agents to work on the political and economic transformation towards a sustainable and technologically advanced future through public-private collaboration.
Valencia Innovation Capital focuses on innovative policies that promote the digitalization of the city and drive prosperous socio-economic development by the attraction and retention of talent to pursue the successes of the innovative entrepreneurial ecosystem in Valencia.

Tech Barcelona is a private non-profit association that supports and catalyzes Barcelona’s digital and technological ecosystem, the premier tech hotspot of Southern Europe. We represent more than 1,400 members and over 100 partners, leading players in its sector.

It promotes innovation, internationalisation, trade and funding of Catalan companies and startups. In addition, it offers specialised one-stop-shop services to international investors and corporations, attracting foreign direct investment to Barcelona and Catalonia. Headquartered in Barcelona, Catalonia Trade & Investment operates from 40 offices around the world, covering over 100 markets.

The Brazilian Trade and Investment Promotion Agency (ApexBrasil) works to promote Brazilian products and services abroad and attract foreign investments to strategic sectors of the Brazilian economy and, in this capacity, acts in partnership with the trade and investment promotion offices of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs around the world, such as the one in the Consulate General of Brazil in Barcelona.

B10SEC is a cybersecurity company specialising in continuous monitoring, risk intelligence and digital resilience. With more than 2,500 e‑commerces analysed, all with a critical Risk Score, B10SEC helps organisations transform real risk into strategic decisions. With operations in Portugal, Brazil and the United Kingdom, and expanding into the United States, the company combines expert consultancy with advanced technology to protect and strengthen digital infrastructures.

AI Infinity is a full-service AI company delivering personalized automation, integrations, and intelligent agents designed to transform business operations. We don't build platforms or sell tools, we assemble dedicated squads of AI experts who work as extensions of your team to optimize processes, reduce operational costs, and support strategic decision-making. We partner with enterprise leaders to achieve measurable results: up to 40% reduction in operational costs, automation of millions of interactions while maintaining human touch, and seamless integration with existing systems.

Openi is a financial infrastructure fintech that helps companies automate, reconcile and organize complex financial operations. The platform integrates Open Banking data, payment flows, fiscal documents and crypto assets into a single structured layer, enabling real-time reconciliation, auditability and operational intelligence.

Designed for mid-market and enterprise clients, Openi supports use cases such as large-scale financial reconciliation, accounting automation, compliance and crypto-related cross-border operations. The company works with organizations in healthcare, education, mobility and financial services, and is expanding internationally through global innovation programs and strategic partnerships.
