Intelligent Monitoring - enhance safety and drive operational excellence.
Brazilian startup building energy-efficient IoT tracking solutions.

To position Hong Kong as a leading I&T hub, the Hong Kong Trade Development Council (HKTDC) and the Hong Kong Science and Technology Parks Corporation (HKSTP) have joined forces to co-organise the Hong Kong Tech Pavilion (Stand 6E44 & Stand 8.1B31). Join us to discover cutting-edge solutions and innovative products that highlight Hong Kong's commitment to technological advancement and global collaboration.
For more information, please visit: https://bit.ly/MWC2026HKTech

HairCoSys pioneers hair care with its AI-driven “Bloomtastic” system, using a portable microscope to identify over 10 scalp issues, deliver instant analysis, and provide personalized recommendations, boosting sales and customer loyalty for multiple hair care brands.

BWSea is an aquaculture tech venture that brings intelligence and data-driven science into the industry traditionally relies on experienced-base and manual processes and tools. As global demand for high-quality aquatic food grows, BWSea’s mission is to make aquaculture simple and sustainable. 

Aquaculture industry is challenged by diseases outbreaks and worsened by climate change. BWSea resolves this by innovative technologies of advanced AI‑powered disease prediction system, modular mariculture deployment platforms, and genetic optimization solutions to enable farmers to increase yield, reduce environmental impact, improve biosecurity and climate adaptation.

Why us? Our technology delivers powerful predictive insights with simplicity to improve productivity.

Vista Innotech (VIT) is a pioneer of next‑generation mobile imaging. As a proud member of CityU Tech300 and Hong Kong Science Park’s Acceleration Program, we deliver breakthrough Optical Image Stabilizer (OIS) solutions—Micro Gimbal Stabilizer (MGS), periscope OIS, and advanced OIS software. Our ultra‑compact modules combine sharp performance with unbeatable cost‑efficiency, empowering smartphones and mobile devices to capture crystal‑clear photos even in low‑light or motion. With 120+ patents and 30+ global awards, including CES 2025 Innovation Awards, VIT leads camera innovation. We invite manufacturing partners, tele‑lens and mobile device makers, and venture capital to meet us at MWC 2026.

KNQ Technology (KNQ), founded in 2022 and based in Hong Kong, is an AIGC company specializing in multimodal large model applications. Our core solutions include AI commentary, automated editing, and sponsorship management. We have served major events such as the Asian Games and the Saudi Super Cup.

Our vision is to make every event “heard, seen, and monetized,” by enhancing content efficiency and viewing experiences through AI..

The world of cryptocurrency and blockchain is fragmented, complex, and hard to operate reliably. Tribulnation builds unified tools and software to simplify managing crypto across exchanges and blockchains.

Our flagship crypto aggregator provides a centralized platform to track assets, compare rates and fees, and automate trading strategies. The aggregator helps you make profits, reduce risks, and stay compliant with tax requirements.

The platform is powered by our SDKs, offering consistent access across exchange APIs and blockchain protocols. We test our tools with our own capital, ensuring our software is trust-worthy and tested under real-world risk.

Napptilus is a disruptive tech company for what’s next. Tailoring solutions that tackle critical challenges and drive innovation. Our multidisciplinary team of engineers, designers, and entrepreneurs pioneers cutting-edge technologies—from AI to quantum computing—creating real-world impact. Through Napptilus Labs, we specialize in creating and developing deeptech startups, transforming groundbreaking ideas into market-ready solutions. Fueled by a commitment to excellence, we see every challenge as an opportunity to push boundaries and redefine possibilities. By investing in R&D and collaborating with clients at every step—from concept to production—we turn vision into reality.

Wattium develops high-power, NaFeC (non-lithium) stationary batteries engineered for grid stability and power-dominant services. Its proprietary bipolar architecture enables 12C performance, ultra-fast cycling, and 30,000+ cycle life.

Unlike conventional multi-hour storage lithium batteries, Wattium supports critical grid functions such as synthetic inertia, fast frequency response, and grid-forming operation—helping utilities and large energy users build more stable, resilient power systems.

AI for the Real World. Our platform of AI agents manage everything that happens inside a building. From maintenance claims to rent recoveries to lead management. We are here to change the future of property management and enable buildings to run autonomously through AI agents.

Welcome to NappAI, at the forefront of innovative AI solutions. We understand AI’s pivotal role in shaping the business future. Our solutions empower companies to streamline and automate internal processes with minimal effort and reduced costs, significantly boosting productive capacity. Our user-friendly orchestrator leverages intuitive "flows" to manage operations seamlessly. With effortless integration, smart data understanding, and collaborative capabilities, our platform redefines efficiency. Join us at 4YFN to discover how NappAI enables companies to harness intelligent agents, drive productivity, and unlock creativity in the era of intelligent automation.

Hypergraph modernizes Network Intrusion Detection by using Graph Neural Networks to analyze the relationships hidden in network traffic. Instead of treating events as isolated logs or flow records, we model traffic in its natural graph form, capturing interactions between IPs, services, and communication patterns over time. This relational approach enables earlier and more reliable detection of complex threats that signature-based tools miss, and improves robustness compared to traditional ML models that rely on individual features. Hypergraph delivers scalable, automated detection designed for real-world networks, helping security teams reduce false positives and respond faster with high-confidence alerts.

Magnetika creates wireless power transfer solutions through magnetic resonant coupling, with a patented technology that enables flexible, safe and high efficient energy transfer. As a result we offer charging solutions for electric mobility, robotics, drones and consumer electronics. Several companies have shown interest in this technology to use it for charging their vehicles and devices.

We are a research-driven security company committed to the core philosophy that security begins with privacy. We recognize that the smartphone is the central, yet dangerously neglected, piece of modern digital life, creating a massive, vulnerable target for cybercriminals. Our mission is to democratize complete mobile cybersecurity for individuals. Through our netSamurai mobile application, we aim to overcome the fragmented state of mobile security by delivering a powerful, unified, all-in-one defense system. This solution combines proactive privacy protections with intelligent threat defense, giving everyone a simple and effective way to shield their digital life.

Helix is a preventive health platform that helps people understand and optimize their biological aging through real biological data. Using AI models trained on epigenetic clocks and advanced biomarkers, Helix estimates both biological age and aging rate, offering a dynamic, science-based view of long-term health. From these insights, the platform generates personalized lifestyle recommendations—covering nutrition, physical activity, recovery, and stress management—while explaining the biological rationale behind each one. Helix transforms cutting-edge longevity science into continuous, actionable guidance for healthier living.

BeChallenge is a technology company that builds AI-powered enterprise solutions to assess, develop and activate human skills. Through its SkillsTracker platform, organizations gain real-time insights into skills, personalize development through micro-challenges, and make better talent and workforce decisions aligned with business performance and future skills needs. Come on and visit us!

Arboleda Intelligence is a space and defense technology company focused on the design and development of next-generation aerospace and defense systems for European institutional and military stakeholders.

In 2026, the company is presenting its new defense product at 4YFN, a high-speed fighter drone designed for urban operations and air superiority missions. The platform is engineered to operate in complex city environments, providing rapid response, tactical dominance, and advanced situational awareness for modern defense scenarios.

Beyond Reality AR is a Spanish deep-tech startup building augmented reality solutions for automated manufacturing and large warehouse logistics. We bring real-time operational data from ERP/MES/WMS/IIoT directly into workers’ field of view, enabling faster decisions and fewer errors without relying on handheld devices or fixed screens. Our approach combines proprietary industrial AR hardware with modular software that integrates into existing systems and is tailored to each workflow. The result is a practical, scalable solution designed for fleet deployment, improving productivity, traceability, and operational execution on the shop floor and in warehouses.

Surgery can cure epilepsy—but only if diagnosis gets it right.
BrainFocus develops medical software to improve the pre-surgical evaluation of drug-resistant epilepsy. While surgery can be curative, access remains limited due to slow, manual, and fragmented diagnostic workflows. BrainFocus addresses this gap with BrainFocus iEEG, its first product: an intuitive, scalable platform that integrates multimodal brain data into a single 3D environment to support faster and more consistent clinical decision-making. Founded by experts with 15+ years of research at UPC and UPF, BrainFocus is building a next-generation neurotechnology platform to improve outcomes worldwide.

Boomerang Intelligence is the most efficient recruiting platform for finding the ideal candidate, combining advanced technology with top-tier recruitment talent.

We work with the largest network of elite freelance recruiters in Spain and apply Artificial Intelligence at every stage of the process to maximize accuracy and speed. For each role, Boomerang Intelligence assigns the three recruiters best suited to the profile, selected through our proprietary AI-driven algorithm.

Thanks to our revolutionary technology and methodology, we are the only platform capable of guaranteeing the presentation of the ideal candidate in just 10 days.

Drimer is an AI-powered productivity platform for travel agencies and tour operators. It transforms hours of manual work into minutes by enabling agents to create personalized, bookable travel proposals instantly. By automating supplier data, itineraries, and post-booking communication, Drimer helps agencies generate more quotes, improve conversion rates, and increase revenue without growing their teams. Drimer turns travel agents into high-performance sellers, powered by real, applied artificial intelligence.

Eleva AI is an on-site visitor interaction platform for high-traffic physical spaces (shopping malls, outlets, airports, stadiums).
It combines real-time assistance, revenue activation, and data intelligence—all through a natural conversational experience. No app required.
The first passive grenade. Pull the ring to activate sound, video and GPS alarm.

eScribAI is a LegalTech SaaS platform that helps European law firms and legal departments automate legal work through domain-specific AI. It combines legal search, document analysis, workflows and knowledge management in a secure, compliant environment designed for European regulation and data sovereignty.

InRoom is a smart guest communication platform for hotels and accommodations. It automates guest interactions via WhatsApp, enhances engagement and loyalty, and helps reception teams save time while delivering a more personalized, efficient, and human guest experience.

ETBO is a science-based HR Tech Team Operating System that helps organizations design, understand, and scale high-impact teams. Born from academic research in organizational psychology and enhanced by data, AI, and new ways of working. ETBO transforms observable team behaviors into actionable insights. Through advanced diagnostics, intelligent role mapping, and continuous team pulse checks, ETBO enables leaders to move from managing people to engineering collaboration. In a technology-driven world, ETBO embeds the human layer into digital systems—turning teams into measurable, adaptive, and future-ready units.

Vericta is an AI-powered media verification platform that enables organizations to distinguish authentic human-created content from AI-generated or manipulated images, video, and audio. 

Designed for high-risk digital environments, Vericta delivers scalable, multimodal detection through a user-friendly interface and a developer-friendly API supporting fraud prevention, identity verification, insurance claims, media authentication, and compliance workflows. 

Its continuously evolving models adapt to the fast pace of generative AI, helping enterprises mitigate emerging risks, protect brand trust, and meet regulatory expectations.

MAPPA acts as the external sustainability department for industrial companies. 

Through a digital SaaS platform, it enables organizations to measure, report, and reduce climate impact across the entire value chain, from operations to products. MAPPA supports regulatory compliance and digital product passports, providing precise, automated, and auditable sustainability data. 

By combining technology with expert guidance, MAPPA helps industrial companies transform sustainability management from a regulatory burden into a strategic business capability that drives efficiency, transparency, and long-term value creation.

Digitalizing the sports industry through an IoT + SaaS ecosystem that maximizes safety, operational efficiency, and user retention. Through its ecosystem, Lizcore aims to lead a $4B market with the first "all-in-one" intelligent solution: patented hardware and software. We solve the sector's critical pain points: civil liability, user safety, and churn (through gamification). Following the validation of our R&D, in 2026 we are launching our commercial deployment in Spain, the UK, Italy, and Mexico, scaling as the global operational standard for modern climbing gyms.

Foxtery is an AI-powered corporate training platform that transforms company documents into interactive SCORM courses in 30 minutes instead of 20-40 hours. We serve enterprise and medium-sized B2B companies. L&D and HR teams use Foxtery to train Sales Enablement, Customer Success, and other departments faster. Our AI turns PDFs, videos, and internal documents into structured training instantly. Clients created 1,000+ courses, saving thousands of hours on content production. Enterprise client Perk expanded organically from Customer Care to Sales to Marketing departments. Based in Barcelona, backed by S16 VC. Target markets: tech, professional services, complex B2B where product knowledge drives revenue.

ATENEA is a Generative AI-powered voice assistant designed for elderly people, offering proactive care, emergency response, and autonomy—bridging the digital divide and reducing loneliness. No buttons— by a voice conversation everything is possible. Available as a tablet and smartwatch, ATENEA combines natural voice interaction with sensor-based alerts to support health, safety, and social needs. Integrated with healthcare and social services. The project was funded with €3,000,000 from Next Generation EU, managed by the Ministry of Social Rights and Inclusion of the Government of Catalonia. ATENEA is currently deployed to 500 users across Catalonia.

Your AI for smart investments.

Pro1X AI is an artificial intelligence solution available as an app and web platform that supports investors and traders by turning complex financial data into clear, easy-to-execute decisions. It offers a global real-time portfolio covering stocks, currencies, commodities, cryptocurrencies, and ETFs, helping users optimize strategies and maximize returns without requiring advanced knowledge.

It also provides instant access to detailed financial information, powerful algorithms to improve decision-making, and the ability to replicate top traders’ strategies with full customization—making investing safer, more efficient, and highly profitable.

Available on the App Store, Google Play, and at Pro1X.com

Outrigo is a deep‑tech company building OASYS, a decision‑orchestration platform for critical and high‑consequence engineering. OASYS captures, structures and operationalizes engineering decisions across tools and teams, improving traceability, reducing redesign cycles and lowering qualification risk. The platform complements existing simulation and CAE software by focusing on decision logic rather than replacing solvers. Outrigo initially targets regulated industries such as aerospace, defense, automotive, energy and advanced manufacturing, where engineering decisions directly impact safety, certification, cost and time‑to‑market. Starting with critical workflows, Outrigo is building a scalable enterprise platform embedded in core engineering processes.

We believe that everyone has the right to control their online presence.
We envision a future where both individuals and businesses can actively manage their online reputation, minimizing negative content.

We are confident that online reputation management will become increasingly essential in an increasingly connected world, where digital presence holds growing significance.

That's why we search for and remove harmful content—to protect and enhance online reputations.

Qbind is a comprehensive platform enabling brokers and MGAs to streamline “quote-to-policy” processes, billing, claims and distribution. Our unified, flexible system integrates modern APIs and leverages AI-driven insights to enhance visibility, simplify operations and scale with evolving business needs.

Smart Clothing solution that integrates miniaturized electronics, 5G connectivity, and blockchain technology to enable seamless interaction between workers, machines, and the industrial environment.

It delivers predictive alerts for machine dowtimes and safety risks without compromising user comfort or workflow. TTDo boosts operational efficiency, reduces workplace accidents, and empowers people through digital transformation towards a safer, smarter, and more connected Industry 5.0.

QuantumKnowledge is an enterprise-grade security and compliance infrastructure for controlled and traceable document exchange. The platform enables organizations to securely share sensitive data using role-based access, NDA enforcement, and expiring links. Every download generates a digital acknowledgment receipt, providing audit-ready proof of access, legal acceptance, and traceability through cryptographic hashing and watermarking.
QuantumKnowledge is already live and actively used by beta users in real-world compliance scenarios. Built as a trust layer for enterprise data exchange, the platform is expanding to include blockchain-based traceability and future AI-driven capabilities to strengthen governance, risk detection, and compliance intelligence at scale.

TrueData certifies any user data directly from its original online source in under 30 seconds, without integrations or dedicated infrastructure. 
By leveraging standard HTTPS connections, users generate tamper-resistant proofs from trusted websites and applications, ensuring data cannot be manipulated. Organizations can verify specific facts—such as identity, income, purchasing history, or digital interactions—while sharing only the minimum data required and fully complying with GDPR.

TrueData offers two core products. 1) TrueMe enables self-reported data verification for fintech, real estate, and govtech use cases. 2) TrueSocial provides court-ready verification of digital conversations and social media content for legal and forensic applications.

NIDDO is a mobile app that brings order, clarity and calm to shared parenting.
Built for separated, blended and co-parenting families, the app centralises schedules, expenses, key child information and responsible communication in one secure place.
NIDDO reduces conflict and mental overload between adults, helping parents collaborate better and protecting children’s wellbeing.
The app also connects with lawyers, mediators and psychologists, adding traceability and transparency to family processes.
Technology with impact, designed to make modern families work better.

WAIIS is a smart mobility platform that connects passengers and drivers (private individuals and taxi/ride-hailing services) to share daily and on-demand commutes. It uses AI and mobility footprint analysis to create routines, improve matching, and reduce costs and emissions.

AdMotion.ai is an AI-powered SaaS platform that automates and optimizes digital advertising by transforming static product catalogs into high-performing dynamic creatives. By leveraging real-time data and automated design, it helps e-commerce brands and agencies maximize ROAS while drastically reducing manual production costs and time.

In WiPass we turn spaces into "Smart Business" with a device that allows access to the digital universe of businesses such as Hotels, Coworkings, Restaurants and sectors such as health, mobility and transportation or public spaces, allowing companies to optimize their spaces and improve the user experience of their customers.

Techwich is an AI-powered learning platform that personalizes education by combining multi-source data—learner signals (goals, skills, pace, preferences), behavioral and performance data, and contextual/environmental data—and, where available and consented, health-related signals that can impact learning. This fusion enables adaptive content, smarter recommendations, and measurable progress for individuals and organizations.

Watlas is a climate and sustainability company focused on intelligent urban biowaste management. We provide Compost as a Service, combining low-emission logistics, end-to-end traceability and proprietary software to transform food waste into premium, locally produced compost. Our model reduces landfill dependency, cuts emissions and returns organic matter to depleted soils. We work with companies, events and communities, delivering measurable environmental impact while enabling responsible consumption and production at city scale.

Volum Technologies (also known as Volum) is a deep-tech company specializing in real-time holoportation and immersive 3D communication. Officially launched in July 2025 as a spin-off from the i2CAT Research Center, Volum focuses on democratizing holographic presence by making high-quality, real-time 3D capture accessible using standard commercial cameras. Volum’s mission is to redefine digital interaction by replacing flat, 2D video calls with fully immersive, volumetric 3D telepresence. Unlike traditional high-end holographic systems that require expensive, studio-grade setups, Volum aims to make holoportation scalable and accessible for businesses and institutions by leveraging standard, mid-range depth cameras and advanced proprietary algorithms.

It promotes innovation, internationalisation, trade and funding of Catalan companies and startups. In addition, it offers specialised one-stop-shop services to international investors and corporations, attracting foreign direct investment to Barcelona and Catalonia. Headquartered in Barcelona, Catalonia Trade & Investment operates from 40 offices around the world, covering over 100 markets.

hubraum is Deutsche Telekom’s tech incubator. By bringing startups, developers, ecosystem partners and Deutsche Telekom together, hubraum sparks innovation transfer and creates business opportunities for all sides. Since 2012, hubraum has been collaborating with the digital ecosystem from its campuses in Berlin and Krakow. hubraum offers incubation programs, co-creation, unique access to Deutsche Telekom’s networks and technologies, an expert network and free coworking space. 
We are bringing a top-class selection of 10 groundbreaking startups to Barcelona presenting insights into their business, technologies, structure, outlook, and more from areas like AI, Network Management & Security, Quantum Tech and beyond.

Clone Your Warehouse and Talk to It with AI!

We help businesses, network operators, and manufacturers create REAL digital twin platforms in data centers, server rooms, and industrial environments for automated inventory and asset management.

DeepKeep delivers end-to-end AI security and trustworthiness across the full AI lifecycle. Built with generative AI at its core, the platform protects both large language model and computer vision systems, keeping pace with AI’s rapid innovation. Its key capabilities include an AI Firewall, AI Usage Control, Agentic AI Security, Automated AI Red Teaming, and advanced Model Scanning. Cybersecurity teams worldwide use DeepKeep’s AI Security Platform to secure AI agents, employee AI use, and homegrown AI applications.

QuantiCor Security, based in Darmstadt, is a pioneer in quantum-safe cybersecurity. Its award-winning platform PQVault enables future-proof protection of applications, documents, and sensitive data without technical expertise. Through a partnership with Deutsche Telekom Security, QuantiCor launched PQ-InfraProtect, allowing transparent migration to quantum-safe security across applications and communication channels. The company delivers quantum-safe solutions for networks, cloud environments, secure communications, and key management. Selected references include ESA, Deutsche Bahn, Aurubis AG, HIMA, TU Berlin, and Deutsche Telekom. QuantiCor has received multiple awards, including the IT Security Award,Embedded World Award, and the main prize at the German Startup Competition for Digital Innovations

Smarobix provides an AI-driven software that enables engineers in building distributed, high-performance robotic systems for Physical AI. Based on joint research in AI-driven optimization and hardware-aware code generation, we reduce the integration complexity when aligning software and hardware by combining system analysis, validation, optimization, and deployment directly in tools like VS Code. Our innovative model-backed approach adapts to different middlewares and changing requirements, replacing manual integration jobs with a reproducible, agentic engineering workflow.

FloodWaive is a DeepTech startup revolutionizing flood risk management through Physics-Informed AI. Born as a spin-off from RWTH Aachen University, we bridge the critical gap between speed and precision in disaster forecasting.

We are combining high-resolution hydrodynamic simulations with state-of-the-art Deep Learning. Our core technology, DeepWaive, delivers street-level flood forecasts and dynamic risk analyses in seconds—not hours.

We empower cities, municipalities, and businesses to transition from reactive responses to proactive climate resilience. By providing instant, data-driven insights into rainfall impacts and flood scenarios, FloodWaive helps stakeholders safeguard critical infrastructure, minimize economic loss, and ultimately save lives.

At Hapticlabs, we bring the sense of touch to the digital world. Our platform makes it easy to design immersive and accessible haptic experiences for everything from mobile apps to cars and wearables. Together with Hubraum, we’re redefining sports streaming by turning live game events into tactile sensations you can feel right in your hands.

ZeroMissed is an AI Intake Specialist designed for privacy-conscious professionals who can't afford to miss a lead. Unlike standard answering services, we offer a privacy-first architecture that automates client intake—screening callers, capturing case details, and booking appointments while you work. We’re currently deploying with legal professionals in the EU and US, where we’ve already helped a solo attorney recover a €10,000 case that would have otherwise gone to a competitor. It’s like having an intake team, at a fraction of the cost.

Syntho brings all synthetic data generation methods into one single engine, including: Synthetic Data Masking, Rule-Based Synthetic Data and AI-Generated Synthetic Data.

By doing so, we enable you to configure your data with the exact method or combination of methods your use case requires, so you always get accurate, privacy-preserving, and production-like outputs. Because every approach lives in a single platform, you can respond faster to changing requirements, scale without adding new tools, and consistently deliver the right data for every project.

Korea ICT Association(KICTA) is a nonprofit organization established to promote the growth and development of the ICT industry. Its primary mission is to support small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in the ICT sector by providing assistance for marketing and international expansion. At MWC 2025, companies in the KICTA pavilion, including those from 4YFN, will showcase innovative new technologies, presenting cutting-edge solutions and advancements across areas such as the communications ecosystem, AI, blockchain, fintech, and mobility.
Virtue AI sets the standard for advanced AI security platforms: safeguarding agents, models, and apps with automated red teaming, real-time guardrails, and systematic governance.

QSIMPLUS delivers integrated quantum communication solutions combining advanced software and miniaturized hardware. With deep expertise in quantum theory and engineering, we provide practical, plug-and-play systems optimized for secure and scalable deployment. Our services are quantum technology educational software, compact QKD hardware with network operation software, and integrated solutions for both fiber-based and free-space quantum communication. QSIMPLUS accelerates the real-world adoption of quantum networks and supports the transition toward the future Quantum Internet.

Raon A&C specializes in spatial sound solutions for various sound-utilizing fields. Our company enhances immersive VR/AR experience by providing AI-powered audio source separation and high-quality spatial sound solutions. Our solutions are available in software form and are optimized for embedded systems, ensuring efficient integration. With many years of practical experience in both defense and civilian sectors, our technical team is equipped to meet diverse needs.

emCT Co., Ltd. makes your space safer and more convenient.
With our innovative mobile facility monitoring service, BDApp, you can respond to incidents faster and manage your building more efficiently.
We support all facility systems including fire, elevator, water tank, HVAC, CCTV, etc.
There's no need to replace your existing facilities. Our service allows you to monitor and control everything from your mobile phone, regardless of the size of your building.
We are creating innovations that save lives.

PLYN by AIgement, Inc. is an AI-native procurement hyperautomation platform built by former consultants from Alvarez & Marsal and EY Consulting. 

It connects ERP and market/supplier data to standardize master data(achieving 95.3% item-classification accuracy on a 10,000-item benchmark) and builds a semantic knowledge base. 

Powered by AI agents, PLYN automates workflows end-to-end, from supplier sourcing and RFQs/quotations to PO issuance, goods receipt, and month-end close, producing evidence-backed, fully traceable outputs. Using 50+ external sources (e.g., Reuters) and supplier risk signals (e.g., Dun & Bradstreet), PLYN has delivered 90%+ reductions in manual work across client deployments

WHATs LAB is a Korea-based XR technology company delivering new interaction experiences through intuitive hand-based hardware and immersive virtual training solutions. 

We develop proprietary hardware and software in-house, focusing on Physical AI, XR virtual training, and digital therapeutics. Our flagship product, Air Glove Atlas, is Korea’s first open-band, glove-type controller that enables realistic hand interaction and high-fidelity motion data capture. 

By integrating wearable hardware with intelligent XR software, WHATs LAB supports healthcare, industrial training, and embodied AI learning, providing scalable and data-driven solutions for training, treatment, and human–machine interaction.

MEMS Corp. is a specialist in MEMS and semiconductor devices based in Gwangju, South Korea. We develop a broad portfolio of MEMS products, including hydrogen gas sensors, and provide foundry services. Our integrated capabilities across design, simulation, process development, and packaging enable rapid development and reliable manufacturing for global customers.

FInInsight provides AI-based data analysis solutions and batch automation services.
InsightPage is an online reputation analysis solution based on unstructured data. It is a service that provides real-time analysis of data online to help you make data-driven decisions. Using ESG, we can evaluate the value of company and Using the index of expertise, trust, communication, and social responsibility, we can do personal online reputation analysis.
InsightStudio is a data analytics pipeline automation and visualization dashboard solution. Using a convenient UI, you can connect the process from data collection to analysis in a single process to perform and manage tasks conveniently.

Decasight have world-class precision AR integration technology for surgical navigation, ensuring patient safety and effective treatment. Unlike existing products, Decasight’s unique optical tracking technology perfectly matches the surgeon’s vision and hand movements to the navigation system, providing sub-millimeter accuracy and unparalleled convenience for AR surgical navigation without the need for prior preparation. We are strategically expanding our business area from educational AR simulators to ENT and orthopedic surgical navigation. Decasight also provides a data collection platform that transforms surgical and procedural processes into digitized data, and provides essential AI/ML assets to companies targeting autonomous surgical robots.

Korea ICT Association(KICTA) is a nonprofit organization established to promote the growth and development of the ICT industry. Its primary mission is to support small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in the ICT sector by providing assistance for marketing and international expansion. At MWC 2025, companies in the KICTA pavilion, including those from 4YFN, will showcase innovative new technologies, presenting cutting-edge solutions and advancements across areas such as the communications ecosystem, AI, blockchain, fintech, and mobility.

MONA provides AI-powered multi-parameter battery inspection solutions for high-reliability quality control at inbound and outbound stages. The system integrates OCV, insulation, impedance (EIS), and LCR measurements to analyze frequency-specific defect signatures, enabling rapid detection of early failures, electrolyte and electrode anomalies, and SOC/SOH deviations within seconds. Mona’s proprietary inspection equipment and AI classification engine seamlessly connect to production lines, logistics workflows, and module/pack assembly processes. Applicable across cell manufacturing, EV supply chains, module and pack production, and service operations, the solution supports process stabilization, defect prevention, and quality variance reduction through extensive field validation and data-driven diagnostics.

CUZ is an immersive media art company developing visual meditation and emotional wellness content through sensory-driven experiences. The company operates a visual meditation platform and expands its applications into digital wellness, silver care, and preventive healthcare across displays and spatial environments.

Innobase Co., Ltd. is a pioneering mobility intelligence leader specializing in AI-driven FMS and integrated IoT platforms. Combining proprietary hardware with advanced SaaS, we provide total fleet management solutions optimizing global asset operations. Our platform captures real-time location, routing, and impact events, transforming data into actionable insights. With AI-powered carbon emission reporting for ESG compliance, we empower safer, more efficient operations. Supporting connectivity in 190+ countries, Innobase offers scalable tools for seamless cross-border management and a sustainable mobility ecosystem.

BLUEDOT is a leading provider of AI‑driven video enhancement and compression solutions. Our enhancement technologies elevate the value of media assets and unlock new revenue opportunities, while our compression capabilities deliver seamless, high‑quality video with substantial savings in delivery and storage. With adaptive, AI-powered, cloud-ready technologies, BLUEDOT offers solutions designed to meet the evolving demands of the media market.

Innobase Co., Ltd. is a pioneering mobility intelligence leader specializing in AI-driven FMS and integrated IoT platforms. Combining proprietary hardware with advanced SaaS, we provide total fleet management solutions optimizing global asset operations. Our platform captures real-time location, routing, and impact events, transforming data into actionable insights. With AI-powered carbon emission reporting for ESG compliance, we empower safer, more efficient operations. Supporting connectivity in 190+ countries, Innobase offers scalable tools for seamless cross-border management and a sustainable mobility ecosystem.

ALLCOM Co., Ltd. (All COM) is a South Korea–based appliance startup delivering “All comfort” through portable, user-centered temperature-control products. Our target customers include baby-care and family users needing safe, consistent drink temperatures, and people in camping, sports, and driving who want reliable hot/cold beverages anywhere. All COM provides cooling and heating with precise target-temperature control to reach and maintain the set point. A detachable, hygienic bottle design simplifies cleaning, while wireless/USB-C charging ensures portability. Our advantage combines performance, hygiene-first design, and a mobile app for recommendations, presets, monitoring, logs, and alerts. The 2026 CES Innovation Award validates differentiation and demand.

MobiFren is a pioneer in digital wellness, introducing "HealingFit," the world's first wearable combining Transcranial Electrical Stimulation (TES) and premium sound therapy. Recognized with the CES 2026 Innovation Award, our technology moves beyond simple health tracking to active digital therapy—improving sleep quality, reducing stress, and enhancing focus. Leveraging 20 years of audio expertise and patented MSTS tuning, we deliver medical-grade effectiveness in a consumer-friendly earphone format. We are seeking strategic partnerships with health platforms, insurers, and wellness brands to redefine the future of mental healthcare. Visit us to experience the next evolution of "Track-to-Treat" technology.

“Hearing the Invisible, Protecting the Invaluable.”
LINSOL originated as an in-house venture of Hanwha Aerospace and has grown into a leading innovator in location tracking and safety solutions.
We are a total safety solutions provider for social and industrial safety powered by AI. Leveraging advanced defense technologies, we develop precision acoustic systems for reliable on-device hazard detection in complex environments. Our technology is applied across industrial safety and healthcare including BR (Blind RFID), an RFID-based medication safety solution for the visually impaired and elderly, as well as safety solutions for industrial vehicles and smart mobility worldwide.

Mobile World Capital Barcelona is a public–private foundation that promotes the digital development of society in order to build a more inclusive, equitable and sustainable future through a human-centred use of technology. MWCapital helps position Barcelona as a global benchmark in the digital sphere and strengthens the legacy of MWC throughout the year by driving initiatives in technology transfer, the promotion of digital talent and innovative technology projects with social impact. MWCapital hosts MWC in Barcelona, founded 4YFN, and connects the international developer community through the Talent Arena project.

Cooling Photonics provides passive cooling solutions that reduce energy consumption, with zero carbon emissions, increasing systems performance whilst decreasing operating costs. Our products, applied on any surface hotter than the ambient, dissipate heat in form of infrared radiation in the most efficient manner, reducing its temperature, even under direct sunlight.

Mobile World Capital Barcelona supports the growth of innovative startups through strategic EU programmes. Scaleup Mobility Programme accelerates 10 high-potential mobility startups through mentoring, investor connections and international visibility.  

NGI Sargasso fosters transatlantic collaboration in Next Generation Internet technologies, supporting EU, US and Canadian innovators working on digital trust, identity, and decentralised internet infrastructure.  

With these programmes, MWCapital fuels cutting-edge innovation, connecting science with business and turning bold ideas into global solutions for society and industry

UniSCool’s green digitalisation transforms data centre cooling with a patented, intelligent direct-to-chip liquid cooling solution for high-density AI-driven workloads. It delivers up to 80% energy savings vs air cooling and up to 50% vs conventional liquid cooling, while supporting up to 2800 W per socket.

UniSCool provides an intelligent, cost-effective solution based on self-adaptive cooling technology that adjusts heat dissipation in time and space to real-time thermal demand, ensuring high temperature uniformity and reliable operation.

UniSCool enables data centres to increase processing capacity and rack power density with lower energy use and reduced footprint, supporting sustainable digital infrastructure.
Our semiconductor gas sensor systems can monitor leaks of hydrogen and related gases (ammonia, methane and hydrogen sulphide) in real time, triangulate leaks and predict maintenance needs.

YPlasma, a spin-off from Spain’s National Institute of Aerospace Technology (INTA), specializes in developing advanced plasma actuators for precise ionic flow control. Their technology addresses applications such as cooling/heating, deicing, disinfection, aerodynamics and electro-stimulation, impacting industries including electronics, energy, automotive, aerospace, agriculture and health. Founded in 2024 and based in Barcelona, with presence in Madrid and Newark (US), The company has been recognized as Catalonia’s Startup of the Year 2024 and is supported by programs like ESA BIC Barcelona, Mobile World Capital, Startup Capital, Google’s Startups for Sustainable Development and HAX/SOSV (Newark).

Jolt manufactures electrodes using proprietary technology for large-scale production of key electrochemical components. It focuses on green hydrogen and water electrolysis, while also developing products for pool chlorination, chlor-alkali, water treatment, etc.

properties.name@en: The Collider, a programme by Mobile ...
properties.description@en: The Collider is a tech transfer programme by Mobile World Capital Barcelona that connects scientific research with entrepreneurial talent to create deep tech startups. It bridges the gap between science and market by guiding projects from opportunity validation to company building, focusing on disruptive technologies. By fostering collaboration between universities, research centres and industry, The Collider accelerates the commercialization of innovative breakthroughs and supports the creation of scalable science based ventures.

Inmersia is a Deep Tech company specialized in the design and development of advanced technologies, spanning optics, photonics, advanced materials and integrated circuits for next-generation augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) solutions. Beyond enhancing existing technologies, Inmersia develops proprietary innovations that enable disruptive breakthroughs in immersive systems. Its advanced near-eye display (NED) system delivers unprecedented levels of immersion, combining wide field of view and exceptional image quality in a compact, lightweight and ergonomic format. This unique capability positions Inmersia at the forefront of XR innovation, with the potential to transform high-growth sectors including consumer electronics, industry, security, defense and automotive.

Tinkery is the automated data transformation platform for SMBs. Most companies struggle with messy CRM data, scattered marketing and sales metrics and manual spreadsheets. Tinkery fixes that. We unify and clean your commercial data automatically, and deliver ready-to-use insights for pipeline, attribution and performance. The result: more time, better decisions, and faster growth.

3Dthinks builds an accessible world through humanist tech. We created TalX, the "accessible WhatsApp" designed for barrier-free communication. Now, we are revolutionizing personal wellness with a non-invasive salivary sensor that monitors multiple hormones without needles. With our hormone sensor multiplatform, we put a lab in your pocket. From inclusive messaging to painless health tracking, we empower independence for everyone.

LOVI.ai: Customer Love Everywhere. The Ai Agents Platform for Customer Service and Sales.

Ai Pilots and POCs are over. ¡Real production starts now!

Seven years of conversational Ai expertise. Trusted by Alcampo, Carrefour, Conforama, ADT, Teka, Siemens, and more.

We build bespoke Ai Agents fine-tuned on your data, delivering genuine Customer Love and measurable ROI across Phone, **ChatGPT, WhatsApp, Instagram… , and Digital Humans. 
Omnichannel. Multilingual. No hallucinations. No OpenAi wrappers.

Proprietary Ai Model Balancer for unmatched accuracy and performance.

Visit our stand. See why enterprise leaders choose LOVI.ai.

HISPlayer is the premium video streaming Player SDK for Unity, Unreal Engine and Meta Spatial SDK games and XR apps. Its technology combines hardware-accelerated media player software with advanced rendering software, creating a unique product that allows the inclusion of premium video streaming inside immersive 3D applications. HISPlayer is available for Android, iOS, WebGL, Windows, MacOS as well as for the most popular VR/AR headsets and AI glasses.
On top of this, our highly skilled team is able to provide excellent customer support and any kind of customization for the most advanced use cases.

ThinRemote: Simple, Secure Remote Access for Any Device

Say goodbye to complex VPNs, exposed ports, and frustrating firewall rules.

ThinRemote lets you instantly access your remote servers, Raspberry Pi, and edge devices. From anywhere, using just your browser. No network headaches, no client software, no security risks.

With a lightweight agent and cloud-managed encrypted tunnels, you get secure SSH access in seconds. Whether you're managing a fleet of IoT devices, running remote experiments, or supporting customers across the globe, ThinRemote gives you developer-grade control with zero hassle.

HealthMate is an AI-powered healthcare software platform designed to automate and optimize clinical operations. Built for clinics and healthcare professionals across multiple specialties, HealthMate reduces administrative workload by managing appointments, reminders, patient communication, and follow-ups through intelligent automation. The platform operates via web and WhatsApp, providing 24/7 virtual assistance for both clinics and patients. By integrating artificial intelligence into everyday clinical workflows, HealthMate helps professionals save time, improve operational efficiency, and enhance the patient experience. Its mission is to enable healthcare teams to focus more on care delivery while AI handles repetitive and time-consuming management tasks.

Coderland is a global technology partner driving innovation through people and collaboration. We help companies scale and digitally transform by delivering flexible IT services, including staff augmentation, custom software development, and quality assurance. Through our Software Talent as a Service model, we connect businesses with highly skilled, cross-functional teams that integrate seamlessly into their workflows. This enables clients to move faster, build better products, and adapt confidently in a rapidly evolving digital environment. Human talent and teamwork are at the core of everything we do, fostering long-term partnerships, empowering teams to thrive, and helping organizations achieve sustainable growth worldwide together.

Nidus Lab is pioneering the integration of Generative AI into real estate development through an enterprise SaaS platform that transforms early-stage project planning and design optimization. Our technology automates and optimizes feasibility studies and architectural design, enabling developers, investment funds, contractors, and architecture studios to evaluate thousands of viable scenarios in minutes. By integrating urban regulations, cost structures, and sustainability metrics from the outset, Nidus dramatically reduces project timelines, lowers risk, and improves decision-making. The platform empowers professionals to deliver more efficient, buildable, and sustainable real estate projects at scale.

NEXIO is an engineering and technology development company based in Aragón, Spain. Founded in 2014, its origins are linked to LED lighting solutions for public spaces and professional environments through its NEXIO Lighting division. Today, the company delivers Industry 4.0 solutions using IoT technologies in enterprises, focused on the digital transformation of industrial production processes and the intelligent management of facilities and infrastructures. The same technological solutions applied within production environments can also be integrated into final products, enabling connected, data-driven services. These solutions are supported by NEXIO’s own IoT platform, developed in collaboration with the Technological Institute of Aragón.

Wipay is an European payments company that provides its customers innovative, best-in-class and secure payment solutions. The solutions developed by Wipay focus on providing a new user experience in payments, in democratising the world of payments and payment management and in offering a wide range of custom products and services to cover all needs. 

Wipay offers an omnichannel payment solution, that allows to complete an end to end payment, with a sole provider. Wipay’s solution is ready for in-store and on-line payment transactions.

From TEKHNE we present MYNA: the first "all-in-one" Wi-Fi HaLow module for IoT devices. 
All in one module, with an integrated antenna and an internal microcontroller to program the application inside.

WiFi HaLow is the IoT wireless standard offering the best combination of range, throughput, density, low-power operation, and best deployment costs, with less Access Points required to cover a given area and no recurring costs for data plans. 

MYNA has been designed in a sustainable way (ISO 14006 ecodesign certified). 
You can test it easily and quickly with our evaluation board, compatible with Raspberry Pi.

Sentimer is web-to-voice Agentic AI for sales. We detect high-intent moments on your website, engage visitors with an Agentic AI web assistant, then hand off in seconds to Agentic AI voice agents running inbound and outbound sales calls end-to-end. 
One continuous conversation across web and phone qualifies leads, handles objections, and drives the next step—purchase, booking, or meeting—reducing drop-off and time-to-close.
Triggered by web behavior and CRM signals, Sentimer boosts conversions and enables optimization of scripts, timing, and channels.
Customized per client and use case—brand voice, policies, and playbooks. Trusted by enterprises and scale-ups across fintech, insurance, ecommerce, and travel.

Zerintia HealthTech is a digital health company specialized in remote clinical collaboration. The company develops 4RemoteHealth, a SaaS platform that enables real-time remote clinical support and medical telepresence through the integration of multiple live video streams from medical devices and clinical imaging systems. Designed for high-complexity clinical environments such as operating rooms, emergency services and ambulances, as well as home care and medical training settings, the platform enables secure access and trusted collaboration. It supports remote expert assistance, clinical decision-making and training, with a strong focus on security, interoperability and flexible deployment.

Bookahospi is an AI-powered platform that enables cross-border healthcare hiring by digitizing credential recognition (homologation), licensing, and visa processes, then matching verified doctors and nurses to hospital vacancies in Spain, Saudi Arabia, France and the UK—cutting time-to-hire and compliance risk.

Spain Pavilion at 4YFN 2026 aggregates startups from all over Spain, an attractive showcase of a dynamic, modern high-tech domestic industry focused on innovation. Publicly sponsored by ICEX Spain Trade and Investment and Red.es. Visit us at 8.1C50 to learn about us, meet the startups and share experiences.

The Generalitat de Catalunya, through the Catalan Institute for Cultural Companies (ICEC), under the Catalan Arts Digital Culture international brand, has organised the Catalan pavilion in 4YFN to strengthen the international visibility of Catalan's start-ups linking art /culture : Estudio Gurugú, Immersive Creatures, Music Tech Hub, Game BCN, My Sheet Music Transcriptions, Playnuzic, Remotto, Vanova, XRoam and Zertifier.

You are invited to join us at our stand on Tuesday 3th for a networking cocktail at 1:15 pm. 

Moreover, this year every day from 11:00a.m to 12:30p.m and from 4:00p.m to 5:30p.m there will be interesting pitches/presentations at the booth.

Mobile World Capital Barcelona is a public–private foundation that promotes the digital development of society in order to build a more inclusive, equitable and sustainable future through a human-centred use of technology. MWCapital helps position Barcelona as a global benchmark in the digital sphere and strengthens the legacy of MWC throughout the year by driving initiatives in technology transfer, the promotion of digital talent and innovative technology projects with social impact. MWCapital hosts MWC in Barcelona, founded 4YFN, and connects the international developer community through the Talent Arena project.

BBVA Spark is the bank for technology companies and venture capital funds. BBVA Spark allows all its customers to cover their financial needs in one place, from the most basic products, such as collections/payments, payroll, cards, etc. to structured financing products, such as venture debt or Asset Backed Lending, adapted to companies already in more advanced stages of development or that already have funds from venture capital investors in their "captable".

Barcelona Supercomputing Center (BSC), Spanish national supercomputing facility, specialised in high-performance computing (HPC) and AI, manages MareNostrum, one of the most powerful supercomputers in Europe. We serve the international scientific community and industry through multidisciplinary research teams and advanced computational facilities. BSC is also a source of business and innovation opportunities through collaboration with industry and the business ecosystem. By accessing BSC’s expertise in HPC and AI, as well as its cutting-edge technologies, companies can address complex challenges and accelerate innovation. BSC also fosters creation of high-tech spin-offs that contribute to the transformation of key business sectors. Booth activities: www.bsc.es/mwc26

MigaLabs is an independent research and engineering lab focused on the Blockchain ecosystem. We design and operate advanced infrastructure, network crawlers, and data indexers to analyze decentralization, network health, staking performance, DeFi composability, and data availability. Our research spans real-time monitoring, risk detection, and in-depth analysis of protocol upgrades and emerging trends. By combining high-quality data, rigorous methodology, and scalable tooling, MigaLabs delivers actionable insights and reliable analytics for developers, researchers, and institutional participants building on blockchain.

Tartabit is excited to introduce new IoT Bridge services – Hyperscaler Cloud Connectivity Service, a game-changer for Hyperscaler Cloud integrations. Our deployment of IoT Bridge and Hyperscaler SDK at the network's edge guarantees secure data transmission, achieving seamless NTN integration, remarkable reductions in cellular data usage and battery consumption. With streamlined IoT-to-Cloud integration, featuring zero-touch provisioning and robust security measures, we significantly lower operational costs. As proud partners with AWS, Microsoft Azure, GCP, and advocates of open-source methods, Tartabit IoT Bridge caters to the diverse needs of enterprises, enhancing value for IoT customers, and unlocking revenue opportunities for CSP/MVNO providers.

Flexus is an AI-first Company Operating System that automates how modern businesses are built, run, and developed. It replaces fragmented tools and manual workflows with a single platform powered by intelligent AI Agents that work together inside one system. Instead of juggling disconnected apps for thinking, sales, marketing, support, and operations, Flexus provides a shared business context where agents collaborate, execute real tasks, and coordinate actions across the company. Designed for solopreneurs and small teams, Flexus helps you move faster without hiring too early, reduce operational complexity, and focus on decisions rather than execution.

YEO Messaging is a secure communications platform built for moments where trust is non-negotiable.

Designed for businesses and individuals who demand privacy and control, YEO protects messages, files, and sensitive content using patented continuous facial recognition, end-to-end encryption, and strict controls that prevent forwarding, screenshots, or data leakage.

Unlike traditional messaging tools, YEO verifies not just the device — but the person viewing the message, continuously and in real time.

Built for high-trust, high-risk communication, YEO keeps conversations exactly where they belong: for your eyes only.

Qila.io, a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) company founded by Sid Ugrankar and Vishal Malhotra, simplifies Web3 adoption for businesses, focusing on blockchain integration. As a brand of SmartCirqls Infotech Pvt. Ltd., Qila provides seamless, secure, and efficient solutions to bridge the gap between complex blockchain technology and real-world applications. Offering platforms like ARK (multi-tenanted) and ARK+ (dedicated), along with the PrivaSea digital wallet, Qila makes Web3 accessible to businesses of all sizes. Competing in the Web3 infrastructure space, Qila stands out with its user-friendly solutions that eliminate high costs and technical complexity, enabling easy and affordable blockchain adoption.

AI & XR solutions to empower businesses.
We are a technology provider specialised in artificial intelligence and immersive technologies, showcasing at MWC advanced AI, AR and VR solutions for training and knowledge transfer.

The House of Code delivers custom mobile, web, and IoT solutions tailored for industries requiring advanced connectivity and system integration. We specialize in building applications that connect seamlessly with hardware and enterprise environments, using protocols like BLE, NFC, and Wi-Fi. Our experience in industrial automation and real-time data processing ensures scalable, secure, and reliable digital ecosystems.

At Redblox AI, we help enterprises move from AI experimentation to real-world impact. We build and deploy end-to-end AI solutions that optimize operations, improve decision-making, and transform customer experiences.

At the core of our offering is Otonomiq AI—our modular, enterprise-ready AI platform that enables businesses to rapidly deploy use-case-driven AI solutions such as predictive analytics, intelligent automation, and generative AI applications without long development cycles.

By combining deep AI engineering expertise with a strong understanding of business workflows, Redblox AI empowers organizations to scale AI faster, smarter, and with measurable ROI.

Dryad is an environmental IoT startup based in Berlin. Its mission is to develop a large-scale IoT network that allows public and private forest owners to monitor, analyze and protect the world’s most at-risk forests. The initial focus is to develop a system for the ultra-early detection of wildfires - Silvanet.

Silvanet detects fires in minutes, even during their early smoldering phase. By providing such drastically improved reaction times, Dryad can help to prevent unwanted wildfires, which cause up to 20% of global CO2 emissions and have a devastating impact on biodiversity, infrastructure, and communities.

Aura develops “breathing” green walls that are able to remove a wide range of unhealthy dangerous pollutants and able to absorb CO2 in closed environments. The almost exclusive use of natural elements guarantees a high sustainability and circularity of the entire life cycle of the product. Aura’s walls are designed to integrate with indoor environments in order to bring various physical and mental benefits to the occupants because of better air quality, the interaction with plants, and the reduction of noises. This solution is energy-efficient and offers important prospects for reducing emissions from large buildings.

Conectio is an HR Tech company that connects people, talent, and companies to create real personal and professional growth. It offers intelligent hiring solutions that help companies reduce time to hire and cost per hire, while increasing cultural and role fit.
Powered by proprietary AI technology, Conectio goes beyond traditional CV screening by analyzing soft skills, culture, personality, and cognitive models, enabling a deep and meaningful match between people, roles, and companies. It combines advanced technology with a premium, human, and approachable service designed for today’s evolving talent landscape.

Marketing and commercialisation partner for deep tech and life sciences.
End-to-end services turning breakthroughs into brands and revenue.

Strategy, brand architecture, fractional CMO, and marketing execution for engineering and science pioneers.

Strategy – Investor/market-ready narratives

Brand – Category-defining identities

Fractional CMO – Leadership without full-time cost

Demand Gen – Data-driven pipelines
