Deep Tech Pillars: Advanced Manufacturing, AI, Life Sciences, Quantum, Fusion, Climate Tech

Pre-product / Pre-Clinical to Phase IV and beyond, we simplify complexity and drive commercial scale.

Esade is a world-leading business school, law school, and executive learning institution. Founded in 1958 in Barcelona, Esade has a longstanding commitment to drive positive and meaningful change in business, entrepreneurship, and society through technology and social innovation.
Esade is an active member of the most prestigious alliances of prominent universities from around the globe, and this nourishes our internationalised approach to teaching. 
Through transformational and personalized learning experiences based on active methodologies and real-life challenges, we aim to create a new generation of leaders who will use their knowledge and integrity to build a more sustainable and better future.

Elve is a leader in high-frequency RF and satellite communication solutions, specializing in compact, high-performance amplifiers for millimeter-wave and terahertz applications. With proprietary manufacturing techniques and expertise in electron emitter technology, Elve produces traveling wave tube (TWT) amplifiers that meet the unique demands of satellite networks, imaging, radar and EW applications.

BeammWave AB are experts in communication solutions for frequencies over 15GHz. The company is developing a solution intended for 5G and 6G, in the form of a digital beamforming IC and radio chip with antenna and associated algorithms. The company's approach with digital beamforming is unique and patented, with the aim of delivering a solution with at least 50% higher performance at a lower cost.

Qonto makes day-to-day banking easier for SMEs and freelancers thanks to an online business account that's combined with invoicing, bookkeeping and spend management tools.

With its innovative product, highly reactive 24/7 customer support and clear pricing, Qonto has become the European leader in its category.

Akamai is the cybersecurity and cloud computing company that powers and protects business online. Our market-leading security solutions, superior threat intelligence, and global operations team provide defense in depth to safeguard enterprise data and applications everywhere. Akamai’s full-stack cloud computing solutions deliver performance and affordability on the world’s most distributed platform. Global enterprises trust Akamai to provide the industry-leading reliability, scale, and expertise they need to grow their business with confidence. Learn more at akamai.com and akamai.com/blog, or follow Akamai Technologies on X and LinkedIn.

Ibtikar (“Innovation” in Arabic) is a venture capital firm investing in innovative companies founded by Palestinian entrepreneurs. We manage Ibtikar Fund I (USD 10.35M) and Fund II (USD 25M), funding tech and tech-enabled startups from Seed to Series A. We back scalable businesses with strong regional or global potential, providing hands-on guidance and leveraging our network of investors and partners. Ibtikar values collaboration with co-investors and support organizations. While profitability drives our strategy, we are committed to responsible investment, integrating ESG considerations to foster sustainable growth and mitigate future risks.

DataQueue delivers an end-to-end conversational AI platform that brings together everything traditional voice bot platforms lack and everything CCaaS alone can’t provide; Dialectical AI, telephony, deep integrations, omnichannel engagement, and secure enterprise deployment in one place. The platform offers AI voice agents, advanced speech analytics, AI Copilot that assists human agents in real time, knowledge retrieval, automated call summaries, performance insights and more.  (www.dataqueue.ai)

MilkStraw AI is a cloud cost optimization platform that helps companies understand and reduce their cloud expenses.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Customers connect their AWS account . MilkStraw securely analyzes their usage with read-only access, identifies savings opportunities, and applies them.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  No engineering work needed. No risks.  No downtime and no commitment

Sellenvo is an AI-powered online marketplace connector built to help sellers Sell Everywhere. It connects marketplaces, webstores, and fulfillment systems into one unified platform, removing the complexity of multi-channel selling. With Sellenvo, businesses can create, fix, and publish product listings, sync inventory and orders in real time, and maintain consistent, compliant product data across all channels. Designed for medium to large sellers, Sellenvo enables faster expansion, fewer errors, and complete operational visibility across Amazon, Shopify, eBay, Walmart, TikTok, and more. It acts as the central hub that powers scalable, future-ready e-commerce growth.

GoMake is an AI-driven platform designed to digitize a manufacturer’s production "DNA". By mapping machines, materials, and labor, it breaks the internal knowledge barrier, allowing teams to generate optimized workflows and accurate quotes in minutes. The system functions as a central hub, managing the job lifecycle from Frontdesk AI intake to real-time production floor tracking and automated inventory. GoMake transitions shops from expert-dependent guessing to a data-driven process that ensures every run is quoted and produced profitably.

Mental is an immersive training and certification platform that blends game design with rigorous science to make compliance and vocational learning engaging, measurable, and scalable. Built in Abu Dhabi and already adopted by leading enterprises and regulators, Mental delivers bite-sized courses through web, mobile, and XR—supported by an integrated LMS, proctored exams, certificate issuance, and analytics. Our flagship product, FoodStars, turns food-safety standards into a mission-based experience, accelerating completion and retention while reducing delivery costs with AI-powered localization and content tools. With recurring SaaS revenue and deployment across markets, Mental helps organizations train at scale and prove competence—consistent and audit-ready.

Quazelle automates the full research lifecycle, from questionnaire design to insight delivery, providing validated, comparable data across markets and time periods.
It’s not just a research tool. It’s a decision engine built for teams that need clarity, speed, and confidence.

Tzkrti.com is a global online ticketing platform designed to connect audiences, artists, and organizers through seamless event discovery and management. Founded by experienced event professionals, it specializes in cultural, artistic, and entertainment events with a strong focus on Arabic-speaking communities worldwide, especially in the SWANA/MENA region. Visitors can browse and book tickets for concerts, theatre, festivals and more, while event hosts get intuitive tools to create, promote, manage and sell tickets effortlessly. Tzkrti aims to elevate cultural engagement, expand community access, and make every event an inspiring experience.

ADVANTAGE AUSTRIA (Foreign Trade Promotion Organisation) offers support to Austrian companies interested in export. When it comes to marketing products and services, establishing networks with international partners and providing first-hand market knowledge, ADVANTAGE AUSTRIA helps you to get a foothold on the global markets. Advantage Austria is the official foreign trade promotion organisation and the largest provider of services in the area of foreign trade and the organiser of the Austrian Pavilion.

AVEQ’s Surfmeter platform provides real-time, automated insights into video streaming QoE and web browsing performance from the end-user’s perspective. Designed for ISPs and mobile operators, it evaluates platforms like Netflix, YouTube, TikTok, and others, measuring KPIs like video quality, load times, and network stability. Backed by ITU-T standards and leading research, Surfmeter enables providers to resolve issues proactively, prevent churn, and ensure compliance with quality benchmarks. Whether integrated into field tests or existing apps, Surfmeter delivers unparalleled accuracy, helping service providers maintain operational excellence and elevate customer experiences in a competitive digital landscape.

KOMPaaS.tech helps companies enhance and automate customer communications. Its key products include an AI Phone Agent and an AI-powered Contact Center with advanced speech analytics. To improve usability and seamless integration, the platform supports popular business tools such as Microsoft Teams, Kommo, Altegio, Make.com, and Google Contacts. 

The Omnichannel AI Contact Center enables businesses to manage all communication channels from a single interface, significantly simplifying customer support operations. Embedded AI analyzes conversations in real time, identifies topics and sentiment, provides knowledge-based prompts, and supports customer interactions in more than 100 languages.

refurbed is the ultimate marketplace destination for sustainable products and services. It operates across three main verticals, Consumer Electronics, Sports, Kitchen & Household. Whether you are a brand looking to monetize returns or defective products, a distributor or reseller of used and refurbished devices, refurbed is your go-to channel if you are eager to join the circular economy movement.

phine.tech combines the best of IT and telecommunications. Our vision is to simplify 5G and accelerate the development of 5G Use Cases, especially in robotics and manufacturing. 

Our solution, the Virtual 5G Lab, provides a developer-friendly 5G Lab as a Service, offering hands-on exploration of 5G capabilities. It addresses the challenges that make 5G Use Case development expensive, slow, and complex.

Visit us at our stand at the 4YFN to see the Virtual 5G Lab in action, showcasing how it simplifies 5G Use Cases in robotics and other verticals by offering a flexible tool for 5G and 6G development.

As the Vienna Business Agency, we support international startups in making Vienna their gateway to success. Discover why Vienna is Europe’s prime startup location, offering unparalleled access to funding, talent, and networks. Learn about ViennaUP, one of the continent’s leading startup festivals, and how we connect you with industry experts, partners, and innovation ecosystems. Whether you’re looking for funding opportunities, coworking spaces, or guidance on settling in, we’re here to help turn your vision into reality in Vienna. Visit us at the Austrian startup corner to explore your future in Europe’s innovation hub!

Specure GmbH delivers Nettest, a trusted, independent measurement platform adopted by several European telecom regulatory authorities as their reference tool. Its governmental use validates accuracy, transparency, and trustworthiness, while universal applicability makes it valuable far beyond regulation. Nettest is open source, simple to use, and powered by a highly efficient measurement engine, enabling fast, repeatable tests across diverse environments. It is the go-to tool for technicians and researchers, supporting diagnostics, benchmarking, and QoS/QoE analysis. Internet service providers benefit from the actionable insights. Its rigor, openness, and usability position it as the next-generation reference tool for network testing.

fiskaltrust is a leading provider of fiscal compliance solutions, specializing in secure, tamper-proof data recording for businesses. With expertise in fiscal regulations, it supports companies across Europe by integrating reliable middleware for point-of-sale systems, ensuring compliance, transparency, and audit readiness. Trusted by businesses, fiskaltrust simplifies legal obligations with innovative technology.

TIP Brasil – Innovation Born in Campinas

Based in Campinas, one of Latin America's top tech hubs, TIP Brasil creates digital solutions that transform how people connect with technology. With over a decade of experience, we design scalable platforms that drive growth, improve user experience, and expand access to digital services across Brazil. Our mission is to generate real impact through smart, integrated solutions while contributing to the development of our region. TIP Brasil is proud to be part of a city where innovation leads the way.

ADVANTAGE AUSTRIA (Foreign Trade Promotion Organisation) offers support to Austrian companies interested in export. When it comes to marketing products and services, establishing networks with international partners and providing first-hand market knowledge, ADVANTAGE AUSTRIA helps you to get a foothold on the global markets. Advantage Austria is the official foreign trade promotion organisation and the largest provider of services in the area of foreign trade and the organiser of the Austrian Pavilion.

Ultralytics is the leading force in vision AI, best known for its Ultralytics YOLO (You Only Look Once) models. With over 120K GitHub stars, 200M+ Ultralytics downloads, and 2B+ model usages, Ultralytics YOLOv5, YOLOv8, YOLO11, and now YOLO26 have become the most widely recognized object detection models globally. 

Ultralytics empowers users with easy-to-use, cutting-edge AI technology, making it accessible and impactful across industries ranging from manufacturing to healthcare and more. 

Learn more at ultralytics.com.

Barcelona Activa is the city council’s organization that boosts the economic development by promoting employment, encouraging entrepreneurship and offering support and contact to companies. 
Barcelona Activa offers you personalized services and many more resources so that you can turn your idea into a viable company. 
This year we are accompanying 28 start-ups and organising a great programme of activities.  Come to our booth to meet the startup ecosystem and find out how we can help you.

BlueTechPort, managed by the World Trade Center and promoted by the Port of Barcelona, is the blue economy innovation hub. It brings together start-ups, companies and institutions working on cutting-edge solutions for sustainable maritime and port development. As a catalyst for the port’s innovation ecosystem, BlueTechPort provides workspace, visibility and collaboration opportunities for emerging ventures in areas such as marine technology, environmental sustainability and digitalisation. Its presence at 4YFN showcases the increasing importance of blue economy innovation in Barcelona and highlights startups and organisations that are shaping the future of the maritime sector through technology, research and entrepreneurship.

properties.name@en: CENIT, an Innovation Unit of CIMNE
properties.description@en: CENIT is the Transport Innovation Unit of the International Centre for Numerical Methods in Engineering (CIMNE). It generates and transfers knowledge in transport, logistics, and mobility through applied research, education, and technology transfer. CENIT specialises in the scientific analysis of real-world challenges affecting transport systems, logistics chains, and mobility. In the ports sector, it advises public authorities, port service operators, and shipping lines on port operations, decarbonisation and digitalisation strategies, and the assessment of emerging technologies. Current projects include the Horizon Europe PIONEERS project and the Observatory on the impact of the EU Emissions Trading System on Spain’s ports.

Whale Dock, the new ship-lifting system for dry-docking vessels, enabling the construction, reparation and maintenance of heavy vessels in a more sustainable way. Safe, efficient, and 100% electric, it reduces costs, improves operational management, and reduces the carbon footprint by 78%. Designed for modern shipyards with forward-looking vision.

Navozyme™, is an award winning scale-up that leverages deep tech, particularly DLT and AI, to drive the maritime industry's digital transformation and decarbonisation.

Its pioneering solutions streamline regulatory compliance, enhance safety, and boost operational efficiency by enabling real-time data interchange among maritime stakeholders, for diverse processes such as Port-Clearances, Ships' Waste Reporting, Bunker Scheduling, Seafarers' Credentials Issuance and Vessel Registrations.

Navozyme's innovations, such as Blockchain Enabled E-certificates (aka BEEs), not only simplify administrative burdens but also foster collaboration, and enhance the industry's reputation and productivity in the face of stringent regulations and sustainability goals.

Gandolapp is transforming road transport with smart, voice-driven solutions for truck drivers and fleet operators. Our innovative platform combines voice-tech in multiple languages with predictive tools to streamline communication, optimize routes, and enhance driver well-being. Gandolapp automates manual tasks, improves fleet visibility, and reduces inefficiencies, enabling trucking companies to save costs and time. Additionally, we provide real-time functional tracking and seamless integration with ports and logistics centers, revolutionizing the transport cycle. With a commitment to sustainability and innovation, Gandolapp is setting new standards for efficiency and excellence in the global logistics ecosystem. Smarts Fleets, Voice-Driven!

At A Bordo Lab, we are designing a New Regenerative Triple-Impact Innovation Model for the Ports and Maritime Areas of Catalonia and the Mediterranean.
We harness Collective Intelligence to identify real challenges in the Blue Economy, attract diverse talent, and co-create hybrid solutions with scientific or technological foundations by designing strategic, multi-target programs (for women entrepreneurs, youth, senior citizens, people with disabilities, and public administration professionals, among others).
Once developed, these solutions are tested and accelerated in real-world environments (Testbeds and Sandboxes in Ports and Maritime Areas) to ultimately create MVPs and prototypes that can generate and scale investable businesses.

GraphenicaLab is a Spanish start-up with a proprietary patented solution for flexible printed electronics using different Nano-Inks and Graphene. 
At GraphenicaLab we can transfer the capabilities of graphene and other nano-inks on any surface, making "smart" any component needed and enabling IoT solutions across industries. 
Our technology has been validated both in academia and in industry forums being The Most Disruptive Stat-up in the 2020 Advanced Factories Expo & Congress. We have already signed two contract development with major players in their fields and looking forward to partnering-up to introduce graphene and nanotechnology in airspace, automotive, energy and battery industries.

Passify digitizes truck handling to make terminal operations more secure and efficient. We eliminate congestion at terminal gates caused by manual check-ins and unannounced or misregistered trucks. At the same time, we address critical security issues where drivers are not properly identified before entering the terminal.
Our solution connects all stakeholders on one platform: drivers use a mobile app for biometric authentication and slot pre-booking, terminals are connected to TOS/GOS systems, and trucking companies manage drivers and bookings via a web application. This provides terminals with real-time visibility of who is on-site and full control of slot capacities.

The City Council of Sant Cugat del Vallès promotes a city model built on innovation, entrepreneurship and public-private collaboration. Through BIVA (Barcelona Innovation Valley Alliance), Sant Cugat connects startups, companies, universities and public institutions to foster an innovative and competitive ecosystem with international reach. With a strong concentration of technology companies, highly qualified talent and a high quality of life, the city has consolidated its position as a strategic hub for investment and the development of innovative projects. At 4YFN, BIVA reinforces its commitment to startups and talent.

La Salle–URL, a founding member of Universitat Ramon Llull, is an internationally renowned university campus with over a century of history. It offers undergraduate, master’s, postgraduate, doctoral, specialization and in-company programmes in the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Management, Animation & VFX, Digital Arts, Philosophy and Health Engineering, with technology and humanism as core elements of its DNA. La Salle–URL fosters entrepreneurship, innovation and applied research, promoting constant interaction between students and industry. Its innovation park, La Salle Technova Barcelona, stimulates technology-based entrepreneurship and acts as a hub connecting startups, investors and corporations.

CDTI Innovation is the Spanish public innovation agency supporting business R&D and technological entrepreneurship. At 4YFN, CDTI Innovation showcases its role as a key public partner for startups and scaleups, providing non-dilutive funding, equity instruments and strategic investment through programmes such as NEOTEC and INNVIERTE. CDTI supports innovative, technology-based companies across all stages, fostering collaboration between public and private venture capital and strengthening Spain’s deep tech and startup ecosystem. Through tailored financing solutions and expert guidance, CDTI Innovation helps transform disruptive ideas into competitive companies with global impact, contributing to sustainable growth, industrial leadership and the future of innovation.

FORESEE is a medical technology initiative developing an enhanced remote patient monitoring platform for heart failure, built around the principles of personalized medicine. By detecting clinical deterioration before symptoms appear, it will enable treatments tailored to each patient’s unique physiology and disease dynamics. The solution is based on a wireless intravascular microsensor implanted in the pulmonary artery, capable of simultaneously measuring multiple physiological parameters. Patients will perform short daily measurements from home, while clinicians receive an event-specific, complete view of disease progression. This personalized insight supports earlier, more precise medication adjustments, helping reduce hospitalizations and improve long-term outcomes.

OriginU is a Smartphone App that democratizes access to ancestry information through facial phenotype analysis, offering non-invasive, precise, and affordable solutions to a traditionally expensive, invasive, and inaccurate service.

NoctuRNA Therapeutics is a pioneering biotech spin-off of Pompeu Fabra University, boasts a cutting-edge platform dedicated to the rapid development of groundbreaking therapies based on circular RNAs. The company targets a spectrum of challenging diseases, from infectious diseases to muscular dystrophies and neurodegenerative conditions.

SCRIPTIA is a data-driven platform for early-stage IP discovery and validation in digital storytelling. We analyze real-time reader behavior at narrative level to identify commercially relevant stories before market saturation.
Our focus is transforming reading platforms into scalable IP sourcing engines and redefining future digital book formats. Founded in 2025, SCRIPTIA is at pre-seed stage, and has just launched its first public apps and website.

Novodn is a B2B healthcare SaaS platform that helps dental clinics automate appointment scheduling, patient communication, and daily operations through AI-powered WhatsApp and phone interactions. The platform reduces administrative workload, minimizes no-shows, and improves patient experience while providing clinics with real-time operational insights.

MobilityDataNets is a technology-driven company specializing in data intelligence solutions for mobility, transportation, and smart infrastructure. Its core product is a Digital Twin for mobility systems, enabling organizations to simulate, monitor, and optimize transport networks in real time. By integrating data from multiple sources, advanced analytics, and predictive models, MobilityDataNets transforms complex mobility data into actionable insights. The company supports public authorities, transport operators, and private organizations in improving traffic management, multimodal planning, sustainability, and operational efficiency. With a strong focus on innovation, interoperability, and data quality, MobilityDataNets empowers evidence-based decision-making and contributes to smarter, and more sustainable mobility ecosystems.

Synflora is a biotechnology research project focused on developing next-generation skin microbiome therapies. The project investigates engineered beneficial microbes capable of delivering therapeutic functions directly on the skin, enabling precise and long-term treatment of dermatological and systemic conditions. Synflora operates with a B2B2C vision, aiming to collaborate with pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and healthcare partners to translate research into real-world applications. The initiative combines synthetic biology, microbiology, and data-driven design to create safe, scalable, and sustainable solutions. Synflora is supported by an EIC Transition project and is currently in the research phase, with formal company incorporation planned for 2026.

Free platform where you can organize events easily. You can find and book vendors with real-time prices and availability—ranging from venues, catering, music, and décor to photography and much more. You’ll have access to planning tools to assist with every detail, such as guest management, budgets, checklists, and automatic reminders. Personalize your event with digital invitations, interactive menus, and 2D or 3D designs of décor and spaces using artificial intelligence. If you’re a vendor, you can publish your services for free, collaborate with others, and only pay a commission when you receive bookings—without any risks or hidden costs.

NUBAIR is a Travel Tech startup redefining airport wait times with smart, soundproof rest modules for up to two people. Located inside and outside terminals, it’s the perfect solution for early flights, layovers, delays, or cancellations. Our business model is strictly pay-per-hour with no minimum stay or mandatory packages—pay only for the exact time you need. Flexible, affordable alternative to hotels and uncomfortable terminal seating.Each cabin features a bed, secure storage, power hubs, and personalized multimedia synced with real-time flight info. We bridge technology and hospitality to keep travelers rested and informed. Because resting is also part of the journey.

UPF is a public, international, and research-intensive university. Founded in 1990, it has quickly established itself among the top universities in Europe. UPF structures its studies on three main areas of knowledge: social sciences and humanities, health and life sciences, and communication and information technologies. The university is committed to offering high-quality teaching and outstanding research with international projection. This approach has earned UPF the distinction of being the second-ranked Spanish university in the 2025 Times Higher Education ranking (176th worldwide). UPF is also part of the Barcelona Knowledge Alliance, which sponsors the University & Spin-off track at 4YFN26.
Revolutionizing healthcare training with AI, VR, and immersive gaming.

The Spanish Red Cross, founded in 1864, is a humanitarian and voluntary institution that forms part of the International Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement. Its mission is to alleviate human suffering and protect the lives and health of vulnerable people, guided by the principles of humanity, impartiality, and neutrality.
The Spanish Red Cross responds to emergencies, supports vulnerable people through social programs, promotes health and environmental care, encourages employment and education, and carries out all these activities thanks to its volunteers.

BlindStairs is an audit-ready ethical AI solution for talent decisions.

Our technology integrates seamlessly with existing ATS and HR systems to standardize hiring and internal mobility decisions with explainable, audit-ready outputs. BlindStairs reduces manual review, improves decision consistency across teams, and enables organizations to scale hiring without introducing bias or compliance debt. 

Designed for regulated environments, our solution supports evolving AI, equality, and transparency frameworks while maintaining full traceability and governance. BlindStairs empowers talent teams to move faster, make defensible decisions, and deliver a fair and transparent experience for candidates.

Avaru develops immersive, science-backed virtual reality applications designed to reduce stress, anxiety, pain, and inflammation for hospital patients and medical teams. The applications use guided breathing, meditation, natural environments, and interactive sensory experiences to support patients during treatments, minor procedures, long hospital stays, and recovery phases. Each program is created and tested directly with medical professionals to ensure it fits specific clinical use cases, illnesses, and patient needs.

Avaru’s suite includes specialized applications for oncology patients, pediatric surgery, dialysis care, minimally invasive surgery pathways, and dedicated stress-reduction modules for nurses. One VR headset can support over 100 patients per month.

Electraqua is a spin-off from the University of Barcelona providing sustainable solutions for advanced water treatment. Our mission is to address the impact of emerging pollutants, such as pharmaceutical residues and pesticides, that conventional treatment systems cannot remove. Using only air and electricity, our chemical-free solution enables efficient water treatment while reducing both operating costs and environmental impact.

Flavii Therapeutics S.L. is a biotechnology company developing epigenetic therapies for central nervous system (CNS) disorders with high unmet medical need. Flavii lead program, FLVA-27, is a first-in-class small-molecule and an inhibitor of G9a, a key epigenetic regulator of brain function. FLAV-27 shows strong brain penetration, favorable PK/PD properties, and a robust safety profile. Preclinical studies support its neuroprotective effects and functional improvements across multiple CNS disease models (e.g. Alzheimer disease and Huntington disease). Flavii is advancing FLAV-27 toward clinical development to deliver disease-modifying therapies and bringing new hope to patients and families affected by these conditions.
The best Real-time AI Translation, captioning and accessibility for events and conferences. Better. Faster. Affordable. And in a click.

CellFlow reimagines blood processing with a handheld lab-on-a-chip that separates cells gently and precisely. Our passive microfluidic design removes the need for bulky lab equipment, allowing clinicians to prepare high-quality therapeutic and diagnostic samples in just minutes. It’s a simple, reliable technology that opens the door to a new class of point-of-care medical devices.

Nataly tackles one of the world’s most urgent yet overlooked health challenges: postpartum hemorrhage (PPH). Every seven minutes, a woman dies from PPH, mainly due to the lack of reliable blood loss measurement. When detected early, timely treatment can drastically reduce deaths and complications.

Nataly is developing the first postpartum pad that absorbs and quantifies blood loss in real time. This low-cost, non-electronic medical device enables clinicians to act at the critical moment.

Our estimated impact: saving up to 42,000 lives annually, reducing hospital costs per case by 54%, and cutting postpartum pad waste by half.

BlueGreen Vision aims to implement environmental projects through technological innovations focused on Sustainability, Conservation and Restoration of Species and Natural Environments.

Our solution: BlueGreen Regeneration, which decontaminates the seabed and improves water quality in seaports, along with our digital environmental data platform, BlueGreen Data.

Biotech company that uses cerebral organoids, advanced 3D celular cultures that replicate human brain physiology to test drug safety and efficacy in vitro. These organoids are combined with ImPheNet AI tool trained on a large image database to predict drug response and toxicity. Our AI tool analyzes organoid morphology, transcriptomics and imaging data : 
Phases: Diagnosis-Cell culture from Biopsy-Organoid formation and drug testing-Eficacy/toxicity prediction-Drug development-Personalized therapy
Modular solutions tailored to pharmaceutical, biotech and clinical R&D pipelines
Organoids production for internal testing
Toxicity and efficacy assessment
Indication selection & priority 
Personalized medicine

Caring Collective is a social impact startup dedicated to democratising health education and making science accessible. It addresses low health literacy and misinformation that affect health, quality of life and healthcare sustainability. Its subscription-based digital platform delivers a continuous, evidence-based health and wellbeing programme for people and organisations, empowering them through up-to-date knowledge in one ecosystem. Its model is validated through an active community, collaboration with 50+ professionals, and early corporate wellness partnerships. With strong academic roots and a purpose-driven team, Caring Collective integrates science, education and technology to deliver scalable impact. Powered by science. Guided by care.

Breast cancer is the most treatable cancer, yet it remains the leading cause of death by cancer in women—largely because national screening programs miss up to 1 in 3 cases. The problem is even worse for women with dense breasts, who make up 50% of the screening population and for whom mammography is less reliable. At The Blue Box, we've developed a urine-based breast cancer test with a sensitivity of 88.42%, outperforming mammography by 15% overall—and by 30% in women with dense breasts.

Offside is a social football gaming app that transforms the way matches are experienced with friends. You play in private groups, answer predictive questions about moments in your favourite matches, earn points, and see who finishes first. There’s no real-money betting, just friendly competition and shared moments.

FotoNEX connects photographers and clients through a simple, transparent, and secure booking platform. Our mission is to make finding and booking the right photographer easy and trustworthy. Photographers can create professional profiles, showcase their work, manage availability, and get paid securely. Clients enjoy smart search by specialty and location, direct communication, verified reviews, easy scheduling, and protected payments. FotoNEX takes the stress out of booking photography so both sides can focus on what really matters: creating great images.

WardUs is a technological ecosystem transforming municipal security management. It is a dual solution comprising:

First, a citizen-facing app providing personal protection tools (an emergency button with evidence recording) and a direct channel to communicate with local government for reporting incidents and receiving alerts.

Second, a management platform for public administration. This control center enables security forces to receive, manage, and analyze citizen data in real time, optimizing emergency response and strategic planning.

Finally, all data is aggregated for advanced analysis and to train models for research purposes

The UB provides the broadest course offering of any university in Spain and is a national leader in research, thanks to a longstanding commitment to quality. This status is reflected in leading international rankings and knowledge transfer activities that channel results into society.

The UB community is an entrepreneurial collective that actively promotes the creation of spin-offs and start-ups. The University encourages students, teaching staff and administrative staff to develop their entrepreneurial spirit, providing specific support and training for innovation.

The UB is part of the Barcelona Knowledge Alliance, which sponsors the University & Spin-off track at 4YFN26.

The UB provides the broadest course offering of any university in Spain and is a national leader in research, thanks to a longstanding commitment to quality. This status is reflected in leading international rankings and knowledge transfer activities that channel results into society.

The UB community is an entrepreneurial collective that actively promotes the creation of spin-offs and start-ups. The University encourages students, teaching staff and administrative staff to develop their entrepreneurial spirit, providing specific support and training for innovation.

The UB is part of the Barcelona Knowledge Alliance, which sponsors the University & Spin-off track at 4YFN26.

All-Voiced is a digital platform dedicated to voice assessment across education, research, and healthcare.
It supports standardized voice evaluation through validated protocols, interactive evaluation training tools, and structured data collection. The platform has attracted nearly 1,000 registered users from more than 30 countries. All-Voiced helps students, clinicians, and professionals develop perceptual reliability, compare expert benchmarks, and generate research-ready datasets.
By bridging clinical practice, education, and large-scale data, the platform enables evidence-based evaluation and cross-cultural research in voice science. All-Voiced is designed to scale globally and foster collaboration across academic institutions, clinical settings, and research communities.

PlanetAI Space is a technology startup specialized in the development of artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms for the quantification of natural capital. Its mission is to provide robust scientific evidence to support strategic decision-making in sustainability and the protection of planetary health.

PlanetAI Space detects and quantifies methane emissions anywhere in the world using data from more than 600 Earth observation satellites. By transforming complex data into accessible insights, the company makes the impact of pollution visible, enabling informed decision-making and contributing to the reduction of environmental risks at a global scale.

SmartSim, a spin-off created by Universitat Oberta de Catalunya and CompanyGame, responds to the urgent need for stronger alignment between academic training and labor market demands. The platform integrates simulation, artificial intelligence, and personalized learning to support universities in modernizing their educational models. SmartSim monitors individual progress, adapts learning pathways, and strengthens competency-based assessment. As a strategic tool for institutional transformation, it enables universities to develop microcredential portfolios and upskill faculty through practical, data-informed methodologies. By combining academic rigor with technological innovation, SmartSim helps institutions deliver graduates with measurable, job-ready skills and reinforces their societal mission.

Levelab is an innovative solution that empowers teachers in higher education to create engaging hands-on lessons for STEM, programming, design, data, and more. 
With just one click, students access a fully equipped, browser-based environment with all tools and content ready to use, allowing them to tackle real-world challenges confidently, while ensuring the right level of support to minimize frustration and maximize success. 
By partnering with universities, online schools, and educational platforms, Levelab differentiates content, removes access barriers, and provides scalable solutions boosting student engagement, expanding institutional reach and optimizing costs, helping organizations increase revenue while delivering impactful education.

Aimentia is a leading company providing emerging digital health solutions that leverage the power of Artificial Intelligence to improve the lives of mental health professionals and their patients. We play a unique role, helping individual patients as well as performing large scale screenings through a versatile virtual clinic. Our social commitment has already made us one of the most wanted companies in the public sector supporting patients, medical professionals, schools, hospitals and research. Are you prepared to lead the change in mental healthcare practices? Meet the team at 4YFN and schedule a demo with us.

AlfaSAAC is a social impact startup focused on inclusive education and the right to communication for children, young people and adults with complex communication needs, including those who cannot rely on speech. We work with Augmentative and Alternative Communication, AAC, a set of tools, strategies and technologies that support or replace spoken language to enable meaningful communication. We develop scalable, digital-supported solutions that help schools, families, and organizations create inclusive communication environments where all learners actively participate. Our approach combines educational innovation, assistive technology, training, and consultancy to generate measurable impact and systemic change across education systems worldwide equitably.

At Accessibles, we work to make the digital world accessible to everyone through inclusive technologies, focusing on addressing cognitive, communicative and sensory needs.

Come meet Melvin! An AI that enhances the digital experience. It helps with orientation, navigation, and comprehension. It transforms content into various accessible formats—such as easy-to-read, pictograms, audio description, or sign language—in real time, adapting to each person’s needs.

Try Melvin and experience it!

Seniordomo is the first solution that protects the elderly and attends to emergencies automatically.

The solution is based on a watch that works autonomously, is very easy to use and monitors physical activity, vital signs and location. 
One of the main innovations of our technology is that our system is able to automatically call by phone to locate the first available family member in less than 20 seconds. We are also collaborating with local councils and organisations in the sector.

At Immersium Studio we design the next generation of Immersive Learning experiences to improve soft and hard skills both in corporations and educational institutions. Skills like teamwork, conflict resolution, communication, leadership, empathy... Learn through realistic simulations and multiply up to 4 times knowledge retention.

Indatika is the influencer marketing platform that turns real experience into better decisions. It allows you to discover, analyze, and manage content creators through a unique approach: reviews from brands that have already worked with them. Built as a SaaS for brands, ecommerce businesses, and entrepreneurs looking to grow through authentic and profitable collaborations, Indatika helps you choose with confidence, save time, and align every action with your business goals by investing in relationships that truly work.

Panssari develops dual-use AI and RF sensing technology that brings real-time security and operational intelligence to ports, critical infaestructure and defence facilities. Our platform combines computer vision, UWB RF geolocation (patent pending) and IoT devices that retrofit existing cameras, creating a continuous digital layer over large industrial areas. This solves the sector’s main pain points: blind spots, intrusions, theft, accidents, lack of situational awareness and heavy dependence on manual monitoring. Designed and manufactured in Spain, Panssari offers a low-infrastructure, privacy-by-design, sovereign alternative CCTV and traditional access control, enabling operators to predict and prevent incidents instead of merely reacting to them.

Edurantia is a gamified platform where students build and manage a virtual city by learning. Each subject fuels the city's growth, turning lessons into missions and boosting engagement, participation, and academic results. Beyond grades, it fosters critical thinking, creativity, and entrepreneurship.
Build. Learn. Inspire. Welcome to Edurantia.

Kala Health is a digital health platform that supports and empowers women through menopause. It offers expert-led content, symptom tracking, personalized programs, and a supportive community, with a strong focus on Spanish-speaking users, enhanced by artificial intelligence–driven personalization and insights.

Kala combines a B2C model for women with a B2B model for healthcare institutions, research centers, pharmaceutical companies, insurers, and corporate wellness programs, enabling prevention, follow-up, research, and data-driven decision-making in menopause care.

XR Xperiences is an innovative company using virtual, augmented and mixed reality to transform professional training. We design simulations that let people learn by doing and build leadership, teamwork and decision-making skills in realistic situations. Our approach combines advanced technology with modern learning principles to achieve measurable results that can be applied at work. We help organizations improve performance and prepare their teams for the future through flexible and immersive solutions.

Authory is a verification tool that helps educators confirm the real authorship of academic work. 

Instead of relying on opaque AI scores, it analyzes how students write, including their typing rhythm, revisions, and writing patterns, to provide clear and objective insights. Authory puts teachers back at the center of evaluation, reducing the uncertainty introduced by AI-generated content. By focusing on the writing process rather than just the final result, it restores trust in academic assessment.

Learning is a human experience on which our future depends.

Twintual is a single AI interface for messaging that unifies email, Slack, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, and more. It filters noise, summarizes conversations, replies in your tone, and turns messages into tasks or calendar events. Instead of juggling multiple apps and deciding what matters, Twintual acts as your second brain, handling messages across platforms based on your behavior and priorities. Designed for busy professionals and teams, it saves hours each week and reduces digital stress. Published by Forbes and TV, we’re scaling across B2B and freelancers use cases, giving people back their most valuable resource: time.

Welcome to Twintual!

At the Universitat Oberta de Catalunya (UOC), we drive the evolution of our learning model through cutting-edge research and innovation in e-learning. We make this possible thanks to UOC's Research and Innovation efforts and the eLearning Center, the hub that accelerates our educational innovation.

Through R&I, we continuously generate knowledge ready for transfer. We believe in collaboration, and therefore, our projects are open to being adapted, implemented, and expanded to meet the needs of organizations with whom we can collaborate.

The results of our knowledge transfer are specified in: technological solutions, patents, licensable technologies, applications, spin-offs, and university-company services

At cyber&, we help organizations strengthen their cybersecurity and digital resilience. We protect what matters most while enabling secure and sustainable growth in a complex digital world.

We turn cybersecurity into a competitive advantage instead of a liability. Through a unique combination of strategic consulting, regulatory compliance expertise, and advanced operational capabilities, we help our clients build trust, ensure business continuity, and move forward with confidence.

Our proven technical expertise is supported by internationally recognized certifications, our clients' trust, and solid experience across multiple industries.

Most companies can build an impressive AI demo. Very few trust it enough to deploy it.

Unchecked AI can trigger wrong decisions, regulatory exposure, and reputational damage. Only in 2025, an EY survey reported billions in losses across companies linked to AI-related risks.
Somia is a B2B platform designed to change this. Using proprietary algorithms, Somia validates, monitors, and continuously improves AI agents in real-world conditions. Built with human oversight at its core and aligned with European AI regulation, Somia makes AI transparent, auditable, and controllable - so companies can move from risky demos to production-ready AI they can trust.

Peimi is a Barcelona-based SaaS startup that automates the calculation and management of sales commissions for companies. Its software eliminates manual spreadsheets and errors by integrating with CRMs and ERPs to pull sales data and compute commission payouts accurately and transparently. Peimi provides real-time dashboards for sales, finance, and HR teams, helping improve motivation, streamline incentive processes, and reduce administrative workload. Founded in 2024, it targets organizations with complex sales structures and aims to enhance visibility, efficiency, and trust in commission planning and tracking.

Tauniqo is a deep-tech HR platform that transforms corporate training and hiring by enabling AI-driven practice, simulation, and objective skills assessment. While most HR tools focus on creating content or managing courses, Tauniqo focuses on what really matters: whether people can apply critical skills in real situations.

Through conversational AI roleplays and a proprietary evaluation engine trained on 25,000+ interactions, Tauniqo measures communication, leadership, sales and decision-making skills with full transparency and traceability.

Tauniqo is ISO 27001 and ISO 42001 certified, ensuring enterprise-grade security, data protection and responsible AI governance for large organisations.

Ondaloop is an enterprise software platform that helps sales teams practice real conversations with AI, at scale.
Instead of passive courses, Ondaloop works as a conversation simulator where teams train objections, pitches, and critical moments in a safe, realistic environment. Every practice session generates clear, actionable insights, giving leaders visibility into readiness, consistency, and progress across the organization. The result: faster ramp-up, a more consistent sales message, and measurable performance improvement before teams ever face real customers.

Biyiud is the climate tech startup that turns sustainability into action and real value. We create a digital ecosystem where consumers, businesses, and governments accelerate the adoption of sustainable products and services. Every positive action generates benefits: savings for individuals, growth for local businesses, and new revenue for companies. Our technology makes environmental impact measurable, scalable, and financially rewarding. Meet our team at 4YFN and discover how to shape the future of your city or business with our App, the City Bloom Board, and the Business Bloom Board.

Mediala Tech is an AI-powered B2B platform that helps organizations prevent, detect, and resolve workplace conflict before it escalates into attrition, burnout, or legal risk. We combine real-time workplace climate insights, secure anonymous reporting, and guided resolution workflows with practical training in communication and mediation. Noa, our human-centered AI assistant, supports employees and leaders with continuous coaching and structured conversations, while HR gains actionable dashboards and protocols to intervene early. Built with strong privacy and confidentiality standards, Mediala Tech turns hidden tensions into measurable improvement in collaboration, trust, and performance—helping teams stay healthy, productive, and resilient at scale.

CellFlow reimagines blood processing with a handheld lab-on-a-chip that separates cells gently and precisely. Our passive microfluidic design removes the need for bulky lab equipment, allowing clinicians to prepare high-quality therapeutic and diagnostic samples in just minutes. It’s a simple, reliable technology that opens the door to a new class of point-of-care medical devices.

In legacy industries where strategy relies on fast, abundant, and fragmented information, decisions are often slow, reactive, and disconnected from reality. Metly turns internal knowledge and external signals into living intelligence. By unifying data into shared strategic context that continuously updates, Metly helps teams understand what matters, anticipate impact, and act with clarity. The result is faster alignment, better decisions, and strategies that evolve as the world changes. We are building this intelligence layer first for the pharmaceutical industry, where complexity makes context critical.

Salssa is transforming sports nutrition to make it as healthy as it is high-performing. What sense does it make to have it any other way?
Join the movement at salssa.com

ChattyHiring is an AI Agent platform where you can hire specialized HR and Talent Acquisition agents to automate manual tasks.

Each agent is trained for a specific HR function—CV screening, interviewing, meeting coordination, FAQs, salary & payroll support—so teams can choose the agents they need, exactly when they need them.

It’s ideal for HR leaders, TA teams, and fast-growing companies facing high recruitment volumes, slow communication, and inconsistent candidate experiences.

Save hours of repetitive work and with AI Agents built specifically for HR.

Shoptimus AI provides a smart shopping list service that improves customer loyalty for grocers by helping their customers optimize their shopping according to their needs, preferences and goals, with the best user experience, for both online and offline purchases.

Peimi provides real-time dashboards for sales, finance, and HR teams, helping improve motivation, streamline incentive processes, and reduce administrative workload. Founded in 2024, it targets organizations with complex sales structures and aims to enhance visibility, efficiency, and trust in commission planning and tracking.

RacketyTV is a technology company focused on the digitalization of padel and racket sports clubs. The company offers an integrated platform combining automated video recording and live streaming, AI-based match analysis with player statistics, and dedicated video analysis tools for coaches. In addition, RacketyTV provides court reservation and club management solutions that help centralize operations and improve the player experience. Its turnkey offering includes installation, connectivity, and cloud-based software, enabling clubs to modernize their infrastructure, increase engagement, and unlock new revenue opportunities efficiently.

GIA ROBOTICS is a young company that is trying to make the world a better place, by implementing new solutions that can help people understand programming in a far way easier way. We like to help those in need, and give opportunities to young people so they can start working in a company that will care about them, not just as workers but as people. Gerard and Albert, the CEO and the COO, are two of the best people in marketing and commercial, and ingeneering and AI. Which makes the perfect combination for creating valuable solutions.
Metascan 3d scans humans to create human centric datasets. The datasets are sold to AI companies as training data. Metascan wants to become the main provider of human identities for AI training data.

AI-powered Brand Content SaaS. Squid offers an easy and fast way to create high-quality brand content fully aligned with your company’s visual identity. Designed for everyone - from beginners to experts - Squid simplifies content creation and enables seamless collaboration and sharing throughout the entire process.

Remotto is building the next generation of gaming experiences by combining innovative hardware, creator collaborations and the emerging universe of AR and AI devices. We design and manufacture premium gaming gear that enhances play anywhere, from power systems to custom controllers and upcoming accessories for smart glasses. Our creator drops model has already proven that limited editions with influencers and IPs can deliver fast, scalable demand and unlock new revenue streams. Next, we are developing simple videogame creation tools and titles built together with streamers and communities, connecting physical products, digital content and fan bases into one ecosystem.

AI learned the internet. That era is ending.
The next leap comes from the physical world: everything humans see, hear, and experience but never digitize. We’ve patented a way for AI to understand reality directly — books, whiteboards, manuals, signs, spoken instruction — without scanning, copying, or storing images.
This isn’t another app or model.
It’s a new intelligence layer between the world and machines.
A near-free global product creates massive adoption; enterprise layers unlock scale and revenue.
If this works, it changes how AI grows. Permanently.

Atleia is an AI-powered sports and wellness platform developed by Techwich. We help athletes, coaches, and sports organizations improve training outcomes through intelligent program generation, progress tracking, and performance insights.
Atleia combines personalized coaching logic with data-driven analytics to turn daily training inputs into actionable recommendations—supporting smarter decisions for individuals and scalable management for teams and clubs. Built on Techwich’s technology stack and product expertise, Atleia is designed to enhance performance, user experience, and long-term engagement across the sports ecosystem.

We are Seven Sector, a cybersecurity company dedicated to protecting corporations through innovative and proactive security solutions. Our proprietary technology integrates Digital Twins, Honeypots, and Deception Technology to replicate real corporate environments, attract attackers, and redirect threats away from production systems. This approach enables early detection, high-fidelity alerts, and actionable threat intelligence while minimizing operational impact. With a strong focus on innovation and continuous R&D, we help organizations strengthen their cybersecurity posture and build long-term digital resilience across IT, OT, and IoT environments.

Zenit is a deep-tech startup developing AI-powered software for the creation, management, and optimization of energy communities and collective self-consumption projects. Our platform enables public administrations, utilities, and energy service companies to simulate energy scenarios, optimize energy sharing, and manage participants efficiently. By combining advanced algorithms, digital twins, and data-driven decision-making, Zenit maximizes local renewable energy use, reduces energy costs, and accelerates the transition towards decentralized, sustainable, and citizen-centered energy systems.

Barcelona-based startup and spin-off from the Vall d’Hebron Research Institute addressing a major unmet need in IVF: the lack of objective, real-time information about uterine readiness at embryo transfer. While embryo quality is well assessed, transfers are still performed by trial-and-error. Seedchrony, Manina’s flagship technology, is a novel, non-invasive medical device integrated into the transfer workflow that assesses the uterine environment on transfer day. In a pilot study involving 80 IVF patients, Seedchrony demonstrated a 90% negative predictive value, enabling clinicians to avoid transfers at high risk of failure. Manina is advancing clinical validation to help make every embryo count.

ColorSensing helps food manufacturers and retailers reduce food waste and ensure the quality and safety of their products thanks to a digital, multiparametric and cost-effective food freshness indicator. 

Our smart packaging solution is based on printing intelligent inks working as sensors on a QR code label, and reading it with a smartphone or any camera, obtaining the sensing data thanks to our algorithms.

Our core technology can also be applied to medical imaging, telemedicine and digitization of several kinds of tests.
