Cubics is a transversal industrial network and platform connecting purchasers of custom products with their manufacturers. Manufacturing companies gain visibility and access opportunities aligned with their capabilities, allowing them to focus on the most competitive and valuable requests. Meanwhile, consumer companies can manage their supplier portfolio and connect directly with the most qualified firms for their needs. 

Cubics also functions as a commercial information manager, centralizing data from the initial request to the order finalization. This avoids parallel communication threads, ensuring complete control, traceability, and coherence in all phases of the acquisition process.

The University of Girona is a public institution and part of the Catalan public universities system. It is devoted to excellence in teaching and research and involved in social development and progress bye means of the creation, transmission, dissemination and criticism of science, technology, humanities, social and health sciences and arts. It is an economic and cultural driver of the region with a universal mission and is open to the world's traditions, advances and cultures worldwide.

Bee2Be Tech acts as a bridge between the digital ecosystem and manufacturing industry. We connect tech solution developers (AI, IoT, software dev) with industrial opportunities in metal stamping, food, chemical, and cosmetic sectors. Through strategic consulting and commercial support, we guide startups entering B2B industrial markets and manufacturers in their digitalization journey. With 20+ years of industry expertise, we deliver: market intelligence, hands-on AI training (70% practice-based), and curated tech partnerships. 

Our dual sector knowledge creates connections that drive operational efficiency, sustainability, and innovation. We seek tech startups ready to scale industrial solutions and manufacturing partners committed to digital transformation.

Myosafe Innovations is transforming emergency care through advanced digital solutions for critical conditions like myocardial infarction, stroke, sepsis, polytrauma, and anaphylaxis. Our platform streamlines workflows by enabling real-time information sharing and seamless coordination across healthcare teams, ensuring faster, more efficient care. Beyond immediate interventions, it tracks and analyzes every step of the process through intuitive dashboards, identifying inefficiencies and offering actionable insights to optimize performance. By bridging gaps in communication and enhancing decision-making, Myosafe empowers professionals to deliver the highest standard of care.

Myosafe: driving the future of emergency care, one life at a time.

The Laboratory of Chemical and Environmental Engineering (LEQUIA) is a research group of the University of Girona (Catalonia, Spain) devoted to the development of eco-innovative environmental solutions. Our research lines are: i) innovative  processes for (waste)water treatment and potabilisation, ii) gas treatment and carbon dioxide bioconversion, and iii) digitalisation and application of artificial intelligence in the urban water cycle.

Newronia develops AI-powered optimization for logistics, focused on route and task planning under complex constraints. Our latest innovation is a driver-trained AI: we learn from historical driver decisions, local know-how, and execution data to generate routes that match how operations really run. Combined with advanced genetic algorithms and local search, we deliver plans that are efficient and also practical, consistent, and easy to execute. We build tailored projects and integrations to fit each customer’s workflows, reducing manual replanning and improving service reliability.

Across is an alliance of ten universities spanning Europe. Comprising 10 different countries, we are committed to promoting cross-border co-operation, advancing academic excellence, and enhancing Europe's educational landscape. 

We strive to break down barriers, inspire innovation and empower students, staff and lifelong learners to thrive in an interconnected and diverse world. 

A key objective is to establish a network of Across Border Engagement Centres that facilitate regular dialogue between universities, businesses, local administrations, and civil society agents in border regions.

Evimatic is an AI-based scientific evidence analyst. Evimatic helps clinicians/institutions dissatisfied with clinical guidelines and protocols for relegating the user to a passive role by: 1) performing an automatic, updated, and transparent analysis of scientific evidence considering the clinicians/institutions values and preferences, and 2) offering customizable heuristic that generates constant revenues to the clinicians/institutions for its third-party use. We have implemented Evimatic for ADHD as proof of concept before scaling to other diseases. Founded in 2026 and backed by €130k in pre-seed funding, we aim to make customized scientific evidence analysis at the point of care the new standard.

Muvity improves quality of life for people with physical rehabilitation needs. It is a telerehabilitation system that captures body motion using a depth camera, enabling advanced kinematic and dynamic analysis. Muvity provides clinically relevant data on movement quality and physical effort, allowing therapists to monitor progress remotely. Therapists can prescribe personalized, week-by-week exercise programs, which users can perform anywhere. Muvity is currently used in several elderly care homes and rehabilitation centers supporting people with frailty.

Across is an alliance of ten universities spanning Europe. Comprising 10 different countries, we are committed to promoting cross-border co-operation, advancing academic excellence, and enhancing Europe's educational landscape. 

We strive to break down barriers, inspire innovation and empower students, staff and lifelong learners to thrive in an interconnected and diverse world. 

A key objective is to establish a network of Across Border Engagement Centres that facilitate regular dialogue between universities, businesses, local administrations, and civil society agents in border regions.

Criboos is a digital health company developing medical devices for the prevention, screening, and monitoring of visual diseases, aiming to make early detection and follow-up accessible to the entire population. Visual impairment is a leading cause of disability worldwide and affects over 13% of the adult population in Spain. Despite effective treatments, the lack of early screening programs leads to delayed diagnoses and preventable vision loss. Existing solutions are often expensive, inflexible, and hospital-centered, limiting access in community settings. Criboos addresses this gap with a range of fully digital, portable, low-cost products based on simple hardware and artificial intelligence algorithms.

Haptika develops a wearable sensory-feedback system that enhances the user experience of upper-limb prostheses. Our technology delivers real-time tactile information through non-invasive stimulation, enabling users to perform everyday tasks with greater confidence, precision, and emotional connection. Built on advanced haptics, ergonomic design, and clinical insight, Haptika provides a lightweight add-on that integrates seamlessly with existing prosthetic devices. The project has been validated with clinicians, prosthetic experts, and early users, and is supported by leading innovation programs. Haptika aims to redefine human–device interaction and expand sensory-access technologies for broader healthcare and assistive applications.

Systellar Space is a Barcelona-based engineering software startup building synapse™, a digital platform for continuous, model-based systems engineering. synapse™ unifies system models, requirements, documentation, and automation into a single collaborative environment, enabling engineers to work in parallel with full traceability and version control. Built on SysML v2 and enhanced with AI, the platform removes the complexity traditionally associated with MBSE, making digital engineering accessible and practical. Systellar’s initial focus is the space sector, with applications extending to any industry developing complex physical systems.

Enterprises don’t need more tools. They need simpler operations.
At Neod, AI goes beyond assistance. It acts. Conversational AI and agents turn enterprise operations into automated workflows, execute decisions at scale, and connect directly with business systems in real time. No friction, no manual overhead, just intelligent systems working quietly in the background. Neod removes operational noise, streamlines critical processes, and enables organizations to move faster with confidence. Smarter workflows, clearer decisions, and AI operating at the core of the enterprise. Built for scale, security, and real-world impact across teams, channels, and industries.

FOOXYTech is a spin-off from UPC, Fundació Món Clínic and FCRB-IDIBAPS, developing a pioneering technology toward a personalized oxygen therapy, based on innovative solutions leveraging AI, cloud & edge computing and IoT systems, covering the whole oxygen therapy lifecycle with two novel products. FOOXYTech will become a global leader in integrated, personalized respiratory and cardiopulmonary care – across diagnostics, monitoring, and therapy – accessible at the point of need, thereby helping millions of people improve health status and quality of life.

Folgrid develops passive agrivoltaic technology that boosts crop resilience while producing clean energy. Our patented optical system diffuses sunlight to reduce heat stress, water use, and climate-related losses—without limiting agricultural activity. Designed for horticulture, orchards, and high-value crops, Folgrid installations create stable microclimates, integrate storage, and operate under simplified regulatory frameworks (<100 kW). Backed by the IDAE with funded pilots in Spain, Folgrid enables farmers and food companies to decarbonize, protect yields, and generate new revenue streams. Simple, robust, and scalable agrivoltaics for Europe’s climate-stressed agriculture.

Hypergraph is a cybersecurity startup that leverages advanced Artificial Intelligence, specifically Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), to deliver real-time intrusion and anomaly detection. Its platform transforms raw network traffic into graph-based intelligence, enabling organizations to detect threats that traditional signature-based systems miss. Designed for rapid deployment and minimal operational overhead, Hypergraph provides a plug-and-play solution suitable for IT, industrial, and medical environments. The company focuses on high-fidelity behavioral analytics, automatic threat labeling, and low-latency processing. Hypergraph has been recognized for its innovative approach and selected for leading acceleration programs such as Wayra by Telefónica, positioning it as a next-generation NDR solution.

AYRO Solutions is an innovation-driven company developing next-generation respiratory protection for demanding industrial environments. Founded by engineers with direct experience on the factory floor, AYRO focuses on improving worker safety without compromising comfort or productivity. Its flagship product, NASO-SHIELD, is a reusable intranasal device that filters harmful particles and gases directly at the point of entry, while remaining fully compatible with existing PPE. By reducing breathing resistance, heat, and discomfort associated with traditional masks, AYRO Solutions aims to redefine respiratory protection through discreet, ergonomic, and scalable solutions designed for real-world industrial use.

We are a research-driven security company committed to the core philosophy that security begins with privacy. We recognize that the smartphone is the central, yet dangerously neglected, piece of modern digital life, creating a massive, vulnerable target for cybercriminals. Our mission is to democratize complete mobile cybersecurity for individuals. Through our netSamurai mobile application, we aim to overcome the fragmented state of mobile security by delivering a powerful, unified, all-in-one defense system. This solution combines proactive privacy protections with intelligent threat defense, giving everyone a simple and effective way to shield their digital life.

The AI layer between your data and your decisions.
Strathens empowers leaders to transform fragmented data into high-value assets — in seconds. No SQL. No manual work. No bottlenecks. Welcome to the next era of decision-making.

byNeural empowers online stores to create truly intelligent and proactive AI assistants that not only answer questions but anticipate user needs and guide them toward conversion. Integrated with Shopify, WooCommerce and PrestaShop, it understands the product catalog in real time and delivers precise recommendations through interactive carousels. Its voice mode turns any website into a fully conversational experience, letting customers speak naturally with the assistant. With advanced workflows, instantly updated RAG knowledge and deep analytics, byNeural transforms any eCommerce into a store that autonomously advises, sells and supports customers with unmatched efficiency.

MESAI is a SaaS Artificial Intelligence platform for the manufacturing industry built on a true Plug&AI approach.Using your own data, a standard web service and our unique algorithms, we bring AI to your factory in just days—without long projects or complex infrastructures.
We turn production data into automated decisions to improve productivity, quality, maintenance and planning. Our technology adapts itself to each production process, with no manual model configuration required. MESAI democratizes industrial AI, enabling manufacturers-especially SMEs-to access advanced optimization, failure prediction and continuous improvement in a fast, simple and cost-effective way, with direct impact on OEE and operational performance.

Bio2Coat is an innovation-driven company developing bio-based and biodegradable coatings for the agri-food sector. Its solutions are designed to extend shelf life, reduce food waste and replace conventional plastic-based materials. Bio2Coat combines scientific research with scalable industrial processes, using circular economy principles and the valorization of industrial by-products. The company works closely with producers and distributors through pilot projects to adapt its technologies to real market needs. With a strong focus on sustainability and performance, Bio2Coat aims to support a more efficient, competitive and environmentally responsible food supply chain at an international level.

NOBRAC.tech is a technology company specializing in verifiable forest carbon measurement and monitoring. The company uses ultra-high-resolution satellite imagery combined with advanced artificial intelligence to remotely assess and validate carbon sequestration in forests. By enabling precise, tree-by-tree tracking of CO₂ removal and ecosystem change, NOBRAC.tech offers transparent and cost-effective carbon credit verification solutions. Their auditable data and remote certification help project developers, investors, and auditors trust climate impact results. The company’s innovative approach aims to improve credibility in carbon markets and support forest conservation and climate action globally

Datlantis unlocks AI scalability at the edge through sustainable subsea data centers. Our mission is to power the European AI boom by synergizing and physically co-locating expanding data center infrastructure with offshore wind and wave energy to mitigate AI’s energy, water, and land constraints. We deliver turnkey solutions and operate and maintain subsea data center infrastructure so customers seamlessly adapt from land to sea without impacting existing operations or processes. In parallel, we collaborate with offshore energy partners to enhance wind and wave farm operations through reduced export cable losses, EdgeAI-powered analytics, shared vessel campaigns, and related efficiencies.

The Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya · BarcelonaTech (UPC) is a public institution of research and higher education in the fields of engineering, architecture, sciences and technology, and one of the leading technical universities in Europe. 
The institution counts with more than 25 years of entrepreneurial spirit on promoting the culture of innovation and entrepreneurship in the university community and fostering the creation of knowledge and technology based companies more than 400 companies to date.
Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya is part of the Barcelona Knowledge Alliance, which sponsors the University & Spin-off track at 4YFN26.

properties.name@en: Elisava Barcelona School of Design a...
properties.description@en: Elisava Barcelona School of Design and Engineering is a faculty of UVic-UCC. It promotes education, knowledge and research in the fields of design, communication and engineering. Located in Barcelona, Elisava has trained more than 25,000 students in its 65-year history. At Elisava Impuls (Entrepreneurship Programme) we promote, drive and accompany opportunities of our ecosystem in order to impact the market, the planet and society through the generation of spin offs, startups or the patents’ licensing to the industry.

The Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya · BarcelonaTech (UPC) is a public institution of research and higher education in the fields of engineering, architecture, sciences and technology, and one of the leading technical universities in Europe. 
The institution counts with more than 25 years of entrepreneurial spirit on promoting the culture of innovation and entrepreneurship in the university community and fostering the creation of knowledge and technology based companies more than 400 companies to date.
Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya is part of the Barcelona Knowledge Alliance, which sponsors the University & Spin-off track at 4YFN26.

Phygital Bone (PHyB) is a novel biomimetic, parametric human bone surrogate that accurately replicates the microstructure of cortical and trabecular bone. It is adaptable to patient specific anatomy and pathological conditions, enabling precise customization. The platform supports efficient, scalable fabrication through advanced 3D printing, ensuring broad accessibility for research and clinical use. A fully biodegradable substrate is currently under development for both in vitro and in vivo applications. PHyB has demonstrated exceptional mechanical performance, reliability, and repeatability, supporting next generation digital health simulation, preclinical testing, and translational bone tissue engineering.
Ecosystem for ultra-personalized footwear enabled by 3D scanning, parametric algorithms, integrated additive manufacturing, and soft-robotic monitoring sensors.

This project introduces an interactive experience for teenagers with rare diseases during hospitalization. We are aware that prolonged treatment periods interrupt social development and create disconnection, affecting identity and emotional well-being.
The idea, based on social connection, shapes an online videogame led by a network of digital characters: The Roomies. Through this experience, patients can connect and communicate with each other through a new reality that amplifies their room into a digitalized, oneiric hospital. Designing a gamified social network promotes social connections that support emotional and psychological well-being, helping in the healing process and enhancing a model of holistic growth.

ATOM H2 has developed a diesel-free, safe, long-duration energy storage solution for critical infrastructure. Our containerised hybrid system combines solar generation, lithium batteries for efficient daily cycling, and our propietary solid-state hydrogen storage to deliver extended resilience, engineered for competitive technical and economic performance. ATOM H2 provides autonomous, continuous, stable power to telecom towers and other mission-critical sites where downtime is not acceptable. We have validated the technology through paid pilot deployments and have finalised our first industrialised unit, ready for inicial rollouts and installation across global infrastructure portfolios

Moabits empowers businesses to successfully deliver high quality connectivity services by providing a complete suite of solution. We provide an agnostic connectivity management platform, where you can get access to over 30 local and international profiles to satisfy every connectivity need. Additionally, we can integrate one or several operators you may already be working with to centralize your operation, as well as complement from our existing pool wherever you have current gaps
We develop deep-tech software platforms that integrate advanced analytics, modeling, and automation to solve critical challenges in sustainability, climate resilience, and risk management.

MiFood builds robot workers for farms to increase the harvesting speed and energy efficiency, reduce harvesting labor cost by 50% and co2 emissions by 75%, eliminate crop losses, rotten food and workplace accidents in every farm.

Stroke impacts more than 15 million people worldwide each year, representing a massive unmet medical need. Time Is Brain is a fast-growing healthtech startup founded by neurologists from Germans Trias Hospital (Barcelona). We developed BraiN20®, a unique digital solution that enables real-time brain monitoring from stroke onset across the entire care pathway. BraiN20® empowers healthcare teams to make faster, data-driven and personalized decisions, improving outcomes and optimizing resources. We invite investors, partners and healthcare providers to join Time Is Brain in transforming stroke care and creating measurable clinical and economic value.

Semantico is an AI-powered Product Catalog Management Platform designed for multi-brand ecommerce. We automates the entire listing lifecycle—creation, enrichment, localization, and publishing—turning simple reference strings (EAN/SKU) into complete, SEO-ready content. By handling categorization, attribute normalization, and translations, Semantico eliminates the "Catalog-Chaos Tax" of manual work, allowing teams to launch products 10x faster with consistent quality. The platform integrates seamlessly with all major storefronts like Shopify and Magento, transforming catalog operations from a costly bottleneck into a scalable growth engine.
Developer-first AI platform to build real-time multimodal agents that see, hear, and speak.

Aitaca specialises in deep technology solutions for ecommerce. The company’s core product is an innovative digital sizing tool that enables retailers to offer precise fit recommendations to customers, improving the online shopping experience, significantly reducing returns, and unlocking the sales opportunity behind customers that drop early because of sizing frictions. Additionally, aggregate size recommendation data helps retailers understand and close the gap between their offering and the real demand. Aitaca is a leader in applied computer vision and AI, constantly pushing the boundaries of these technologies to drive both business growth and sustainability.

Findspo’s mission is to restore balance between communities, populations, and the planet by connecting different ecosystems with ethical data and advanced AI. The company focuses on global sustainability and “triple impact” (economic, social, environmental) aligned with UN Sustainable Development Goals.

Develops data‑intelligence platforms using big data, machine learning, and proprietary AI models to generate real‑time insights on people, territories, and trends.

Builds end‑to‑end, AI‑driven tools for demographic resilience, migration management, and rural repopulation, often in a GovTech and humanitarian context.

Offers SaaS products plus custom development services to support organizations’ decision‑making and sustainability strategies.

aFactory is a technology partner focused on delivering measurable business impact through AI-driven digital products.
We help organizations across fintech, insurance, retail, mining, and energy increase efficiency, reduce operational costs, and improve customer experience by combining artificial intelligence, data, automation, and custom software development.

We work from strategy and Discovery to PoCs, MVPs, and scalable solutions, enabling faster time-to-market and better decision-making. Our solutions include AI assistants, multi-agent systems, intelligent data platforms, and tailored digital products, designed to solve concrete business challenges, not technology for its own sake.

We are an Artificial Intelligence and deeptech consultancy focused on developing proprietary technology to help companies improve efficiency and innovation. We build AI software that automates work processes and develop AI Agents designed to support daily operations, optimize tasks, and adapt to each organization’s needs in a scalable and flexible way.

We are Seven Sector, a cybersecurity company dedicated to protecting corporations through innovative and proactive security solutions. Our proprietary technology integrates Digital Twins, Honeypots, and Deception Technology to replicate real corporate environments, attract attackers, and redirect threats away from production systems. This approach enables early detection, high-fidelity alerts, and actionable threat intelligence while minimizing operational impact. With a strong focus on innovation and continuous R&D, we help organizations strengthen their cybersecurity posture and build long-term digital resilience across IT, OT, and IoT environments.

Stratos GS is a technology company specialized in geospatial solutions, delivering tailored development, consulting, and data analytics services. We design cloud-native platforms that help organizations manage complex spatial data, improve decision-making, and drive digital transformation across multiple sectors. With strong expertise in GIS, Artificial Intelligence, IoT integration, and scalable architectures, Stratos GS supports clients in optimizing operations, reducing risk, and creating data-driven strategies.

Skills4Impact is a collaborative, expert-led learning hub that equips professionals and organizations with future-ready capabilities for a sustainable world. We blend practical ai-powered learning, practitioner feedback, and community to turn skills into real-world impact.

ONHOFF is a scalable hybrid platform combining consultancy, training and proprietary SaaS to solve 3 structural problems in international organizations: information overload, fragmented brand projection and poor effectiveness, collaboration and interaction of employees.
We enable companies to structure and distribute content by country and language, delivering the right information to each employee at the right time. This generates measurable productivity gains and new KPIs to track digital adoption, performance and collective intelligence.
ONHOFF improves how management and sales teams interact internally and externally, reducing the digital and age divide through a model designed for global scale with local execution.

Calpech is a technology-driven spin-off from the University of Alicante focused on delivering scalable environmental solutions through advanced nanotechnology. The company develops and industrially produces iron-based nanoparticles derived from agricultural waste, enabling a truly circular economy approach. Calpech’s core applications include biogas optimization, environmental remediation, and sustainable energy processes, complemented by specialized laboratory services and applied R&D projects. With a strong scientific foundation and proven industrial results, Calpech bridges research and market needs, transforming waste into high-value products. The company is positioned to scale internationally, offering differentiated, science-backed solutions that accelerate the energy transition and environmental sustainability.

Inrobics offers a CE-certified AI and robotics-based solution, focused on health, education, and aging. Its solutions include Inrobics Rehab: Clinic, which can be delivered via physical robots or virtual avatars in professional settings, Virtual for at-home treatment with virtual avatars; and Analytics, embedded in both, providing real-time insights into user progress. Furthermore, Inrobics Care, which provides personalized home-centered support, companionship, tailored guidance, and promotes social interaction to prevent isolation. All solutions are powered by ALMA, Inrobics’ proprietary social AI technology, combining NLP, conversational interfaces, user adaptation, and adaptative decision-making.

Spain Pavilion at 4YFN 2026 aggregates startups from all over Spain, an attractive showcase of a dynamic, modern high-tech domestic industry focused on innovation. Publicly sponsored by ICEX Spain Trade and Investment and Red.es. Visit us at 8.1C50 to learn about us, meet the startups and share experiences.

Spain Pavilion at 4YFN 2026 aggregates startups from all over Spain, an attractive showcase of a dynamic, modern high-tech domestic industry focused on innovation. Publicly sponsored by ICEX Spain Trade and Investment and Red.es. Visit us at 8.1C50 to learn about us, meet the startups and share experiences.

Ubicuity is a software platform for creating and managing advanced audiovisual experiences (including immersive ones) in physical spaces. 
In short, we make it possible to generate much more impact by creating memorable experiences that last in people's memories.

INEEW is dedicated to advancing emotional education and developing emotional competencies in individuals and organizations. By integrating innovative solutions, the organization combines a cutting-edge EdTech platform with structured training programs and social impact measurement tools that predict future needs. Our comprehensive resources and training programs are designed to cultivate emotional competencies across diverse audiences. INEEW's platform offers over 7,000 science-backed resources within a personalized learning environment. Furthermore, our AI-powered Document management system enhances content creation by optimizing file organization and retrieval, enabling the delivery of adaptive, needs-based programs for greater impact.

Hydra Space is a satellite communications startup, focused on narrowband connectivity. We bring space e2e capabilities and inhouse space&communications tech.
Our EU-sovereign technology goes beyond the traditional LEO constellation, offering vertical, customer tailored, solutions where clients fully control both space and ground segment: asset monitoring, narrowband voice, messaging ... We also integrate our technology with 5G stack
Focus is on defense, security, infrastructure monitoring and maritime comms. Segments where control and sovereignty are key.

Devengo is a Bank of Spain-authorized payment institution powering instant A2A payments via API. We help businesses pay out in seconds—whether disbursing loans, settling marketplace sellers, processing insurance claims, or enabling on-demand salary access. With direct Iberpay connectivity and 99.7% success rates, companies replace slow, manual payment operations with programmable, real-time flows across Spain and the SEPA zone.

BronixIA is a Barcelona-based technology firm specializing in bespoke software development, artificial intelligence (AI), and business process automation. The company partners with enterprises and startups to drive digital transformation through tailored solutions that enhance operational efficiency and competitive advantage. BronixIA’s expertise spans AI integration, custom application development, automation strategies, and technology consulting. With a commitment to innovation and practical implementation, BronixIA helps clients leverage cutting-edge technologies to streamline workflows, improve customer engagement, and accelerate growth. The company’s client-centric approach ensures scalable, results-driven solutions tailored to evolving business needs.

Indaru is a consulting firm specialized in media and data analysis. We exist to help brands extract all of the value from their media investments by using science to solve marketing and business challenges. Our proprietary solutions include AITA, a Marketing Mix Modeling solution that quantifies the true impact of each media channel and external factor, enabling brands to optimise budget allocation based on incremental contribution. We also developed EcoMetrics, an ISO certified CO2 calculator that measures emissions from digital advertising and websites, connecting sustainability metrics with business performance.

Healthtech Innovations is a health Deep Tech spin-off focused on transforming surgical nursing workflows through artificial intelligence, Virtual Reality and robotics. We develop modular, plug-and-play solutions for operating rooms that enhance patient safety, reduce human error and improve operational efficiency.

Our flagship technologies include AI-powered surgical instrument tracking, automated counting systems and immersive virtual reality tools.

UNIFIT is the all-in-one engagement platform powering the entire student lifecycle in higher education. Universities replace fragmented tools with a single, mobile-first system that connects students, staff and alumni in one daily-use environment. UNIFIT drives measurable outcomes: higher engagement, lower dropout, stronger alumni monetisation and real-time ROI visibility.
Trusted by 60+ institutions and hundreds of thousands of users, UNIFIT deploys in weeks and integrates fully with existing CRM, LMS and ERP infrastructure. The platform turns student engagement from an operational cost into a scalable growth driver.

Wealthreader is an innovative banking aggregation solution offering companies and developers a secure API to access financial data from multiple sources, such as bank accounts, credit cards, and investment portfolios. Covering over 200 global banks, Wealthreader enables real-time financial data integration, giving businesses a consolidated view of their assets. The platform stands out for its compliance with PSD2 regulations and ISO-27001 certification, ensuring high standards of security and reliability. Wealthreader also provides tailored tools, such as ownership verification and portfolio composition, suitable for various company sizes.

We got tired of how hard it is to make real-world devices work together. Cameras, sensors, microcontrollers each speaks a different language, making integration slow and fragile.

Vento turns physical devices into controllable software entities. Connect a device and it appears as a live board you can see, inspect, and control. You tell it what to do in plain English, no firmware work, no custom integrations.

Each device runs with an AI agent combining rules for reliability and AI for reasoning, orchestrated locally for safety.

Vento is how AI leaves the screen and starts controlling the real world

WelPay is the foundational distribution and payment layer for the fragmented Employee Benefits ecosystem. We eliminate the friction of multiple integrations by providing merchants with a single API to access 15+ welfare platforms and over 3 million users. By unifying SSO, payment flows, and tax-free compliance, WelPay abstracts market complexity, allowing businesses to scale instantly across travel, health, and education.

FOSSA is a Spanish company with IoT connectivity as the core of its business model. FOSSA designs, develops, integrates and operates its own constellation of satellites, enabling the communication of assets, deployed on the ground, through space. Its objective is to provide a complete IoT solution to enhance, in an accessible and global manner, the information transmission from where it is collected (devices) to where it is beneficial (final user), achieved through satellite communications, independently of the application or the business size.

Gestaverso is a startup founded by two midwives who developed an innovative birthing experience by combining virtual reality technology with external auditory and tactile stimuli to enhance immersion. Originally launched with individualized experiences in a location in Madrid, Gestaverso has expanded its reach by distributing its methodology and training midwives on how to implement it effectively. The blend of cutting-edge technology and professional expertise aims to transform the childbirth process, making it more engaging and supportive for expectant parents. Gestaverso continues to pioneer the integration of technology in maternal care, fostering improved experiences during labor and delivery.

Maska turns green claims into green trust. Our legal tech platform scans websites, packaging and social posts, links each claim to the right EU law, verifies the evidence, and publishes clear proof for consumers via web and QR. Marketing and Legal work in one place with risk scoring and compliant copy suggestions, so approvals are faster, costs are lower and legal exposure drops. As a veracity infrastructure, Maska strengthens security, autonomy and data sovereignty. In short, Maska helps you build Green Trust and show it.

Conus Airway is a medical device startup developing advanced endotracheal tubes designed for simultaneous ventilation and dilation—addressing the challenges of tracheal stenosis and difficult airways. Our patented solutions incorporate a unique conical shape that improves anatomical adaptation and device handling. Currently in the final development stage, we are seeking strategic investors to support clinical validation and market access. Conus Airway offers a breakthrough approach to airway management, combining innovation with medical impact. We invite investors and partners to join us in bringing this technology to healthcare systems worldwide.

MAR TECHNOLOGIES 5.0, founded in October 2018, is an innovative startup born within the BFA acceleration program (part of the CEAGA automotive cluster). 
The company specializes in creating and industrializing advanced technological solutions, combining engineering, sensorization, virtualization, and advanced programming. 
With a focus on technologies 4.0 and 5.0, MAR TECHNOLOGIES 5.0 is dedicated to addressing industrial challenges with innovation, sustainability, and adaptability.

Spain Pavilion at 4YFN 2026 aggregates startups from all over Spain, an attractive showcase of a dynamic, modern high-tech domestic industry focused on innovation. Publicly sponsored by ICEX Spain Trade and Investment and Red.es. Visit us at 8.1C50 to learn about us, meet the startups and share experiences.

Sweanty is a deep tech company that improves workers’ Occupational Health & Safety (OHS) and athletes’ performance through sweat analysis with smart skin patches.

Our technology provides data on salt loss and sweat rates for workers  in high-temperature conditions and athletes, enabling the development of personalised hydration plans that help prevent dehydration and heat stress and boost athletic performance. 

The solution has been validated in industrial environments and with high-performance athletes, leveraging patented technology protected in countries such as Spain, France, Germany, the Netherlands, Finland, the United Kingdom and the United States.

Spain Pavilion at 4YFN 2026 aggregates startups from all over Spain, an attractive showcase of a dynamic, modern high-tech domestic industry focused on innovation. Publicly sponsored by ICEX Spain Trade and Investment and Red.es. Visit us at 8.1C50 to learn about us, meet the startups and share experiences.

ALSense is developing an aptamer-based blood biosensor for the early and specific diagnosis of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). Our platform targets a panel of three biomarkers (neurofilaments and two TDP-43-related cryptic peptides), offering high sensitivity and rapid turnaround. Our main activities include biomarker validation, aptamer engineering, device prototyping and clinical translation. ALSense aims to serve neurologists, hospitals and health systems seeking faster, fairer and more accessible ALS diagnostics.

AIMS Medical develops innovative medical technologies aimed at improving diagnosis treatment and patient care. Our work focuses on the design development and clinical validation of advanced medical devices and digital health solutions. By combining biomedical engineering artificial intelligence and clinical expertise AIMS Medical seeks to provide healthcare professionals with tools that enhance decision-making and patient outcomes.

MedMind is a digital SaaS platform that uses People Analytics to promote mental health and well-being among healthcare professionals working under constant pressure. It provides real-time monitoring to identify stress sources and organizational factors affecting mental health. Through personalized feedback and self-care resources, professionals can improve their well-being, while organizations gain data-driven insights for targeted preventive interventions. After market and technical validation, the team is developing an MVP to test usability and pilot the solution. MedMind aims to humanize healthcare, improve care quality, reduce burnout-related costs, and integrate a diversity, equity, and inclusion perspective through a scalable, evidence-based approach.

RawData is a Barcelona-based AgTech startup providing a comprehensive B2B SaaS platform designed to digitalize and optimize agricultural operations. Our modular solution centralizes critical workflows including workforce management, time tracking, and campaign planning into a single, intuitive system. By integrating advanced tools such as digital field notebooks and crop yield predictions, RawData enhances traceability and empowers data-driven decision-making. We partner with growers, cooperatives, and agribusinesses to unify their information, enabling the agricultural sector to operate more efficiently and scale through reliable, accessible technology. Our mission is to transform agricultural management into a seamless, data-powered experience.

We create a comprehensive accessibility platform combining our WhiteWay App and revolutionary hardware: WhiteJacket. 
WhiteWay uses AI and AR to precisely position users in venues like airports, malls, museums, or public spaces, guiding them to destinations while an AI assistant provides real-time information on points of interest. Seamlessly connected to the app, our WhiteJacket wearable transforms navigation for people with disabilities, and especially for those with visual impairments. It translates surroundings into haptic patterns across the torso, allowing users to "feel" obstacles and directions. 
Together, we offer a unique, world-class comprehensive accessibility platform for venues.

Our project is based on developing next-generation root-canal filling materials. We embed bioactive silica-based microspheres into traditional gutta-percha to boost adhesion to dentin, promote biomineralisation and enable potential drug delivery. We perform lab work to formulate and test these composite materials for bioactivity, sealing quality and biocompatibility. Our mission is to deliver a clinically viable, superior root-filling solution that reduces treatment failure and improves long-term dental health. Our target audience includes dentists, endodontists, dental researchers and dental-device partners.

Vizitio is a marketplace that brings together the best local experiences and activities in one single platform. Using smart search powered by natural language an AI, we connect people with experiences that truly match what they are looking for, in just a few seconds.

We help users discover, compare and book unique activities, while giving local providers visibility, qualified leads and new sales opportunities.

Vizitio turns intentions into memorable moments, making it easier to enjoy, share and create experiences that matter.

AtomModular is revolutionizing the construction industry by industrializing 3D wooden housing modules, merging zero-emission goals with advanced digitalization. By utilizing standardized industrial processes, we significantly reduce both construction timelines and environmental impact. Driven by the mission to solve the global housing crisis, our "Houses built like cars" approach ensures mass-produced, high-quality structures that are easily exportable via truck, train, or ship. Our strategic roadmap scales from B2C to B2B, eventually reaching B2G as we hit 10,000 annual units. By decupling production each phase-year, AtomModular is transforming sustainable housing into a scalable, high-tech reality.

PrevED is an innovative research project developing a mixed reality (MR) intervention to prevent eating disorders (ED) among adolescents and young adults. By addressing emotion dysregulation through an engaging, low-stigma digital therapeutic experience, the project aims to significantly reduce ED risks. Co-designed with students, families, and clinical experts, the tool follows a user-centered design approach, undergoing rigorous testing for usability, user experience, and presence. To validate its efficacy, we are conducting a randomized controlled pilot trial across schools and universities. PrevED empowers youth and educators with accessible technology, transforming early-stage mental health support and prevention

SCAI Engineering is an startup which develops and integrates advanced AI technologies, such as conversational models, artificial vision and prediction models, into custom systems. 

Our main product, KAIROS, brings conversational AI into everyday systems such as ticketing machines, EV chargers, and interactive kiosks, significantly improving usability and accessibility. KAIROS is fully customizable for each deployment and can perform agentic actions on behalf of users and is capable to retrive and analyze real-time data in public or private databases.

Inbound sales remains a massive market burdened by inefficient, costly processes like traditional IVRs and call centers. VoiceB.ai is transforming this landscape with next-generation AI Voice Agents that engage customers in real-time, qualify leads, and integrate directly into sales workflows. The result is significantly higher conversion rates and scalable operations without increasing headcount. Founded by the team behind Whisbi—who pioneered conversational sales for global leaders like AT&T and Vodafone—we are spearheading the AI-powered evolution for the telecom, banking, and insurance sectors. Our mission is to repair a broken market, redefining how AI and humans collaborate to drive growth.

Moodest is an AI-powered employee experience platform that helps People teams design, automate, and scale their programs across the entire employee lifecycle. From onboarding and internal communications to recognition, feedback, and employee support, Moodest runs directly inside the channels employees already use: Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, and more.

Powered by AI agents and deeply integrated with leading HRIS and ATS tools, Moodest executes workflows, answers employee questions, and captures real-time experience data with full context and permissions. The result: fewer manual tasks, faster responses, stronger connections, and actionable people insights, without replacing your existing HR systems.

We design and manufacture urban furniture using pre- and post-consumer textile waste. We aim to reduce textile waste through reuse, creating furniture as a value-added product. Our value lies in developing new urban-use products that help reduce waste from the textile industry, delivering a tangible solution to our clients as a commitment to the environment.

Our platform revolutionizes healthcare training by merging Virtual Reality with advanced haptic gloves to provide precise, high-fidelity tactile feedback. By developing next-generation hardware and an interoperable microcontroller middleware, we overcome the limitations of current VR systems that lack realistic touch interaction. Our R&D focuses on electronic design and firmware development to create scalable actuator networks for surgical training, physical examinations, and rehabilitation. Designed for medical institutions and training centers, this technology ensures immersive and reliable simulation. Ultimately, we aim to deliver an accessible, clinically useful platform that elevates medical education and significantly improves patient outcomes.

The Universitat Internacional de Catalunya (UIC Barcelona) is where academic excellence meets a global and entrepreneurial vision. We offer a dynamic and innovative environment designed to foster talent, creativity, and leadership, preparing students to face future challenges in a rapidly evolving world.

With a comprehensive academic offering that includes undergraduate and master’s degrees, doctoral programs, and lifelong learning, UIC Barcelona is committed to personalized education, small class sizes, and close interaction with highly qualified faculty. Guided by a strong humanistic philosophy, we educate ethical leaders and professionals ready to generate a positive and sustainable impact on society.

TecnoCampus is a technology park hosting over 120 companies and integrating academia—through its four university departments (Business, Health, Technology, and Cultural Industries)—with industry in a single hub for innovation and entrepreneurship. Beyond being a business park, TecnoCampus offers programs supporting entrepreneurship, internationalization, innovation, and access to funding. Its business growth services include tailored support for entrepreneurs, four incubators (Tech Incubator, Antena TrenLab, ThinkIn3D, and Reimagine Textile), financing and strategic guidance, StartHealth, Reempresa, a Talent Pool linking students and businesses, and a modern congress center.

The Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (UAB), located in Bellaterra, near Barcelona, is one of the major public universities in Spain. Since its foundation in 1968, the UAB has been acknowledged for its excellence in promoting quality in teaching, attracting international talent and its impact on research.

The UAB has a strong entrepreneurial vocation, highly committed to encouraging the generation of new ideas and business projects by all members of the university community (researchers, students, professors and administratives).

The UAB is part of the Barcelona Knowledge Alliance, which sponsors the University & Spin-off track at 4YFN26.

Trust on the internet is broken.

Every day, people accept legal agreements they don’t read or understand, creating frustration, mistrust, and poor digital experiences.

At TECOUS we’re changing how legal information is communicated.

We transform complex legal text into clear, layered content that people can explore, listen to, and understand; turning the fine print into user-friendly digital agreements. 

We build long-term trust relationships and improve business results by empowering users to understand what they are agreeing to.

BrainMapp is a medical software company developing AI-assisted solutions for intraoperative brain mapping in awake neurosurgery. Its flagship platform digitalizes and standardizes Electrical Stimulation Mapping (ESM), enabling real-time, structured, and multimodal data capture during tumor resections. BrainMapp integrates neuropsychological testing, audio-visual recording, and spatial mapping to support clinical teams decision-making. Designed for neuropsychologists and neurosurgeons, the system improves data reliability, workflow efficiency, and post-operative analysis. BrainMapp is being clinically validated in multicenter hospital studies and is positioned as a scalable tool for safer, more precise, and data-driven brain surgery.

OPTICmizing brings automation and digitalization to traditionally empirical food industry processes. By integrating advanced optical sensors and intelligent models, we transform data into precise, automated decisions. Our solutions optimize every production stage—from raw material selection to packaging—enhancing quality, standardizing processes, and reducing production costs, resource usage, and energy consumption. Through Industry 4.0 technologies, clients achieve more efficient, sustainable, and profitable operations. Key offerings include pHotoYOGURT, monitoring yogurt fermentation in real time for improved quality and cost savings, and advanced optical sensors that optimize empirical processes, modernizing the food industry through vision and technology.

BioEclosion SL has developed a patented IVD device that enhances the current state of rapid diagnostics. The test integrates a single-use cartridge –specific for each application– and a portable, robust, user-friendly, battery-operated reader that adheres to the REASSURED guidelines defined by the WHO. Our core technology is based on magnetic immunoassays with electrochemical quantification. It provides a universal solution as IVD diagnostic tools by harnessing the potential of magnetic particles, encompassing applications for i) communicable diseases and emerging infectious diseases,  non-communicable diseases (for instance cancer, cardiovascular and diabetes biomarkers), and ii) targets affecting water and food supplies.

Using patented nanotechnology pigments, AI-powered mobile scanning, and blockchain certification, Distinkt creates secure, encrypted QR codes and digital product passports that cannot be copied, hacked, or manipulated. Brands can instantly authenticate products, trace supply chains, comply with emerging DPP regulations, and unlock richer customer engagement—using standard packaging and smartphones. Easy to integrate and industrialize, Distinkt replaces fragile holograms, RFID, and traditional QR codes with a future-proof authentication layer. Beyond fighting counterfeits, we power trust, transparency, and new digital experiences across the entire product lifecycle.

Emprèn UAB generates spin-offs and start-ups at the university. It supports scientists, students, and alumni in transforming ideas into viable projects through mentoring, training, and tailored support. The stand will be a dedicated space to showcase early-stage and active entrepreneurial projects emerging from the UAB ecosystem. Visitors will discover innovative initiatives, connect with emerging talent, and explore how academic knowledge is translated into real-world impact through entrepreneurship.

Balux Vision is an industrial AI company focused on bringing data and computer vision systems into real manufacturing environments.

We design and deploy AI-driven solutions that enable manufacturers to monitor production, detect quality deviations, and gain real-time visibility across the factory floor. Our technology integrates directly with industrial machinery and operational workflows, providing actionable insights where decisions are made: on the shop floor.

Balux Vision builds robust, production-ready systems tailored to industrial constraints, helping manufacturers improve process reliability, product quality, and operational efficiency through data and applied AI.

IQS TECH FACTORY: Turning knowledge into ventures
IQS Tech Factory is the entrepreneurship and venture creation unit of IQS, transforming scientific, technological and business knowledge into business value. We support founders and researchers in transforming research, innovation and expertise into market-ready companies.
Working with IQS Tech Transfer, we provide access to applied research, engineering capabilities, management expertise, laboratories and industrial validation.
Since 2015, IQS Tech Factory has supported over 200 entrepreneurial initiatives across sectors and TRL/BRL levels, from scientific, technological and management fields. We help validate business models, reduce risk, accelerate development and connect with industry and investment partners.

Spain Pavilion at 4YFN 2026 aggregates startups from all over Spain, an attractive showcase of a dynamic, modern high-tech domestic industry focused on innovation. AMB TU – AT HUB builds AI-powered systems and applications for omnichannel communication, live translation, operational automation and data intelligence. Designed for real-world deployment, our systems follow compliance-first and human-AI hybrid models where reliability matters. We want to connect with corporates  and partners exploring applied AI and next-generation CX.

Sport Dynamics Lab helps elite teams and sport brands uncover the truth behind winning. We improve rider technique and equipment–terrain interaction by making invisible performance data visible. By combining real-time telemetry, dynamic lab testing, and FEA simulations, we turn improvements into evidence—not assumptions. Our Empirical Loop transforms athlete feel into measurable reality, so decisions become clearer and faster. With patented FlexDynamics® non-destructive testing, we capture how materials and products truly move, enabling coaches and engineers to refine setup, training, and R&D with confidence.

Idunity is a blockchain-based digital trust platform designed to secure, verify, and exchange critical business data with confidence. It enables organisations to create and manage verifiable digital identities, certificates and traceability records that remain tamper-proof and auditable over time.

Built for industries where transparency, compliance, and data integrity are essential, Idunity helps reduce fraud, improve accountability, and streamline collaboration between multiple stakeholders. Today, Idunity is already live in two real world use cases: i) port operations, improving traceabilty and coordination between maritime actors; and ii) veterinary prescriptions ensuring secure, compliant and verifiable prescription management across clinics and pharmacies

At WX180 Immersive Productions, we’ve mastered the art of capturing reality and presenting it in a truly groundbreaking format. Using state-of-the-art techniques, we craft stories so intimate and so vivid that they blur the line between fiction and reality itself.

The mobile operator for people who stopped answering calls.

We serve digital natives (18–30) with fully app-based mobile plans, instant cancellations, and add-on services like education, gaming, and rewards.

Our product is flexible, transparent and born digital, perfect for partners seeking direct access to Gen Z audiences or integration into a modular, user-first telco.

Blockchain School is an award-winning, European-certified blockchain academy and consultancy based in Andorra. Since 2020, we have trained over 20,000 professionals and partnered with leading industry players and institutions.

We combine high-quality education with real-world consulting, helping companies and entrepreneurs design and implement blockchain and Web3 solutions, from strategy to execution.

At Mobile World Congress, we connect talent, technology, and business to drive responsible blockchain adoption.

Finrack is an inventory valuation and collateral intelligence platform built for banks, asset-based lenders and financing partners. It converts complex, multi-location and seasonal inventories into standardized, finance-grade data directly usable in credit decisions. 

Through transparent valuation, automated collateral reporting and risk-focused analytics, Finrack reduces uncertainty in inventory-backed financing. The platform connects to existing ERP and WMS systems without disrupting borrower operations, providing financiers with continuously updated inventory value instead of static spreadsheets or self-declared reporting. 

Result: better visibility, faster financing, and smarter risk control at scale.

hub.brussels - Brussels Agency for Business Support.

A Unified Ecosystem for Urban Parking & Mobility

Paymeter enables users to discover, reserve, access, and pay for on-street and off-street parking—including barrier-equipped facilities—directly from their smartphone. Through seamless integrations with multiple manufacturers, Paymeter becomes the universal access and payment layer for any parking infrastructure.
For cities, it centralizes regulated parking management, enhances enforcement, and reduces operational costs. For private operators, it unlocks new revenue through digital payments, dynamic pricing, and marketplace features.
Together with iPark—our B2B technology in enforcement, access control, and mobility software—we deliver one of the most complete parking technology stacks in the market.

Ingram is an EU-based Artificial Intelligence R&D lab founded in 2022, presenting Ingram Cloud: an agentic AI cloud platform designed for SMEs and large enterprises. Ingram Cloud enables organizations to deploy, operate, and govern AI agents with exceptional levels of monitorability, auditability, and introspectibility, across both hosted and self-hosted (on-premise) environments. Built with security, compliance, and human-first values at its core, the platform is fully aligned with EU AI Act requirements. Our mission is to democratize trustworthy AI by providing transparent, observable, and controllable agentic systems that empower organizations to innovate responsibly while maintaining full operational oversight.

AxonJay is a multi-award-winning global deep-tech company that has developed a groundbreaking Self-Machine-Learning Platform™. This unique platform reveals and predicts companies' true behavior in real-time, addressing gaps in the AI landscape.
While AI is widely popular -often focusing on NLP and large language models- critical aspects like reinforcement learning, neural networks, path-finding algorithms, and swarm/collective intelligence remain underutilized at scale. These advanced technologies are typically complex to implement in business environments, especially given the constant, real-time changes in data and models. AxonJay’s platform bridges this gap, delivering actionable insights and adaptability in dynamic environments.

We have an app that compare prices between supermarkets, receive notifications when product prices changes, compare your own basket between retailers, get always the best promotions and rebates, scan the barcode and see by yourself where the product is the cheapest. Dialogg.ai is a leading conversational AI platform empowering businesses with advanced chatbots, voicebots, and next-generation Agent Assist solutions. Our mission is to bridge the gap between human expertise and artificial intelligence by augmenting agent performance, ensuring regulatory compliance, and driving measurable ROI. Featuring 24/7 availability, emotional intelligence, and seamless CRM integration, Dialogg.ai transforms customer service into a strategic asset. From no-code SME solutions to enterprise-grade employee assistants, we provide scalable, secure, and intuitive AI interactions that elevate the modern customer journey.

CEVIA.ai is a European AI consultancy and solutions provider helping organizations adopt trusted, high-impact artificial intelligence with confidence. With extensive experience in the startup and corporate ecosystem, Novable’s innovation scouting platform created the perfect space for large corporations to match with agile startups, accelerate their growth and innovation.

Novable empowers innovation professionals to discover unexpected solutions, explore uncharted territories, and build meaningful partnerships through comprehensive scouting campaigns. From search to first engagement, finding your next innovation partner has never been easier.

ByQwest is a cloud-native suite of five independent modules covering card issuing, payments, and core banking.
Use a single module.Combine several.Or deploy the full stack.
No lock-in.No forced roadmap.No black box.
We are built to challenge how issuing platforms work
True modularity: Adopt only what you need.Integrate with legacy. Migrate progressively.Leave cleanly if you ever choose to.
Cloud-native by design:Serverless architecture,active-active-active deployment,automatic scaling—built for extreme peaks and large programs.

Pôle Action Média is a cluster of more than 90 companies in the creative and digital industries in Occitania and Catalonia. Its vocation is the development of this sector and the territory.

Located in North Catalonia, at the strategic crossroads of three European digital and entrepreneurial cities, the cluster brings together all the actors in the ecosystem.

RenovSmart is an AI-powered platform transforming how homeowners plan renovation and construction projects. With a simple project description, our technology instantly understands the user’s needs, identifies the right trades, and recommends relevant companies that have been checked during registration. Our proprietary AI engine combines natural language understanding with contextual analysis to deliver fast and accurate matching. Users receive tailored suggestions or can request up to four quotes within minutes. RenovSmart brings clarity and efficiency to a fragmented market and is now expanding across Europe, inviting strategic partners to join us in scaling our technology across new industries and ecosystems.

Work Smart, Grow Fast. Boond is the leading all-in-one ERP for IT services and consulting companies, trusted by 2,000+ clients and 80,000+ users across 20 countries. Cykero is a European company specializing in the premium refurbishment of electronic products. Binom Mobile is a French company specializing in simplified mobile phones and smartphones tailored for seniors. Founded by Jean-Noël Charpentier, the company focuses on enhancing accessibility and ease of use for elderly users. Binom Mobile's devices feature large buttons, simplified interfaces, and compatibility with most teleassistance services, ensuring comfort and security. Their mission is to empower seniors through technology, promoting independence while staying connected with loved ones. The brand emphasizes innovation and quality, making it a standout solution in the senior tech market. Olago is building the pedestrian layer of urban navigation.
The app helps people move through cities more confidently by suggesting better walking routes based on real-time, community-generated data. Rather than relying on static maps, Olago reflects how streets are actually experienced on foot, at different times and in different contexts.

By starting with consumer adoption, Olago is creating a scalable urban data layer with applications beyond navigation, including partnerships with cities and mobility stakeholders. The product is live on iOS and Android, currently growing in France, and the team is raising capital to accelerate user growth and data density.

GTEK is a company specializing in supporting organizations in the concrete and responsible adoption of artificial intelligence. It offers a comprehensive approach combining assessment, deployment of tailored AI solutions, team training, and operational support. GTEK works with companies, public authorities, and non-profit organizations to automate low-value tasks, improve productivity, and secure AI usage in compliance with GDPR requirements. Its expertise includes chatbots, decision-support tools, conversational AI, and sovereign AI solutions, with a pragmatic, ethical, and human-centered approach.

As a healthcare technology company dedicated to improving hospital communication, R-MES’s mission is to ensure that every message exchanged between patients and caregivers is clear, structured, and clinically relevant.

R-MES is transforming healthcare coordination with Caremind, an innovative virtual nurse system. By replacing traditional call bells, Caremind allows patients to submit structured, qualified requests directly from their rooms.

Using AI, the system analyzes and classifies needs in real-time, delivering prioritized alerts with clear clinical context to caregivers’ mobile devices. This intelligent preprocessing optimizes response times, reduces cognitive load for staff, and significantly enhances the quality of patient care.

Born in France, Wheere set out to solve what GPS couldn’t: accurate tracking indoors and out. Its patented technology uses VHF signals that penetrate 50m of concrete. Already working today with 4 antennas covering 1 km², it will expand worldwide by 2030 through a LEO PNT satellite constellation.

With 30 years of history and 4 campuses across France and Spain, L’Idem is a proudly independent institution. This autonomy allows us to prioritize pedagogical quality and human-scale mentoring.

The European Innovation Council (EIC) is Europe’s flagship innovation programme to identify, develop and scale up breakthrough tech innovations. With a budget of €10.1 billion the EIC supports innovation across the entire lifecycle: from early-stage research to proof of concept, technology transfer, and scaling up of startups and small companies. Financial support can be provided in the form of grants, equity, or a combination of both. But EIC support goes beyond funding: it aims to accelerate innovations for scale up and commercialisation, by providing access to a range of tailor-made EIC Business Acceleration Services to researchers, innovators and entrepreneurs.

ICF (Institut Català de Finances), founded in 1985, is the Government of Catalonia’s public development bank. Our mission is to meet the financing and investment needs of the business and social community to drive the growth and transformation of the Catalan economy.

We offer loans and guarantees to businesses, self-employed individuals and organisations to turn their plans into reality. We also invest in start-ups to support innovative ideas with high growth potential and in small and medium-sized enterprises to help them roll out their strategic transformation plans.

One company. Three products. Full telecom stack.

aryve is the one-stop platform for camera-based indoor navigation, uniting localization, digital twin management, and a device-ready app in a single SaaS solution. Spaces are digitized with aryve’s proprietary VPS technology and managed through an intuitive CMS, giving operators full control to update points of interest, routes, and experiences in real time. From airports to retail venues, aryve delivers reliable, device-agnostic navigation that enhances flow, safety, and customer engagement.

NetAI is a seed-stage startup delivering AI-powered network operations for telecommunications operators. Our patent-pending Graph Neural Network platform provides deterministic root cause analysis and real-time fault correlation at carrier scale. Unlike LLM-based alternatives, NetAI delivers explainable, actionable insights - not probabilistic guesses. At MWC 2026, NetAI is featured in a live demonstration at the Google Cloud booth, showcasing RCA and correlation capabilities for MasOrange network infrastructure - one of Europe's largest mobile operators. We help CSPs reduce MTTR, automate OSS workflows, and optimize network performance. Raising to accelerate U.S. market expansion. Seeking telecom partners and investors.

BeeAgent is an advanced platform for the creation and management of intelligent bots that automate key processes within your company. With a focus on simplicity and efficiency, it enables users of any profile (support, sales, marketing) to configure powerful bots in just minutes.

At CyberTronics, we harness AI to combine education, entertainment, and companionship, creating intelligent experiences that enrich daily life for all ages.

Our Cyber Stage brings this vision to life. Users can create unique personas by attaching NFC stickers to anime figures and stands. Placing these personas on the Cyber Stage enables real-time interactive conversations with distinct voices and personalities, transforming ordinary toys into engaging companions.

Looking ahead, CyberTronics is dedicated to advancing AI technology, enhancing our products to deliver smarter and more personalized interactions, and shaping the future of intelligent play and connection.

BeamLive, the pioneer of "Unified Communication of Things" (UCoT), captures real-time mobile and IoT data with sub-second latency to deliver Actionable Intelligence. We bridge the gap between data and execution by instantly converting field insights into automated tasks within your organization.

By filtering mission-critical data across Edge and AI Cloud, Beam triggers workflows that heighten situational awareness. Our AI agents automate these tasks for IT managers, enabling deployment in weeks with minimal infrastructure cost. Beam empowers enterprises to manage fleets and assign tasks with unprecedented speed, delivering high-value, patented solutions that outpace industry standards.

Based in the UAE, Ghostly Solutions is an innovative B2B cybersecurity startup specializing in AI-driven threat detection and autonomous endpoint protection for the global Enterprise market. Our comprehensive defense ecosystem includes:

GhostGuard: AI-powered browser security preventing real-time AiTM and phishing attacks.

GhostSentinel: A kernel-level desktop engine neutralizing deep-system threats like hVNC and fileless malware.

GhostCloud XDR: A centralized management platform featuring cross-platform threat correlation and seamless SIEM integration.

Fraud Intelligence API: Real-time risk scoring for financial institutions.

We empower enterprises to replace reactive monitoring with autonomous, SOC 2-compliant threat neutralization.

Apeiron Intelligence is transforming advanced simulation into an accessible, intuitive experience for every engineer. Our mission is to democratize next-generation materials innovation by turning complex, expert-only workflows into AI-powered, drag-and-drop simulation pipelines.

From atomic-scale DFT modeling to system-level integration, we streamline and accelerate the design process - reducing simulation times from months to minutes - and unlocking innovation across semiconductors, advanced materials, aerospace, automotive, and quantum technologies.

FuVeX is a technology-driven company specialized in the design and manufacturing of proprietary drones. We develop and build our own aerial platforms, fully engineered in-house to ensure performance, reliability, and adaptability to demanding environments. Beyond hardware, we are experts in high-quality data acquisition through UAX, delivering precise, actionable intelligence for critical operations. Our solutions serve sectors such as public safety, emergency response, industrial inspection, infrastructure management, and defense. By combining advanced engineering, robust systems integration, and data-driven capabilities, FuVeX provides innovative aerial solutions that enhance situational awareness, operational efficiency, and decision-making in complex and mission-critical scenarios.

Startup Portugal is Portuguese entity responsible for promoting entrepreneurship through initiatives of public interest. The Korea Technology Finance Corporation (KOTEC), established on April 1, 1989, is a quasi-governmental institution created under the Korea Technology Finance Corporation Act. It aims to establish and develop the technology guarantee system, ensuring smooth funding for new technology businesses, promoting balanced regional development and balanced national economic growth Additionally, it plays a role in guaranteeing the debts of companies with limited collateral capacities, thus facilitating the flow of funds for these businesses.

Designovel is a generative AI company transforming the fashion–retail value chain.
