Hanteo Global is a data-driven K-POP and K-Culture platform company shaping the global music ecosystem. It operates Hanteo Chart (music data standard), Hanteo News (industry media), Whosfan (global fandom platform), Whosfan Store (official K-POP commerce), and Whosfan Cafe & Store (offline fan experience). Hanteo also produces major events including Hanteo Music Awards (data-based awards) and Hanteo Music Festival (global music convergence). By transforming music and fan data into platforms, content, commerce, and experiences, Hanteo serves as a central partner for artists, labels, brands, and markets entering or expanding within K-POP.

MedySapiens converges AI and bioinformatics to solve rare diseases. Recognized as a '2025 Forbes Asia 100 to Watch,' our SaaS solution, MedyCVi, is clinically validated by SNUH and operational in the USA, Taiwan, and the Philippines. We are building a "Digital Healthcare AI Platform" to bridge clinical insights with real-time life-logs. We are here at MWC to ‘plug in’ our technology with global telcos and ecosystem partners. With Series B underway, we invite strategic investors to accelerate our expansion into Europe and the Middle East. Saving lives, one data point at a time.

Mona provides AI-powered multi-parameter battery inspection solutions for high-reliability quality control at inbound and outbound stages. The system integrates OCV, insulation, impedance (EIS), and LCR measurements to analyze frequency-specific defect signatures, enabling rapid detection of early failures, electrolyte and electrode anomalies, and SOC/SOH deviations within seconds. Mona’s proprietary inspection equipment and AI classification engine seamlessly connect to production lines, logistics workflows, and module/pack assembly processes. Applicable across cell manufacturing, EV supply chains, module and pack production, and service operations, the solution supports process stabilization, defect prevention, and quality variance reduction through extensive field validation and data-driven diagnostics.

Miliwave company next‑generation wireless communication and AI solutions through advanced mmWave RF modules, enabling 5G NR‑U network infrastructure for smart factories, smart cities, intelligent transportation systems, metaverse applications, and FWA backhaul networks. We deliver ultra‑high‑frequency connectivity designed for seamless integration across industrial and urban ecosystems. At MWC Barcelona 2026, we will showcase our innovative theme: autonomous robot‑to‑robot communication powered by 60GHz ultra‑fast M2M wireless links, combined with ultrasonic short‑message transmission. This breakthrough approach highlights our vision to provide secure, high‑capacity, and low‑latency communication platforms that transform industries and empower future digital societies worldwide.

BLUE GOLD Co., Ltd. is a nanochemistry-based technology venture founded in 2014 at Seoul National University in the Republic of Korea. The company develops consumer and industrial products based on high-performance nanomaterial technologies with superhydrophobic, superhydrophilic, and anti-fogging functionalities. Anti-fog lens cleaner LOOY, the representative consumer product, had achieved No.1 sales rankings within its product category in major overseas markets.  Currently, BLUE GOLD is driving global expansion by developing functional nanomaterials that enhance visibility and durability for next-generation AI and smart devices, meeting the demands of the evolving digital era.

Soldoc is Korea's leading digital healthcare company specializing in telemedicine and connected healthcare solutions that bridge real-world health data with clinical decision-making. By developing and operating the AI-Box and a clinician-focused SaaS Virtual Care Room, Soldoc enables integrated management of chronic and neurological conditions through preventive, data-driven care. Its platform connects community-based health data with medical institutions, enhancing care efficiency and accessibility. Focusing on public healthcare and primary clinics, Soldoc is expanding scalable remote care infrastructure while addressing healthcare blind spots and pursuing sustainable growth in both domestic and global healthcare markets.

Solum Advanced Materials has successfully commercialized the world’s first Asymmetric Rolling technology, transforming what was once considered impossible into an industrial reality.
Its proprietary ESAR (Equal Speed Asymmetric Rolling) technology enables the production of ultra-thin materials while maintaining superior structural consistency and mechanical strength.
This breakthrough unlocks new possibilities for innovative and high-performance applications.

EnergyX leads the sustainable architecture industry as the world’s only company offering complete, end-to-end solutions for Zero-Energy Buildings. By reconfiguring traditional, manual processes that rely on limited insights, EnergyX delivers fully optimized, data-driven, hardware-integrated solutions that transform buildings into sustainable, energy self-sufficient structures.
 
 
Leveraging artificial intelligence, software, consulting, engineering, and manufacturing, EnergyX provides simulation, analysis, optimization, and management solutions along with BIPV solutions. With $20mn revenue in 2024, $48mn raised to date, team of 150, and 261 intellectual properties, EnergyX has completed 1,600 building projects, including its headquarters, the EnergyX DY-Building—the world's most iconic Plus-Energy Building.

Featuring Corp. is powered by Featuring AI, Asia's largest data engine, which analyzes 18 million social media channels and over 400 million pieces of content both domestically and internationally. We offer a range of services for influencer marketing, including social media content analysis, trend monitoring, audience analysis, data tracking and data insight. As a result, Featuring has established itself as an essential social media intelligence tool for global major businesses and international markets.

Since 2004, Venturelab has been designing and operating flagship startup programs supporting Switzerland’s top entrepreneurial talent, including Venture Kick, Venture Leaders, the TOP 100 Swiss Startup Award, and Innosuisse Trainings. Working with successful founders, leading academics, and strong industry partners, Venturelab has supported around 90% of Swiss startups. Its alumni have raised over CHF 15 billion in funding and created more than 25,000 jobs.

The Venture Leaders roadshows, as part of the Swiss National Startup Team, connect selected founders with world-class investors and industry leaders: www.venture-leaders.ch/mobile

EM Path, a 2025 spin-off from HEIG-VD, is redefining Radio Frequency testing through wave-imaging technology that eliminates the need for costly, bulky anechoic chambers. Its plug-and-play camera, which can see the waves, enables 100–10,000× faster, 4× more compact, and 4× more cost-effective antenna and wireless system characterization. Targeting a $1.5 B market across SATCOM, wireless, IoT, and EMC sectors, EM Path’s proprietary hardware-data-software platform supports scalable, automated production-line testing. With pilots underway and strong industry traction, EM Path is poised to disrupt decades-old test practices.

SynSense is a world-leading neuromorphic technology company and the first to achieve a full-stack technology portfolio integrating "neuromorphic sensing + neuromorphic computing." Our product suite spans neuromorphic computing, neuromorphic sensing, integrated vision, and neuromorphic software, delivering integrated edge computing solutions for intelligent security, industrial inspection, smart farming, smart devices, brain-computer interface industry and etc.

Algorized builds the nervous system for industrial machines and robots - an edge-AI foundation model and Human-Machine Interaction Engine. Backed by the Amazon Industrial Innovation Fund, Algorized upgrades robotics perception using existing UWB, mmWave, and Wi-Fi sensors. Its technology allows robots to sense human presence and vital signs - even through obstacles - and interpret human intent from movement, proximity, and micro-motion, unlocking safer automation across factories, logistics, automotive, and smart spaces.

BTRY is a spin-off from ETH Zürich and Empa developing ultra-thin solid-state batteries that operate reliably from –40 to 150 °C, delivering reliable performance where conventional lithium-ion cells fail, swell, or even explode. With a thickness starting at just 0.1 mm, BTRY’s batteries charge and discharge in one minute and can directly power wireless transmissions without external capacitors. Their solid-state architecture is intrinsically safe, non-flammable, and resistant to mechanical and thermal stress. Designed for seamless integration into compact devices, BTRY enables new possibilities in consumer electronics, IoT, and MedTech – where safety, speed, and durability are critical.

Synthara is a Swiss semiconductor startup developing in-memory computing IPs for next-generation embedded, edge AI systems and data centers. Its flagship technology, ComputeRAM, is a drop-in replacement for conventional SRAM that performs matrix operations directly in memory, drastically reducing data movement. This results in orders-of-magnitude improvements in throughput and energy efficiency while remaining fully CMOS-compatible and easy to integrate. Synthara targets AI, signal processing, and communication workloads in automotive, industrial, data- centers and IoT applications, enabling faster, more responsive, and more energy-efficient chips without major architectural changes.

nu glass is a Swiss deep-tech startup that improves mobile connectivity by making coated and insulating glass permeable to radio signals. Using a patented laser process, it selectively alters metallic layers without replacing windows or affecting thermal performance. This enables strong  reception inside trains, buildings, and other shielded environments. The solution is fast, clean, and cost-effective compared to repeaters or indoor antennas, reducing energy use and installation effort. nu glass provides a scalable approach that integrates seamlessly into existing infrastructure.

DuoKey is a Swiss cloud security company specializing in advanced encryption and key management solutions for enterprises. We protect sensitive data across major cloud platforms including Microsoft, AWS, Salesforce, ServiceNow and Google Cloud.
Our breakthrough technology uses Multi-Party Computation (MPC) to split and distribute encryption keys across multiple locations, eliminating single points of compromise. Unlike traditional key management systems, DuoKey ensures that even if one system is breached, data remains secure no single entity can access the complete key.

RiPSIM Technologies has developed the world’s first software-defined, eSIM-as-a-Service platform to enable wireless service providers, private network operators and defense departments to design, develop and deliver digital SIMs (aka “eSIMs”) at any time, in any quantity, for any device, and at the highest security level in the wireless industry.

Mosaic SoC AG is a fabless semiconductor company building the lowest-power perception chips for always-on spatial intelligence. Mosaic’s architecture integrates compute, memory, and accelerators into a compact device that delivers real-time SLAM, object detection, and neural inference at a fraction of the power required by existing processors. Mosaic enables AR glasses, mobile devices, robots, and smart sensors to become smaller, more capable, and truly aware of their environment.

Tethys Robotics develops autonomous underwater robots for inspecting, monitoring, and securing subsea cables and critical infrastructure. Spun out of ETH Zurich, Tethys builds compact hybrid AUV/ROV platforms with advanced navigation, sensor-fusion, and real-time 3D mapping. The systems integrate with digital twins and remote-operations centers to improve situational awareness and reduce risk. Serving telecoms, offshore energy, and maritime security, Tethys scales production, certification, and partnerships globally.

KT, the largest telecom company in South Korea, is capitalizing on the world's best network and innovative technology to provide differentiated ICT services. KT is making social progress through its social contribution in terms of people, society and culture and its mutual growth with suppliers.
We are developing various grow-together programs to create shared value with suppliers so that we can lead a mutual growth culture for suppliers, strengthen the Korea Telecom ecosystem and secure a presence in the global marketplace.

INEEJI is an industrial AI software company specializing in explainable AI–based prediction and control for manufacturing industries.
Its solutions are deployed across major heavy industries, including steel, cement, oil refining, petrochemicals, and secondary battery manufacturing.
INEEJI’s offerings are available in cloud and on-premise environments, enabling adoption across industrial sites.
By combining AI-driven prediction and control with LLM-based time-series similarity search, operators can interact with process data through natural language, retrieve historical cases, and make data-driven operational decisions.
These capabilities enable INEEJI to deliver tangible results, including improved production efficiency, enhanced quality stability, and optimized costs across industrial processes.

P2ACH AI is Korea’s leading vision AI company, transforming traditional offline retail into measurable, data-driven assets. Our solution, R.AX, unlocks the "black box" of physical spaces by providing insights into customer journeys, gaze, and dwell time. We are revolutionizing the global media landscape by making offline engagement as interactive and performance-driven as online advertising. By bridging the gap between digital insights and physical experiences, we help brands maximize ROI and retail strategies.

TWINNY develops proprietary autonomous driving algorithms that enable precise navigation in complex indoor and outdoor environments, delivering fully commercialized technology ready for immediate deployment in real industrial sites. Proven through live operation of the NARGO Order Picking solution at large domestic logistics centers, TWINNY demonstrates measurable results, including over threefold productivity improvement, 50% reduction in picking time, and a 90% decrease in mis-picking. With zero infrastructure requirements, the solution minimizes deployment barriers and offers scalable applications across logistics, manufacturing, e-commerce, and 3PL industries.

ELUON, founded in 1998, is a leading total solution provider for mobile network operators (MNOs) and Private 5G/LTE networks.
The company delivers end-to-end multi-layer network solutions for 6G, 5G, and 4G by integrating core network equipment, base stations, charging and location-based systems across heterogeneous wired and wireless networks.

MAYMUST is an AI full stack solutions provider delivering end-to-end services across AI infrastructure, cloud, security, and digital transformation.

Powered by FRACTOS and MUST AI Service, we help organizations move AI from proof of concept to production with reliability and operational efficiency.

Our capabilities span AI infrastructure architecture, MLOps and LLMOps, data pipelines, and hybrid cloud integration.

Through a global partner ecosystem, MAYMUST delivers scalable AI platforms for real-world production environments.

For more information, visit maymust.com.

On Your Side Gownet. 
Gownet is the exclusive South Korean partner of the Global SI Network, providing centralized management for multinational IT projects. With a presence across more than 50 countries, we deliver consistent, high‑quality IT services—from procurement and deployment to asset management and support. For global companies entering the Korean market, Gownet combines deep local expertise with global standards, enabling smooth market entry and scalable IT operations. By eliminating the complexity of managing multiple local vendors, we help partners achieve efficient, standardized IT infrastructure worldwide.

Navifra is a leading manufacturer logistics autonomous navigation solution company that has quickly grown toward achieving the highest market share in the south Korea.  
Navi-Core is Self-developed autonomous navigation technology, enables control with 5mm precision and 0.5 degree accuracy using only 2D LiDAR sensors. It guarantees the same level of precision regardless of the type, manufacturer, or model of the robot. 
Navi-Brain is a control system capable of simultaneously managing over 1000 robots. 
Navi-Infra is the system which integrates Navifra’s autonomous driving technology and traffic control solution to provide an integrated environment for smart logistics and production system.

AI O2O is a generative AI solution company specializing in domain-specific applications, particularly negotiation and marketing content generation. 
Founded by experienced executives from the broadcasting and telecommunications industry, established strategic partnership with Korea University's HI-AI Research Institute.
The company is led by a CEO with a track record of the development world's first AI set-top box, "Giga Genie". 

AI O2O's vision is to accelerate the adoption of generative AI for enterprises, focusing on automating business processes, enhancing revenue and customer experience. The company's mission is to automate and optimize business processes through innovative generative AI solutions.

cPlat AI is building multilingual, emotion-aware AI Avatar Agents for real-world frontline environments, where conversations must feel natural, fast, and reliable. Our technology focuses on recognizing human emotions through voice and facial cues and enabling expressive, real-time responses. Within four months of founding, we secured agreements with Korea’s No.1 telco and a QS top-50 global university, and raised Seed funding in Korea to advance platform development. Designed for enterprise scale, cPlat AI is developing an AI companion and concierge platform for retail, campus, and care use cases, and remains open to strategic global investors and partners.

Langcode is an enterprise AI agent platform provider enabling fast, secure, and scalable agent adoption. Recently selected for a UAE government AI initiative, Langcode serves over 40 global enterprises, including Mercedes-Benz, KT, and 7-Eleven, while ensuring compliance with GDPR and the AI Act.
 
CXP, Langcode’s enterprise-grade AI agent platform, supports industries such as finance, manufacturing, retail, and telecom. Powered by advanced RAG and ReAct pipelines, it automates complex workflows including report generation, contract review, and risk analysis. Through its Unified Agent Hub, CXP seamlessly orchestrates multiple agents with enterprise-grade security and governance.

Digitalzh represents more than just technological progress; it involves locally marketing digital solutions that address local, regional, national, and ultimately global challenges. By collaborating with other market players and organizations, the digital transformation is not only strengthened locally but also internationally. 
By participating in events such as 4YFN we aim to showcase our innovations to an international audience. Sixteen entrepreneurs, elevating their local innovations, grow alongside like-minded partners abroad, united by a shared passion for progress. Through a showcase of technological innovation, we bridge the gap between local needs and global solutions.

RadioSense is a deep tech startup building privacy first sensing using existing Wi-Fi infrastructure. By analyzing radio signals of existing communication protocols, RadioSense detects presence, movement inactivity, and abnormal events without cameras or wearables. The technology supports applications in elderly, healthcare, smart buildings, and facility security by integrating with existing wireless infrastructure. When access to the PHY layer is available, no additional hardware is required. All data processing is designed to be GDPR compliant, ethical by design and locally processed. RadioSense transforms standard Wi-Fi networks into intelligent sensors that lower deployment costs improve safety optimize efficiency and preserve human dignity.

GoDocly is a Dutch startup transforming how multinational businesses produce transfer pricing documentation. Our mission is to prove that high service, affordable pricing, and commercial success can go hand in hand through genuine AI innovation. Combining advanced automation with expert human review, we deliver fully end-to-end, locally compliant Master and Local Files within days, at a price point previously associated only with basic, self-serve tools. Built by a multidisciplinary team with deep experience in AI, technology, and international tax, GoDocly is redefining intelligent compliance for the mid-market.

SourceGeek is an AI-powered sourcing platform that automates candidate search, personalized outreach and follow-ups. Designed for modern recruiters, it streamlines the sourcing process to save time, increase response rates, and improve hire quality. With intelligent matching and easy-to-use workflows, SourceGeek empowers teams to focus less on manual tasks and more on connecting with top talent.

Logichainge aims to make the logistic activities within companies worldwide smarter and more sustainable. Our software makes processes more efficient, reduces errors, and improves the sustainability of order processing. Using our own AI models, we eliminate manual actions from the order process and we correct and enrich all data gaps in that process, being an add-on to existing ERP systems.

Our clients' ERP systems need to communicate with many other systems. Whether it's incoming data from their customers or data flows between departments, gaps arise everywhere. We can prevent or resolve them by providing the desired information through API calls.

PhoneCam is the world’s first miniature, affordable AI body camera that connects to your smartphone. With just one push of a button, you can instantly share live video, audio, and location on a map.

By connecting to your PhoneCam app, PhoneCam integrates with smart AI features like detection, navigation, text recognition and reporting.

Our mission is to create a safer and more inclusive world. We empower security, care & support staff to receive realtime support and record for evidence. We are also committed to enhancing the lives of individuals with low vision.

PhoneCam, your ideal wearable personal (AI) assistant.

everox is revolutionising the construction supply chain by turning end-of-life concrete into high-quality building materials like cement, sand, and aggregate. Unlike traditional methods, where waste concrete is downcycled or sent to landfills, our advanced upcycling technology enables concrete-to-concrete upcycling at the demolition site, creating a more sustainable, circular economy. Our process not only reduces the reliance on virgin materials but also supports the creation of low-carbon concrete, significantly mitigating the 8% of global CO2 emissions attributed to cement production. It ensures minimal water demand, dryness, and high reactivity in the recycled cement paste.

WeVerify
Others Trust, WeVerify! WeVerify is a a unified platform for identity verification, business verification and electronic signatures to eliminate fraud and strengthen digital safety. Our solutions and checks operate in real time, are mobile app-first, and can be performed remotely anywhere. Organizations can securely verify individuals, companies and authorities in compliance with international standards, ensuring authenticity in every interaction. With advanced technology and seamless integration, WeVerify simplifies onboarding, enhances security and supports regulatory compliance for businesses worldwide. From instant identity checks to legally binding e-signatures, we deliver a complete ecosystem because in a digital world, verification is everything.

Husense unlocks the full potential of physical spaces through our advanced AI-radar sensor and powerful analytics platform. Our "See the Pattern, not the Person" technology guarantees complete privacy without using any cameras.

These actionable insights empower organizations across smart cities, real estate, and retail to optimize efficiency, improve user experience, and enhance safety through data-driven decision-making. Husense helps you understand your space so you can make it fundamentally better.

RISE LENS is an AI-powered venture risk intelligence platform designed to make venture investing more data-driven, transparent, and consistent. We analyze unstructured startup data—such as pitch decks, financials, and market signals—to quantify risk across key dimensions and generate explainable, predictive insights. Our platform automates institutional-grade due diligence and continuously monitors portfolio risk, enabling VC funds to make faster and smarter investment decisions.

QSA Technology is a deep-tech spin-out from the University of Twente, developing hardware-based authentication solutions for quantum-secure communication. Our core innovation is a patented photonic fingerprint chip that enables physical, unclonable identity authentication. Designed for integration with QKD systems and secure digital infrastructure, the chip ensures quantum-resilient authentication at the hardware level. We focus on scalable photonic solutions for telecom, space, and defense sectors. Our mission is to build trust in the digital infrastructure of the quantum era through secure, future-proof authentication.

Yookr is an independent agri-tech company specialising in agricultural and environmental monitoring. We combine IoT sensors with drone and satellite data to measure key soil, atmospheric, crop and weather conditions in real time across farms, cities and sports facilities. All software is developed in-house using open-source technology and hosted in Europe, keeping costs low and data ownership transparent. Through a customisable dashboard, organisations can visualise their data or apply analysis and predictions to optimise operations. Yookr helps save costs in time, labour and resources while providing clarity, control and peace of mind.

EduvolutionX creates the education space of the future by seamlessly combining digital and physical technologies. Through an interactive learning platform enhanced with context-aware, adaptive AI, we tailor education to the needs of every student. Our approach makes learning more inclusive and ensures each learner has the opportunity to flourish. The EduvolutionX STEAM platform is an all-in-one environment that integrates programming, mechanics, hardware problem-solving, and more. By focusing on hands-on skill development and curiosity-driven learning, we make education engaging, practical, and fun. EduvolutionX also experiments with Smart Glasses integrated approach to explore opportunities of limiting screen time, preparing for tomorrow.

Antennex specializes in Over-The-Air (OTA) antenna measurement technology and services. In response to meet the shift to integrated antennas, and a growing industry demand for fast, reliable wireless testing, in 2023 we introduced The Wireless Connector™, a compact, automated tabletop chamber for OTA measurements between 5 and 170 GHz. Built on reverberation-chamber technology, it reliably runs key power-based tests 100 to 1000 faster than other measurement systems and offers a scalable path to next-generation RF performance validation for wireless communications, automotive, aerospace, defense, and more. Antennex also provides expert measurement and consulting services to help you meet your testing needs.

Aircision develops defense-grade optical wireless communication systems delivering high-capacity, low-latency, and inherently secure connectivity, fully compatible with and complementary to RF networks. Based on advanced free-space optics and active alignment, Aircision enables license-free links that are highly resistant to interception and jamming, immune to RF congestion, and independent of spectrum availability.
For Defense, Aircision supports rapid-deployment, resilient, and covert communications for mission-critical operations and secure infrastructure. For Telecommunications, it augments RF and fiber with high-performance optical wireless links for enterprise, campus, and infrastructure connectivity where fiber is unavailable or impractical.

Zander Labs is a German-Dutch deep tech company at the forefront of passive brain-computer interfaces (passive BCI) and neuroadaptive technology.
‍
We are pioneering brain-computer interfaces designed to unlock real-time insights into mental states and create truly responsive technologies that understand, adapt to, and evolve with us.

We believe technology should serve humanity, not the other way around. That’s why we’re creating a future built on rigorous scientific principles, using natural brain activity to enable effortless human-tech communication.

Waste management is increasingly critical and costly under modern ESG regulations and most businesses already have their hands full with their core operations. Reconnai solves this by building robust waste data infrastructure that makes waste management efficient, compliant, and hassle-free. Through smart scanning, automated data collection, and AI-driven analysis, we significantly reduce operating costs and time while continuously improving environmental insights. Our infrastructure enables organizations to manage waste correctly, effortlessly, and sustainably across diverse industries. SustainaSeed provides VerityBase, a global platform that collects, structures, and analyzes sustainability solutions from around the world. Next Meats is the most prominent food tech venture company started in Tokyo in 2020. Our product has only 3 main ingredients which are soy protein, oil and water. We also created vegan foir gras, vegan caviar and vegan butter with Italian truffle.

We, cuoncrop inc., make sustainability measurable, usable, and monetizable for food businesses. We provide “My-Eco-Ruler,” an AI-driven SaaS that supports value creations in product development and market expansion based on data analytics including the market data and the environmental value of individual products using multifaceted indicators—not just carbon reduction—with focus on the food and 　agriculture sectors. We help companies move beyond vague eco-friendly claims like “plant-based” or “locally produced.” Our goal is to 　promote product development with broader ideas and sales of products and services with clearer, measurable environmental impact, thereby accelerating the realization of a sustainable society.

Beyond products, Wagashi builds experiential brands across retail, events, and international markets, connecting culture, gastronomy, and creativity through carefully curated food experiences.

Gigalogy provides AI-enabled personalization for e-commerce businesses. Our mission is to help businesses increase their revenue and create brand loyalty by delivering an end-to-end personalized experience to each consumer in real time.

beME is an AI-powered LegalTech and Trust & Safety platform that helps individuals and organizations detect, remove, and legally respond to harmful online content — including deepfakes, image-based abuse, and defamation. Let’s unlock global markets—smarter, faster, together.

ONESTRUCTION’s mission is to “Be the Bridge between Construction and Technology”. We develop and provide software solutions that empower customers to optimize workflows for creating and leveraging better, interoperable construction data (from BIM to unstructured data) by bringing the benefits of digitalisation and AI to real construction workflows. With this as a foundation, we strive to become a global leader in driving productive digitalisation in industry as a CONSTRUCTION×DATA×AI Platformer.

Biodata Bank is a Japanese health-tech innovator that has developed a patented heat flux sensor, featured in CANARIA+, our flagship Heat Warning Watch™. This device precisely tracks core body temperature changes in real-time and triggers alerts when dangerous or unstable levels are detected. The alert system is simple and universal: the watch vibrates, the LED shifts from green to red, and an alarm sounds. Since 2020, having sold more than 1 million units worldwide, we have been protecting workers across industries such as construction, energy, foundries, and more.

Qlay is an AI Proctor that detects the most sophisticated AI-assisted cheating in online interviews and tests. It has two core components:
1) Mobile app that turns the interviewee's smartphone into a secondary camera. This mobile app uses object detection AI models to flag unauthorized devices and suspicious body, head, or hand movements in real time.
2) Desktop app that tracks eye-gaze, analyzes speech-pattern to identify AI-generated responses, detects tab-switch, and finds AI tools running on the computer.

Southwood is a Japan based medical AI company focused on transforming point-of-care ultrasound into a scalable clinical decision-support tool. We develop AI-powered software that enhances portable ultrasound by assisting with image interpretation, workflow, and diagnostic efficiency.

Our mission is to bridge cutting-edge medical research with real-world clinical practice. By supporting frontline physicians, non-specialists, and healthcare systems facing workforce shortages and aging populations, we enable faster, more accurate diagnosis at the bedside.

Looking ahead, Southwood is building a platform that expands access to high-quality diagnostics, starting with cardiovascular care and scaling globally through strategic partnerships and device integration.

Dwilar is a global credit assessment platform built to support cross-border individuals and businesses. We enable financial institutions, landlords, and service providers to assess the creditworthiness of foreign nationals using overseas financial data, open banking, and alternative data sources. Our platform currently supports applicants from 62 countries, with particularly strong coverage across Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America, regions that have traditionally been very difficult to evaluate due to fragmented or inaccessible credit infrastructure. By transforming complex, country-specific data into standardized insights through AI, Dwilar reduces risk, improves approval accuracy, and unlocks access to housing and financial services worldwide.

Ubiqu provides the secure backbone behind electronic wallets and trust services such as signatures, seals, and timestamps.We offer certified, flexible components that allow organisations to deliver high-assurance digital identity without locking into closed platforms or device-dependent solutions. At the core is the Remote Secure Element, where cryptographic keys and the rules governing their use are enforced together in Hardware Secure Modules (HSM). This enables identity, authentication, and trust services to be embedded into existing platforms and ecosystems, while remaining scalable, auditable, and ready to evolve as requirements change.

ICTK: The Pioneer of Hardware Root of Trust
ICTK is a global leader in hardware security, providing ultimate protection for the Hyper-connected world. Our patented VIA PUF technology offers a unique, tamper-proof "Digital Fingerprint" for chips, ensuring an immutable Root of Trust. Unlike software-based solutions, our hardware security IPs and security chips deliver unparalleled reliability for IoT, 5G, Automotive, and AI applications. Visit ICTK at MWC to discover how we are securing the future of connectivity with our world-first, zero-touch security solutions.

Founded in 2018, TURING is Korea’s leading AI-driven edtech start-up. Our flagship service, Math King (수학대왕), delivers customized problem sets and lectures through advanced AI diagnostics and recommendation algorithms. AIM Intelligence develops AI security solutions that automatically identify vulnerabilities in enterprise AI systems and defend them in real time.

Our core products, AIM Red(automated AI red teaming) and AIM Guard(real-time guardrails), continuously generate thousands of adversarial attack scenarios every day and are designed to block over 99% of harmful behaviors in real-time.  

AIM Intelligence serves more than 15 enterprise and government customers, including LG Electronics, Meta, Anthropic, and public-sector institutions such as TTA and KISA. Within the first year of operation, the company has achieved over USD 0.9M in annualized revenue.

Founded in 2012 with the launch of its adaptive learning service, Mildang English, IHFB Inc. has spent over a decade pursuing its mission to expand access to high-quality education. Resizes is the technology core that orchestrates complete stacks: applications, AI agents, APIs, databases, MCPs, and every component a business runs on. It acts as the unified layer where everything deploys, scales, and connects across any cloud environment without switching tools.

Resizes is the foundational technology decision that determines how quickly a company can execute and how confidently it can scale.

Aritium was born with the determination of transforming the way in which hospitals and healthcare organizations operate all over the world by developing the concept of the Smart Healthcare. Tenderly es una plataforma SaaS creada por Cadabit que centraliza todo el trabajo de las licitaciones públicas Españolas.

Las empresas ya no buscan las oportunidades, leen los pliegos o redactan los documentos a mano porque Tenderly reúne todos los documentos oficiales, extrae la información con IA y permite redactar memorias y presupuestos dentro de la plataforma.

Funciona como un CRM de licitaciones y aporta inteligencia competitiva sobre quién gana y cómo. Las empresas triplican las licitaciones preparadas, aumentan un 15% su tasa de éxito y reducen un 20% los recursos. Tenderly cerrará el año con 15 empresas suscritas.

Lessthan3 is a global technology company specializing in artificial intelligence-driven predictive observability, engineered to manage critical infrastructure in hybrid and multicloud environments.

K-water shall contribute to improving the livelihood of the Korean people, enhancing public welfare by ensuring an abundant supply of clean water, including residential and industrial water, and improving water quality through the comprehensive development and efficient management of water resources (Article 1 of the Korea Resources Corporation Act).
Since 1967, K-water has built Korea's foundation for sustainable growth through advanced water management and infrastructure. Now a global leader, it uses super-gap technologies like Digital Twin and AI-based treatment plants. K-water has completed 120 projects in 41 countries and leads international governance by establishing the Asia Water Council (AWC).

Bettermaps builds AI products that transform historical sources into accurate, verifiable knowledge. Bettermaps Biographies helps researchers, educators, and creators explore people, places, and events as connected stories across time and geography. Bettermaps Archives enables archives, libraries, and museums to extract structured metadata, entities, timelines, and locations from documents, scans, and catalogs, keeping clear links back to evidence. Our workflows combine automation with validation, reducing manual work while improving consistency and trust. The result is faster discovery, better access to collections, and high-quality historical information ready for publication, mapping, and analysis. Built for teams who need speed, rigor, and clear provenance.

Blue Route Technologies for Neurodevelopment is a Digital Health company developing AI-powered solutions for early screening, diagnosis, and personalized digital therapy in neurodevelopmental disorders, with a primary focus on Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). 

Its flagship platform, La Ruta Azul, combines evidence-based clinical standards with artificial intelligence, behavioral video analysis, and adaptive digital therapeutics. 

Designed under European medical device and data protection regulations, the platform enables faster diagnosis and scalable access to care. Blue Route operates under a hybrid B2C and B2B model, partnering with families, healthcare providers, and institutions to improve outcomes and democratize neurodevelopmental care.

GeoGrid is a PropTech company building BLOS (Building Oasis), a building-wide water purification and monitoring system. We deliver drinkable-quality tap water from every outlet, improve water quality in aging pipes, extend pipe life in new buildings, and provide real-time analytics and reporting to reduce maintenance and support compliant building operations.

Ino-on Inc. is leading the innovation of facility safety management with AIoT-based smart monitoring technology. (HW) Ino-Vibe GB, which combines sensors, communication, and AI, is installed in the facility to collect and analyze key data such as vibration, deformation, and tilt in real time, and provides visualization information based on charts, graphs, spectograms, and 3D modeling through the (SW)GB Web. The 'GB Solution' enables data-based efficient maintenance and is contributing to securing technological reliability and spreading the smart infrastructure market through various infrastructure demonstration and application of public institutions.

DroMii is a GeoAI company specializing in spatial information and AI-based water pollution management. Its flagship, K-AQUAS, integrates satellite(Super Resolution) & drone imagery with AI object detection to create a comprehensive pollution monitoring platform, addressing challenges of non-point source pollution.
DroMii unifies pollution visualization using AI and data fusion for mapping & 3D visualization. K-AQUAS automatically identifies priority zones with high accuracy(>95% for land cover). It has Global Expansion efforts and proven Traction with K-Water.
K-AQUAS is a cloud-based platform for non-point pollution monitoring. It provides AI-generated land-cover maps and 3D visualization. Revenue is generated via B2G, B2B & SaaS.

Sensor-Free Smart Leak Detection is an AI- and cloud-powered solution that detects water leaks in real time using existing remote meter data, eliminating the need for additional sensors. It analyzes hourly usage patterns to classify four leak types, such as toilet, yard, fire hydrant, and pipe bursts, while also assessing severity and estimating water loss. Residents and managers receive instant notifications via SMS or KakaoTalk, and post-repair monitoring verifies resolution, ensuring reliability and accountability.

Stellarvision is a satellite data intelligence company specializing in SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) analytics and AI-powered geospatial solutions. By integrating data from over 300 satellites, we enable seamless satellite data access, analysis, and monitoring worldwide. Our core technologies, SAR-to-EO image colorization, AI-powered object detection, and multi-temporal sensor analysis, deliver actionable insights even in cloud, smoke, or night. From disaster response to infrastructure monitoring, we support global agencies with real-time, data-driven decisions. With ongoing expansion across Asia, the Middle East, and beyond, Stellarvision is committed to redefining how organizations harness satellite intelligence for a safer, smarter world.

WI.Plat Co., Ltd. is a water technology company specializing in AI- and IoT-based solutions for non-revenue water reduction. Through its NELOW system, the company supports utilities worldwide by providing data-driven leak detection, smart monitoring, and performance-based water loss management services.

The African AI Language Models project convenes the G6 Mobile Network Operators and other telecommunications companies, public and private sector actors, academia, and civil society in a collaborative drive to accelerate the building and adoption of scalable, relevant, and inclusive AI language models for African Languages

Zindi has built the largest network of data and AI practitioners in Africa and other LMICs. Our network of 100,000 data scientists come together on the Zindi platform to build their skills while solving some of the world's most pressing challenges using AI and machine learning. Through competitions, learning pathways, and data-driven professional profiles, Zindi transforms practical problem-solving into measurable career outcomes. We have partnered with organizations like AWS, Google, Microsoft, IBM, EY, and governments in Togo, Mexico, Singapore, and Saudi Arabia to: Run world-class hackathons, source customized AI and data solutions, and upskill learners in data science and AI.

DataSpires is unlocking Africa’s compute. We map every GPU, cloud, and data centre across the continent, turning a fragmented ecosystem into a single, accessible platform. Startups, researchers, and enterprises can discover, access, and scale compute instantly. By connecting supply with demand and enabling smarter partnerships and financing, we make Africa’s AI future possible today. Africa’s compute, mapped and unlocked—built for builders, to power the next wave of AI innovation.

ToumAI builds voice-first, on-device AI that lets any mobile app speak local languages and dialects, so people can simply talk to pay, manage their banking, and access services. Our plug-and-play SDK runs offline on basic phones, turning inclusion into a feature and making technology adapt to people, not the other way around.

PAWA AI is a Pan-African AI company building small language models and developer tools optimized for African languages and low-resource environments. We provide multilingual chat and enterprise AI capabilities through products like PAWA Chat and PAWA Builder, enabling businesses to deploy localized assistants, search, and automation. Our models are trained on large-scale African language datasets and designed to run efficiently while delivering high accuracy and cultural relevance. PAWA AI serves developers, SMEs, and institutions across Africa with APIs, customization, and deployment support, helping communities access knowledge, services, and education in the languages they speak everyday.

HPE helps service providers, telcos and enterprises build and run the networks that power today’s digital economy. With more than 30 years of experience in telecom and over 300 telco customers across 160 countries, HPE supports some of the world’s largest networks from core infrastructure to the intelligent edge.

With the acquisition of Juniper Networks and combination of HPE Juniper and HPE Aruba Networking, HPE is creating a new generation of networks that are secure, AI-native, and built for hybrid cloud and AI. Together HPE is delivering a unified networking fabric across data centers, campuses, branches, and the edge, powered by agentic AI that simplifies operations, strengthens security, and enables faster innovation at scale.
